5095    /// `request_repaint` was called — which is how the tray's "Open" wakes us.
5096    fn logic(&mut self, ctx: &egui::Context, _frame: &mut eframe::Frame) {
5097        // ── UI-freeze watchdog heartbeat ──────────────────────────────────────
5098        // Stamp "the UI thread is alive" at the start of every frame. A frame that
5099        // enters here and never returns — or whose subsequent egui paint hangs
5100        // (e.g. a GPU emote-texture stall) — stops beating, and the watchdog thread
5101        // surfaces a native dialog instead of a silent freeze. The ≥1 fps repaint
5102        // floor keeps a *healthy* idle (reactive) UI beating so it never
5103        // false-alarms; while minimised the OS legitimately stops delivering
5104        // frames, so we mark the heartbeat inactive to suppress the alarm there.
5105        self.heartbeat.beat();
5106        self.heartbeat.set_activity(crate::watchdog::Activity::Frame);
5107        let minimized = ctx.input(|i| i.viewport().minimized).unwrap_or(false);
5108        self.heartbeat.set_active(!minimized);
5109        ctx.request_repaint_after(std::time::Duration::from_secs(1));
5110
5111        self.pump_messages(ctx);
5112        self.drain_pending_browse();
5113        self.drain_pending_save();
5114        self.drain_pending_reload();
5115        self.drain_pending_schedule();
5116
5117        // Keep repainting at 50ms while a background DB load is in-flight so
5118        // the result is shown as soon as it arrives, not after the 1s heartbeat.
5119        if self.pending_save.is_some()
5120            || self.pending_reload.is_some()
5121            || self.pending_schedule.is_some()
5122        {
5123            ctx.request_repaint_after(std::time::Duration::from_millis(50));
5124        }
5125
5126        // Close button hides to tray unless we're really quitting.
5127        if ctx.input(|i| i.viewport().close_requested()) && !self.quitting {
5128            ctx.send_viewport_cmd(egui::ViewportCommand::CancelClose);
5129            ctx.send_viewport_cmd(egui::ViewportCommand::Visible(false));
5130        }
5131    }
5132
5133    fn ui(&mut self, ui: &mut egui::Ui, _frame: &mut eframe::Frame) {
5134        self.handle_shortcuts(ui.ctx());
5135
5136        egui::Panel::top("top")
5137            .resizable(false)
5138            .show_inside(ui, |ui| {
5139                ui.horizontal(|ui| {
5140                    ui.heading("StreamArchiver");
5141                    let built_dt = env!("BUILD_UNIX")
5142                        .parse::<i64>()
5143                        .ok()
5144                        .and_then(|s| chrono::DateTime::from_timestamp(s, 0))
5145                        .map(|dt| dt.with_timezone(&chrono::Local));
5146                    let built_short = built_dt
5147                        .map(|dt| dt.format("%m-%d %H:%M").to_string())
5148                        .unwrap_or_default();
5149                    let built_full = built_dt
5150                        .map(|dt| dt.format("%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S").to_string())
5151                        .unwrap_or_default();
5152                    ui.label(
5153                        egui::RichText::new(format!(
5154                            "v{} · {} · built {built_short}",
5155                            env!("APP_VERSION"),
5156                            env!("GIT_HASH"),
5157                        ))
5158                        .small()
5159                        .color(egui::Color32::from_gray(0x90)),
5160                    )
5161                    .on_hover_text(format!(
5162                        "StreamArchiver v{} · build {}\ncommit {}\ncompiled {built_full}",
5163                        env!("APP_VERSION"),
5164                        env!("BUILD_NUMBER"),
5165                        env!("GIT_HASH"),
5166                    ));
5167                    ui.separator();
5168                    ui.selectable_value(&mut self.view, View::Streams, "Streams");
5169                    ui.selectable_value(&mut self.view, View::Videos, "Videos");
5170                    ui.selectable_value(&mut self.view, View::Schedule, "Schedule");
5171                    ui.selectable_value(&mut self.view, View::Background, "Background");
5172                    ui.selectable_value(&mut self.view, View::Settings, "Settings");
5173                    if ui.selectable_value(&mut self.view, View::Stats, "Stats").clicked() {
5174                        self.stats_snapshot = None; // force reload on tab open
5175                    }
5176                    if cfg!(debug_assertions) {
5177                        ui.selectable_value(&mut self.view, View::Debug, "Debug");
5178                    }
5179                    ui.separator();
5180                    if ui
5181                        .checkbox(&mut self.status_bgcolor, "Status bgcolor")
5182                        .on_hover_text(
5183                            "Tint Streams rows by status (recording / ad playing / failed). \
5184                             Row selection is still highlighted when this is off.",
5185                        )
5186                        .changed()
5187                    {
5188                        let _ = self.core.store.set_setting(
5189                            K_STATUS_BGCOLOR,
5190                            if self.status_bgcolor { "1" } else { "0" },
5191                        );
5192                    }
5193                    if ui
5194                        .checkbox(&mut self.shorten_timestamps, "Short timestamps")
5195                        .on_hover_text(
5196                            "Show timestamps in a compact short format (e.g. 21/06 14:02) \
5197                             instead of the full datetime. Hover any timestamp for the full value. \
5198                             The short format is configurable in Settings → Display.",
5199                        )
5200                        .changed()
5201                    {
5202                        set_short_ts(self.shorten_timestamps);
5203                        let _ = self.core.store.set_setting(
5204                            K_SHORT_TIMESTAMPS,
5205                            if self.shorten_timestamps { "1" } else { "0" },
5206                        );
5207                    }
5208                    ui.with_layout(egui::Layout::right_to_left(egui::Align::Center), |ui| {
5209                        // Pinned far-right and shown on every view — the process
5210                        // manager is a global utility, not Background-specific.
5211                        if ui
5212                            .button("🖥 Process manager")
5213                            .on_hover_text(
5214                                "All spawned download tool processes (recordings, videos, \
5215                                 chat) — PIDs, status, and manual Stop / Kill.",
5216                            )
5217                            .clicked()
5218                        {
5219                            self.show_processes = true;
5220                            self.processes_refreshed = None; // force an immediate refresh
5221                        }
5222                        {
5223                            let quota_warnings = self.active_quota_warnings();
5224                            let n = self.issues_recs.len() + self.issues_missing.len()
5225                                + self.issues_errors.len() + self.issues_errors_no_file.len()
5226                                + quota_warnings.len();
5227                            let label = if n > 0 {
5228                                format!("⚠ Issues ({})", n)
5229                            } else {
5230                                "⚠ Issues".to_string()
5231                            };
5232                            let btn = egui::Button::new(label).small();
5233                            let btn = if n > 0 {
5234                                btn.fill(egui::Color32::from_rgb(160, 90, 10))
5235                            } else {
5236                                btn
5237                            };
5238                            if ui
5239                                .add(btn)
5240                                .on_hover_text("Recordings and quota warnings that need attention")
5241                                .clicked()
5242                            {
5243                                self.show_issues = true;
5244                                self.issues_refreshed = None;
5245                            }
5246                        }
5247                        if self.view == View::Streams {
5248                            if ui
5249                                .button("➕ Add stream")
5250                                .on_hover_text("Create a channel with its first instance (a URL to record)")
5251                                .clicked()
5252                            {
5253                                self.form = Some(MonitorForm::new_channel(
5254                                    &self.monitor_defaults,
5255                                    &self.settings.default_output_dir,
5256                                ));
5257                            }
5258                            if ui
5259                                .button("➕ Add channel")
5260                                .on_hover_text("Create an empty channel container; add instances to it afterwards")
5261                                .clicked()
5262                            {
5263                                self.channel_form = Some(ChannelForm {
5264                                    id: None,
5265                                    name: String::new(),
5266                                    color: String::new(),
5267                                });
5268                            }
5269                            if ui
5270                                .button("⇔")
5271                                .on_hover_text("Auto-fit all columns to their content width")
5272                                .clicked()
5273                            {
5274                                self.reset_streams_columns = true;
5275                            }
5276                        }
5277                    });
5278                });
5279            });
5280
5281        egui::Panel::bottom("status")
5282            .resizable(false)
5283            .show_inside(ui, |ui| {
5284                ui.horizontal(|ui| {
5285                    ui.label(if self.status.is_empty() {
5286                        "Ready."
5287                    } else {
5288                        &self.status
5289                    });
5290                });
5291            });
5292
5293        let panel_resp = egui::CentralPanel::default().show_inside(ui, |ui| match self.view {
5294            View::Streams => self.channels_view(ui),
5295            View::Videos => self.videos_view(ui),
5296            View::Schedule => self.schedule_view(ui),
5297            View::Background => self.background_view(ui),
5298            View::Settings => self.settings_view(ui),
5299            View::Stats => self.stats_view(ui),
5300            View::Debug => self.debug_view(ui),
5301        });
5302
5303        // ── Main-panel context menu (right-click on empty space) ──
5304        let view = self.view;
5305        let mut ctx_add_stream = false;
5306        let mut ctx_add_channel = false;
5307        let mut ctx_refresh_schedule = false;
5308        let mut ctx_open_proc_mgr = false;
5309        let mut ctx_save_settings = false;
5310        panel_resp.response.context_menu(|ui| {
5311            match view {
5312                View::Streams => {
5313                    if ui.button("➕  Add stream").clicked() {
5314                        ctx_add_stream = true;
5315                        ui.close();
5316                    }
5317                    if ui.button("➕  Add channel").clicked() {
5318                        ctx_add_channel = true;
5319                        ui.close();
5320                    }
5321                }
5322                View::Schedule => {
5323                    if ui.button("⟳  Fetch now").clicked() {
5324                        ctx_refresh_schedule = true;
5325                        ui.close();
5326                    }
5327                }
5328                View::Background => {
5329                    if ui.button("🖥  Process manager").clicked() {
5330                        ctx_open_proc_mgr = true;
5331                        ui.close();
5332                    }
5333                }
5334                View::Settings => {
5335                    if ui.button("💾  Save settings").clicked() {
5336                        ctx_save_settings = true;
5337                        ui.close();
5338                    }
5339                }
5340                View::Videos | View::Stats | View::Debug => {}
5341            }
5342        });
5343        if ctx_add_stream {
5344            self.form = Some(MonitorForm::new_channel(
5345                &self.monitor_defaults,
5346                &self.settings.default_output_dir,
5347            ));
5348        }
5349        if ctx_add_channel {
5350            self.channel_form = Some(ChannelForm {
5351                id: None,
5352                name: String::new(),
5353                color: String::new(),
5354            });
5355        }
5356        if ctx_refresh_schedule {
5357            self.core.request_schedule_refresh();
5358            self.spawn_reload_schedule();
5359            self.status = "Fetching latest schedules…".into();
5360        }
5361        if ctx_open_proc_mgr {
5362            self.show_processes = true;
5363            self.processes_refreshed = None;
5364        }
5365        if ctx_save_settings {
5366            self.save_settings();
5367        }
5368
5369        self.form_window(ui.ctx());
5370        self.channel_form_window(ui.ctx());
5371        self.confirm_delete_window(ui.ctx());
5372        self.confirm_delete_channel_window(ui.ctx());
5373        self.confirm_delete_segment_window(ui.ctx());
5374        self.merge_preview_window(ui.ctx());
5375        self.confirm_delete_segments_window(ui.ctx());
5376        self.save_preset_window(ui.ctx());
5377        self.format_probe_window(ui.ctx());
5378        self.ad_popup_window(ui.ctx());
5379        self.meta_popup_window(ui.ctx());
5380        self.schedule_popup_window(ui.ctx());
5381        self.schedule_sources_window(ui.ctx());
5382        self.schedule_day_window(ui.ctx());
5383        self.edit_schedule_window(ui.ctx());
5384        self.chat_popup_window(ui.ctx());
5385        self.instance_properties_window(ui.ctx());
5386        self.channel_properties_window(ui.ctx());
5387        self.emote_viewer_window(ui.ctx());
5388        self.rename_dialog_window(ui.ctx());
5389        self.asset_history_window(ui.ctx());
5390        self.recording_properties_window(ui.ctx());
5391        self.processes_window(ui.ctx());
5392        self.issues_window(ui.ctx());
5393        self.format_designer_window(ui.ctx());
5394        self.confirm_quit_stop_window(ui.ctx());
5395        self.import_window(ui.ctx());
5396
5397        draw_alt_image_preview(ui.ctx());
5398    }
5399}
5400
5401impl StreamArchiverApp {
5402    /// Process global keyboard shortcuts once per frame, before drawing.
5403    ///
5404    /// While a modal (add/edit form or delete confirmation) is open, only `Esc`
5405    /// is handled — it dismisses the modal — and other shortcuts are suppressed.
5406    fn handle_shortcuts(&mut self, ctx: &egui::Context) {
5407        use egui::{Key, KeyboardShortcut, Modifiers};
5408        const ADD: KeyboardShortcut = KeyboardShortcut::new(Modifiers::COMMAND, Key::N);
5409        const SETTINGS: KeyboardShortcut = KeyboardShortcut::new(Modifiers::COMMAND, Key::Comma);
5410        const REFRESH: KeyboardShortcut = KeyboardShortcut::new(Modifiers::NONE, Key::F5);
5411
5412        // A modal is open: Esc closes it, everything else is swallowed.
5413        if self.form.is_some()
5414            || self.channel_form.is_some()
5415            || self.confirm_delete.is_some()
5416            || self.confirm_delete_channel.is_some()
5417            || self.confirm_delete_segment.is_some()
5418        {
5419            if ctx.input_mut(|i| i.consume_key(Modifiers::NONE, Key::Escape)) {
5420                self.form = None;
5421                self.channel_form = None;
5422                self.confirm_delete = None;
5423                self.confirm_delete_channel = None;
5424                self.confirm_delete_segment = None;
5425            }
5426            return;
5427        }
5428
5429        if ctx.input_mut(|i| i.consume_shortcut(&ADD)) {
5430            self.view = View::Streams;
5431            self.form = Some(MonitorForm::new_channel(
5432                &self.monitor_defaults,
5433                &self.settings.default_output_dir,
5434            ));
5435        }
5436        if ctx.input_mut(|i| i.consume_shortcut(&SETTINGS)) {
5437            self.view = View::Settings;
5438        }
5439        if ctx.input_mut(|i| i.consume_shortcut(&REFRESH)) {
5440            // Drop all per-monitor recording/ad/meta/schedule caches so the next
5441            // render re-reads them from DB. Normally these are preserved across
5442            // reload_rows to avoid per-frame DB queries, but F5 is an explicit
5443            // user request to see current state (e.g. after an external DB edit).
5444            self.rec_cache.clear();
5445            self.ad_break_cache.clear();
5446            self.meta_change_cache.clear();
5447            self.schedule_cache.clear();
5448            self.spawn_pending_reload();
5449            if self.view == View::Schedule {
5450                // Force a network re-fetch (not just a DB reload) + show current data.
5451                self.core.request_schedule_refresh();
5452                self.spawn_reload_schedule();
5453            }
5454            self.status = "Refreshing…".into();
5455        }
5456
5457        // Row-targeted keys only fire on the channel list when not typing.
5458        if self.view == View::Streams && !ctx.egui_wants_keyboard_input() {
5459            if ctx.input_mut(|i| i.consume_key(Modifiers::NONE, Key::Delete)) {
5460                if let Some(id) = self.selected_monitor {
5461                    if let Some(row) = self.rows.iter().find(|r| r.monitor.id == id) {
5462                        self.confirm_delete = Some((id, row.channel.name.clone()));
5463                    }
5464                }
5465            }
5466            if ctx.input_mut(|i| i.consume_key(Modifiers::NONE, Key::Enter)) {
5467                if let Some(id) = self.selected_monitor {
5468                    if let Some(idx) = self.rows.iter().position(|r| r.monitor.id == id) {
5469                        self.form = Some(MonitorForm::from_existing(&self.rows[idx]));
5470                    }
5471                }
5472            }
5473        }
5474    }
5475
5476    /// Modal confirmation for deleting a monitor (the only destructive action).
5477    #[allow(deprecated)] // CentralPanel::show(ctx) is correct inside a viewport closure
5478    fn confirm_delete_window(&mut self, ctx: &egui::Context) {
5479        let Some((id, name)) = self.confirm_delete.clone() else {
5480            return;
5481        };
5482        let mut open = true;
5483        let mut do_delete = false;
5484        let mut do_cancel = false;
5485
5486        ctx.show_viewport_immediate(
5487            egui::ViewportId::from_hash_of("del_monitor_vp"),
5488            egui::ViewportBuilder::default()
5489                .with_title("Delete monitor")
5490                .with_inner_size([380.0, 130.0])
5491                .with_resizable(false),
5492            |ctx, _class| {
5493                if ctx.input(|i| i.viewport().close_requested()) {
5494                    open = false;
5495                }
5496                egui::CentralPanel::default().show(ctx, |ui| {
5497                    ui.label(format!("Delete this capture instance for “{name}”?"));
5498                    ui.label("Removes the monitor and its settings. Recorded files are kept.");
5499                    ui.add_space(8.0);
5500                    ui.horizontal(|ui| {
5501                        if ui.button("Delete").clicked() {
5502                            do_delete = true;
5503                        }
5504                        if ui.button("Cancel").clicked() {
5505                            do_cancel = true;
5506                        }
5507                    });
5508                });
5509            },
5510        );
5511
5512        if do_delete {
5513            // Stop a running capture first so the process isn't orphaned when its
5514            // history row is cascade-deleted.
5515            if self.core.active.lock().unwrap().contains_key(&id) {
5516                self.core.manual(ManualCommand::Stop(id));
5517            }
5518            // The channel container is left in place even if this was its last
5519            // instance (you can add another instance to it).
5520            match self.core.store.delete_monitor(id) {
5521                Ok(()) => self.status = "Instance deleted.".into(),
5522                Err(e) => self.status = format!("Error: {e}"),
5523            }
5524            if self.selected_monitor == Some(id) {
5525                self.selected_monitor = None;
5526            }
5527            self.confirm_delete = None;
5528            self.reload_rows();
5529        } else if do_cancel || !open {
5530            self.confirm_delete = None;
5531        }
5532    }
5533
5534    /// Modal confirmation for deleting a whole channel (and all its instances +
5535    /// their history rows; recorded files are kept).
5536    #[allow(deprecated)]
5537    fn confirm_delete_channel_window(&mut self, ctx: &egui::Context) {
5538        let Some((id, name)) = self.confirm_delete_channel.clone() else {
5539            return;
5540        };
5541        let mut open = true;
5542        let mut do_delete = false;
5543        let mut do_cancel = false;
5544
5545        ctx.show_viewport_immediate(
5546            egui::ViewportId::from_hash_of("del_channel_vp"),
5547            egui::ViewportBuilder::default()
5548                .with_title("Delete channel")
5549                .with_inner_size([400.0, 130.0])
5550                .with_resizable(false),
5551            |ctx, _class| {
5552                if ctx.input(|i| i.viewport().close_requested()) {
5553                    open = false;
5554                }
5555                egui::CentralPanel::default().show(ctx, |ui| {
5556                    ui.label(format!("Delete the channel “{name}” and all its instances?"));
5557                    ui.label("Removes every instance and its history. Recorded files are kept.");
5558                    ui.add_space(8.0);
5559                    ui.horizontal(|ui| {
5560                        if ui.button("Delete").clicked() {
5561                            do_delete = true;
5562                        }
5563                        if ui.button("Cancel").clicked() {
5564                            do_cancel = true;
5565                        }
5566                    });
5567                });
5568            },
5569        );
5570
5571        if do_delete {
5572            // Stop any of this channel's instances that are recording, so no
5573            // capture is left running after its rows are cascade-deleted.
5574            let active: std::collections::HashSet<i64> =
5575                self.core.active.lock().unwrap().keys().copied().collect();
5576            for mid in self
5577                .rows
5578                .iter()
5579                .filter(|r| r.channel.id == id && active.contains(&r.monitor.id))
5580                .map(|r| r.monitor.id)
5581                .collect::<Vec<_>>()
5582            {
5583                self.core.manual(ManualCommand::Stop(mid));
5584            }
5585            match self.core.store.delete_channel(id) {
5586                Ok(()) => self.status = "Channel deleted.".into(),
5587                Err(e) => self.status = format!("Error: {e}"),
5588            }
5589            self.confirm_delete_channel = None;
5590            self.reload_rows();
5591        } else if do_cancel || !open {
5592            self.confirm_delete_channel = None;
5593        }
5594    }
5595
5596    /// Modal confirmation for tombstoning a schedule segment (it won't reappear
5597    /// on the next refresh).
5598    #[allow(deprecated)]
5599    fn confirm_delete_segment_window(&mut self, ctx: &egui::Context) {
5600        let Some(sid) = self.confirm_delete_segment else {
5601            return;
5602        };
5603        let mut open = true;
5604        let mut do_delete = false;
5605        let mut do_cancel = false;
5606
5607        ctx.show_viewport_immediate(
5608            egui::ViewportId::from_hash_of("del_segment_vp"),
5609            egui::ViewportBuilder::default()
5610                .with_title("Delete schedule item")
5611                .with_inner_size([400.0, 120.0])
5612                .with_resizable(false),
5613            |ctx, _class| {
5614                if ctx.input(|i| i.viewport().close_requested()) {
5615                    open = false;
5616                }
5617                egui::CentralPanel::default().show(ctx, |ui| {
5618                    ui.label("Permanently delete this schedule item?");
5619                    ui.label("It will be suppressed and won't reappear on refresh.");
5620                    ui.add_space(8.0);
5621                    ui.horizontal(|ui| {
5622                        if ui.button("Delete").clicked() {
5623                            do_delete = true;
5624                        }
5625                        if ui.button("Cancel").clicked() {
5626                            do_cancel = true;
5627                        }
5628                    });
5629                });
5630            },
5631        );
5632
5633        if do_delete {
5634            if let Err(e) = self.core.store.delete_schedule_segment(sid) {
5635                self.status = format!("Error deleting schedule item: {e}");
5636            } else {
5637                self.schedule_hidden_segments.remove(&sid);
5638                self.spawn_reload_schedule();
5639                self.status = "Schedule item deleted.".into();
5640            }
5641            self.confirm_delete_segment = None;
5642        } else if do_cancel || !open {
5643            self.confirm_delete_segment = None;
5644        }
5645    }
5646
5647    /// Confirmation dialog for "Quit & stop recordings" tray action.
5648    #[allow(deprecated)]
5649    fn confirm_quit_stop_window(&mut self, ctx: &egui::Context) {
5650        if !self.confirm_quit_stop {
5651            return;
5652        }
5653        let mut open = true;
5654        let mut confirmed = false;
5655
5656        ctx.show_viewport_immediate(
5657            egui::ViewportId::from_hash_of("confirm_quit_stop_vp"),
5658            egui::ViewportBuilder::default()
5659                .with_title("Stop recordings and quit?")
5660                .with_inner_size([380.0, 130.0])
5661                .with_resizable(false),
5662            |ctx, _class| {
5663                if ctx.input(|i| i.viewport().close_requested()) {
5664                    open = false;
5665                }
5666                egui::CentralPanel::default().show(ctx, |ui| {
5667                    ui.add_space(4.0);
5668                    ui.label("This will terminate all active recordings immediately.");
5669                    ui.label("In-progress captures will be finalized from whatever was written.");
5670                    ui.add_space(10.0);
5671                    ui.horizontal(|ui| {
5672                        let stop_btn = egui::Button::new("Stop & Quit")
5673                            .fill(egui::Color32::from_rgb(180, 40, 40));
5674                        if ui.add(stop_btn).clicked() {
5675                            confirmed = true;
5676                        }
5677                        if ui.button("Cancel").clicked() {
5678                            open = false;
5679                        }
5680                    });
5681                });
5682            },
5683        );
5684
5685        if confirmed {
5686            self.core
5687                .force_stop_on_quit
5688                .store(true, std::sync::atomic::Ordering::SeqCst);
5689            self.quitting = true;
5690            self.confirm_quit_stop = false;
5691            ctx.send_viewport_cmd(egui::ViewportCommand::Close);
5692        } else if !open {
5693            self.confirm_quit_stop = false;
5694        }
5695    }
5696
5697    /// Modal for creating a new channel container or renaming an existing one.
5698    #[allow(deprecated)]
5699    fn channel_form_window(&mut self, ctx: &egui::Context) {
5700        if self.channel_form.is_none() {
5701            return;
5702        }
5703        let renaming = self.channel_form.as_ref().unwrap().id.is_some();
5704        let title = if renaming { "Rename channel" } else { "Add channel" };
5705        let mut open = true;
5706        let mut do_save = false;
5707        let mut do_cancel = false;
5708
5709        ctx.show_viewport_immediate(
5710            egui::ViewportId::from_hash_of("channel_form_vp"),
5711            egui::ViewportBuilder::default()
5712                .with_title(title.to_string())
5713                .with_inner_size([380.0, 220.0])
5714                .with_resizable(false),
5715            |ctx, _class| {
5716                if ctx.input(|i| i.viewport().close_requested()) {
5717                    open = false;
5718                }
5719                egui::CentralPanel::default().show(ctx, |ui| {
5720                    let f = self.channel_form.as_mut().unwrap();
5721                    egui::Grid::new("channel_form_grid")
5722                        .num_columns(2)
5723                        .spacing([8.0, 6.0])
5724                        .show(ui, |ui| {
5725                            ui.label("Name");
5726                            ui.text_edit_singleline(&mut f.name);
5727                            ui.end_row();
5728
5729                            ui.label("Color");
5730                            ui.horizontal(|ui| {
5731                                // Colored swatch preview
5732                                let swatch_color = if f.color.is_empty() {
5733                                    egui::Color32::from_gray(0x60)
5734                                } else {
5735                                    parse_hex_color(&f.color)
5736                                        .unwrap_or(egui::Color32::from_gray(0x60))
5737                                };
5738                                let (rect, _) = ui.allocate_exact_size(
5739                                    egui::vec2(20.0, 20.0),
5740                                    egui::Sense::hover(),
5741                                );
5742                                ui.painter().rect_filled(rect, 4.0, swatch_color);
5743                                ui.painter().rect_stroke(
5744                                    rect,
5745                                    4.0,
5746                                    egui::Stroke::new(1.0, egui::Color32::from_gray(0x80)),
5747                                    egui::StrokeKind::Inside,
5748                                );
5749                                ui.add(
5750                                    egui::TextEdit::singleline(&mut f.color)
5751                                        .hint_text("#rrggbb")
5752                                        .desired_width(80.0),
5753                                );
5754                                if !f.color.is_empty() && ui.small_button("✕").clicked() {
5755                                    f.color.clear();
5756                                }
5757                            });
5758                            ui.end_row();
5759                        });
5760                    if !renaming {
5761                        ui.label(
5762                            egui::RichText::new(
5763                                "A channel is a container — add instances (URLs to record) to it with ➕.",
5764                            )
5765                            .small()
5766                            .color(egui::Color32::from_gray(0x90)),
5767                        );
5768                    }
5769                    ui.add_space(8.0);
5770                    ui.horizontal(|ui| {
5771                        if ui.button("Save").clicked() {
5772                            do_save = true;
5773                        }
5774                        if ui.button("Cancel").clicked() {
5775                            do_cancel = true;
5776                        }
5777                    });
5778                });
5779            },
5780        );
5781
5782        if do_save {
5783            let f = self.channel_form.as_ref().unwrap();
5784            let name = f.name.trim().to_string();
5785            if name.is_empty() {
5786                self.status = "Name is required.".into();
5787            } else {
5788                let id_opt = f.id;
5789                let color = f.color.trim().to_string();
5790                let res = match id_opt {
5791                    Some(id) => self
5792                        .core
5793                        .store
5794                        .rename_channel(id, &name)
5795                        .and_then(|()| self.core.store.set_channel_color(id, &color)),
5796                    None => self.core.store.create_container(&name).map(|_| ()),
5797                };
5798                match res {
5799                    Ok(()) => {
5800                        self.status = "Saved.".into();
5801                        self.channel_form = None;
5802                        // A rename changes the asset-dir path these name-derived
5803                        // caches read from, so drop them for this channel.
5804                        if let Some(id) = id_opt {
5805                            self.channel_icons.remove(&id);
5806                            self.channel_icons_small.remove(&id);
5807                            self.channel_twitch_colors.remove(&id);
5808                            self.channel_asset_thumbs.remove(&id);
5809                            self.channel_emote_counts.remove(&id);
5810                            self.channel_asset_status.remove(&id);
5811                        }
5812                        self.reload_rows();
5813                    }
5814                    Err(e) => self.status = format!("Error: {e}"),
5815                }
5816            }
5817        } else if do_cancel || !open {
5818            self.channel_form = None;
5819        }
5820    }
5821
5822    /// The "Videos" tab: a list of on-demand downloads with an always-visible
5823    /// "paste a URL" form pinned to the bottom.
5824    fn videos_view(&mut self, ui: &mut egui::Ui) {
5825        egui::Panel::bottom("video_add_panel")
5826            .resizable(true)
5827            .default_size(300.0)
5828            .show_inside(ui, |ui| {
5829                // Per-platform defaults on the right; download form on the left.
5830                egui::Panel::right("video_defaults_panel")
5831                    .resizable(true)
5832                    .default_size(360.0)
5833                    .show_inside(ui, |ui| {
5834                        egui::ScrollArea::vertical()
5835                            .id_salt("video_defaults_scroll")
5836                            .show(ui, |ui| {
5837                                self.video_defaults_editor(ui);
5838                            });
5839                    });
5840                egui::CentralPanel::default().show_inside(ui, |ui| {
5841                    egui::ScrollArea::vertical()
5842                        .id_salt("video_form_scroll")
5843                        .show(ui, |ui| {
5844                            self.video_add_form(ui);
5845                        });
5846                });
5847            });
5848        egui::CentralPanel::default().show_inside(ui, |ui| {
5849            self.videos_list(ui);
5850        });
5851    }
5852
5853    /// Collapsible per-platform download defaults editor (Twitch / YouTube /
5854    /// Kick / Generic). Edits persist immediately; the download form below
5855    /// pre-fills from these per detected platform.
5856    fn video_defaults_editor(&mut self, ui: &mut egui::Ui) {
5857        let mut dirty = false;
5858        // Collect a Browse request inside the loop (where `defs` borrows
5859        // `self.download_defaults`) and spawn it AFTER the loop releases
5860        // the borrow, so we can reach `self.pending_browse`.
5861        // (true = folder, false = file), platform, current path.
5862        let mut browse_req: Option<(bool, Platform, String)> = None;
5863        // Preset actions collected inside the loop and applied after all borrows end.
5864        let mut preset_delete: Option<i64> = None;
5865        let mut preset_save_tmpl: Option<String> = None;
5866        // Snapshot custom presets as a slice; separate from `defs` borrow (different field).
5867        let custom_presets = self.custom_presets.as_slice();
5868        // Borrow the defaults (not `self`) so the nested egui closures don't
5869        // alias `self`; persist afterwards.
5870        let defs = &mut self.download_defaults;
5871
5872        ui.add_space(6.0);
5873        ui.strong("⚙  Per-platform defaults");
5874        ui.label(
5875            egui::RichText::new(
5876                "Downloads pre-fill from these by platform; override per download.",
5877            )
5878            .small()
5879            .color(egui::Color32::from_gray(0x90)),
5880        );
5881        ui.add_space(4.0);
5882
5883        for platform in Platform::ALL {
5884            egui::CollapsingHeader::new(platform.label())
5885                .id_salt(("dl_def", platform.as_str()))
5886                .show(ui, |ui| {
5887                    let d = defs.get_mut(platform);
5888                    egui::Grid::new(("dl_def_grid", platform.as_str()))
5889                        .num_columns(2)
5890                        .spacing([12.0, 6.0])
5891                        .show(ui, |ui| {
5892                            ui.label("Tool").on_hover_text(d.tool.tooltip());
5893                            egui::ComboBox::from_id_salt(("dl_tool", platform.as_str()))
5894                                .selected_text(d.tool.label())
5895                                .show_ui(ui, |ui| {
5896                                    for t in Tool::ALL {
5897                                        if ui
5898                                            .selectable_value(&mut d.tool, t, t.label())
5899                                            .on_hover_text(t.tooltip())
5900                                            .changed()
5901                                        {
5902                                            dirty = true;
5903                                        }
5904                                    }
5905                                });
5906                            ui.end_row();
5907
5908                            ui.label("Quality");
5909                            if ui.text_edit_singleline(&mut d.quality).changed() {
5910                                dirty = true;
5911                            }
5912                            ui.end_row();
5913
5914                            ui.label("Auth");
5915                            egui::ComboBox::from_id_salt(("dl_auth", platform.as_str()))
5916                                .selected_text(d.auth_kind.label())
5917                                .show_ui(ui, |ui| {
5918                                    for k in AuthKind::ALL {
5919                                        if ui
5920                                            .selectable_value(&mut d.auth_kind, k, k.label())
5921                                            .changed()
5922                                        {
5923                                            dirty = true;
5924                                        }
5925                                    }
5926                                });
5927                            ui.end_row();
5928
5929                            match d.auth_kind {
5930                                AuthKind::CookiesBrowser => {
5931                                    ui.label("Browser");
5932                                    if ui
5933                                        .text_edit_singleline(&mut d.auth_value)
5934                                        .on_hover_text("Browser, or browser:profile — e.g. firefox:dmrf6eed.YouTube (the folder under …/Firefox/Profiles, or an absolute path)")
5935                                        .changed()
5936                                    {
5937                                        dirty = true;
5938                                    }
5939                                    ui.end_row();
5940                                }
5941                                AuthKind::CookiesFile => {
5942                                    ui.label("Cookies file");
5943                                    ui.horizontal(|ui| {
5944                                        if ui.text_edit_singleline(&mut d.auth_value).changed() {
5945                                            dirty = true;
5946                                        }
5947                                        if ui.button("Browse…").clicked() {
5948                                            browse_req = Some((false, platform, d.auth_value.clone()));
5949                                        }
5950                                    });
5951                                    ui.end_row();
5952                                }
5953                                AuthKind::Token => {
5954                                    ui.label("Auth token");
5955                                    if ui
5956                                        .add(
5957                                            egui::TextEdit::singleline(&mut d.auth_value)
5958                                                .password(true),
5959                                        )
5960                                        .changed()
5961                                    {
5962                                        dirty = true;
5963                                    }
5964                                    ui.end_row();
5965                                }
5966                                AuthKind::Inherit | AuthKind::Disabled => {}
5967                            }
5968
5969                            ui.label("Output folder");
5970                            ui.horizontal(|ui| {
5971                                if ui.text_edit_singleline(&mut d.output_dir).changed() {
5972                                    dirty = true;
5973                                }
5974                                if ui.button("Browse…").clicked() {
5975                                    browse_req = Some((true, platform, d.output_dir.clone()));
5976                                }
5977                            });
5978                            ui.end_row();
5979
5980                            ui.label("Filename template");
5981                            ui.horizontal(|ui| {
5982                                let before = d.filename_template.clone();
5983                                let (del, save) = filename_preset_combo(
5984                                    ui,
5985                                    &format!("vdef_tmpl_{}", platform.as_str()),
5986                                    &mut d.filename_template,
5987                                    custom_presets,
5988                                );
5989                                if del.is_some() { preset_delete = del; }
5990                                if save { preset_save_tmpl = Some(d.filename_template.clone()); }
5991                                if ui.text_edit_singleline(&mut d.filename_template).changed()
5992                                    || d.filename_template != before
5993                                {
5994                                    dirty = true;
5995                                }
5996                            });
5997                            ui.end_row();
5998
5999                            ui.label("Extra args");
6000                            if ui.text_edit_singleline(&mut d.extra_args).changed() {
6001                                dirty = true;
6002                            }
6003                            ui.end_row();
6004
6005                            ui.label("Detect title");
6006                            if ui.checkbox(&mut d.auto_title, "Detect title + channel")
6007                                .on_hover_text(
6008                                    "Default state of the \"Detect title + channel\" checkbox \
6009                                     for new downloads on this platform.",
6010                                )
6011                                .changed()
6012                            {
6013                                dirty = true;
6014                            }
6015                            ui.end_row();
6016                        });
6017                });
6018        }
6019        if dirty {
6020            self.persist_download_defaults();
6021        }
6022        // defs and custom_presets borrows end; now we can mutate self freely.
6023        if let Some(id) = preset_delete {
6024            if let Err(e) = self.core.store.delete_filename_preset(id) {
6025                self.status = format!("Error deleting preset: {e:#}");
6026            } else {
6027                self.custom_presets = self.core.store.get_filename_presets().unwrap_or_default();
6028            }
6029        }
6030        if let Some(tmpl) = preset_save_tmpl {
6031            self.save_preset_dialog = Some(SavePresetDraft {
6032                template: tmpl,
6033                name: String::new(),
6034                error: String::new(),
6035            });
6036        }
6037        if let Some((is_folder, plat, current)) = browse_req {
6038            self.pending_browse = Some(if is_folder {
6039                spawn_browse_folder(&current, move |app, p| {
6040                    app.download_defaults.get_mut(plat).output_dir = p;
6041                    app.persist_download_defaults();
6042                })
6043            } else {
6044                spawn_browse_file(&current, move |app, p| {
6045                    app.download_defaults.get_mut(plat).auth_value = p;
6046                    app.persist_download_defaults();
6047                })
6048            });
6049        }
6050    }
6051
6052    fn videos_list(&mut self, ui: &mut egui::Ui) {
6053        // Reflect background progress whenever the list is shown.
6054        self.reload_videos();
6055
6056        if self.videos.is_empty() {
6057            ui.add_space(24.0);
6058            ui.vertical_centered(|ui| {
6059                ui.label("No videos yet.");
6060                ui.label("Paste a URL in the box below to download a video or VOD.");
6061            });
6062            return;
6063        }
6064
6065        let mut to_stop: Option<i64> = None;
6066        let mut to_retry: Option<i64> = None;
6067        let mut to_delete: Option<i64> = None;
6068        let any_active = self.videos.iter().any(|v| v.is_active());
6069        // Snapshot live download progress (video_id -> 0.0..=1.0) and speed
6070        // (video_id -> bytes/sec) for the progress bar + Speed column.
6071        let progress: std::collections::HashMap<i64, f32> =
6072            self.core.video_progress.lock().unwrap().clone();
6073        let speed: std::collections::HashMap<i64, f64> =
6074            self.core.video_speed.lock().unwrap().clone();
6075
6076        // Build the sort/filter model and take the persisted sort/filter state
6077        // into locals (written back after the table is drawn).
6078        let model: Vec<Vec<Cell>> = self.videos.iter().map(|v| video_cells(v, &speed)).collect();
6079        let mut sort = self.videos_sort;
6080        let mut filters = self.videos_filters.clone();
6081        if filters.len() != VIDEO_COLS {
6082            filters = vec![String::new(); VIDEO_COLS];
6083        }
6084        // Platform favicons (uploaded once, cheaply cloned per frame) + whether to
6085        // tint rows by status — captured before the table closures borrow `self`.
6086        let ptex = self
6087            .platform_tex
6088            .get_or_insert_with(|| PlatformTextures::load(ui.ctx()))
6089            .clone();
6090        let status_bgcolor = self.status_bgcolor;
6091        // Whether the Actions column is shown (Settings → Display). Skipped in the
6092        // builder, header, and each row when off so the column counts match.
6093        let show_actions = self.show_actions;
6094
6095        egui::ScrollArea::both()
6096            .auto_shrink([false, false])
6097            .show(ui, |ui| {
6098                // Non-selectable labels so a right-click reaches the row (menu).
6099                ui.style_mut().interaction.selectable_labels = false;
6100                let sel_color = ui.visuals().selection.bg_fill;
6101                let mut tb = TableBuilder::new(ui)
6102                    .striped(true)
6103                    .resizable(true)
6104                    .sense(egui::Sense::click())
6105                    .cell_layout(egui::Layout::left_to_right(egui::Align::Center))
6106                    .column(Column::auto().at_least(180.0)) // video
6107                    .column(Column::auto().at_least(110.0)) // channel
6108                    .column(Column::auto().at_least(86.0)) // platform
6109                    .column(Column::auto().at_least(72.0)) // tool
6110                    .column(Column::auto().at_least(96.0)) // status
6111                    .column(Column::auto().at_least(82.0)) // speed
6112                    .column(Column::auto().at_least(72.0)) // size
6113                    .column(Column::auto().at_least(80.0)) // added
6114                    .column(Column::auto().at_least(160.0)); // file
6115                if show_actions {
6116                    tb = tb.column(Column::remainder().at_least(150.0)); // actions
6117                }
6118                let table = tb
6119                    .header(46.0, |mut header| {
6120                        // (title, hover tooltip) per sortable column.
6121                        let cols: [(&str, &str); 9] = [
6122                            ("Video", "The video's title (or the URL until detected). Hover a row for the full URL."),
6123                            ("Channel", "Uploader / channel name (filled when Auto-detect is on)."),
6124                            ("Platform", "Source platform: YouTube, Twitch, Kick, or a generic URL."),
6125                            ("Tool", "Download tool: yt-dlp, streamlink, or ffmpeg."),
6126                            ("Status", "queued / downloading / completed / failed / stopped. Hover a failed row to see why."),
6127                            ("Speed", "Current download speed (shown while downloading)."),
6128                            ("Size", "Size of the output file (grows while downloading)."),
6129                            ("Added", "When the download was added."),
6130                            ("File", "Output file path once written. Hover for the full path."),
6131                        ];
6132                        for (i, (t, tip)) in cols.into_iter().enumerate() {
6133                            header.col(|ui| {
6134                                sort_filter_header(ui, i, t, tip, true, &mut sort, &mut filters[i]);
6135                            });
6136                        }
6137                        if show_actions {
6138                            header.col(|ui| {
6139                                ui.strong("Actions").on_hover_text(
6140                                    "Per-row actions: stop / retry, open file, open folder, copy URL, delete.",
6141                                );
6142                            });
6143                        }
6144                    });
6145                table.body(|mut body| {
6146                        let order = ordered_rows(&model, &sort, &filters);
6147                        for &vi in &order {
6148                            let v = &self.videos[vi];
6149                            // Tint by status (in-flight = accent, failed = red),
6150                            // honoring the top-bar "Status bgcolor" toggle.
6151                            let tint = video_row_tint(&v.status, sel_color, status_bgcolor);
6152                            if let Some(c) = tint {
6153                                body.ui_mut().visuals_mut().selection.bg_fill = c;
6154                            }
6155                            body.row(24.0, |mut tr| {
6156                                tr.set_selected(tint.is_some());
6157                                // Reusable menu body (a `Fn`), attached to the row and
6158                                // each inline action button so right-clicking anywhere
6159                                // on the row opens it. Open/copy are handled inline;
6160                                // self-mutating picks go through `menu_pick`.
6161                                let mut menu_pick: Option<VideoMenuChoice> = None;
6162                                let add_menu =
6163                                    |ui: &mut egui::Ui, pick: &mut Option<VideoMenuChoice>| {
6164                                        ui.set_min_width(180.0);
6165                                        if v.is_active() {
6166                                            if ui.button("⏹  Stop download").clicked() {
6167                                                *pick = Some(VideoMenuChoice::Stop);
6168                                                ui.close();
6169                                            }
6170                                        } else if ui.button("↻  Retry download").clicked() {
6171                                            *pick = Some(VideoMenuChoice::Retry);
6172                                            ui.close();
6173                                        }
6174                                        ui.separator();
6175                                        let file_ok = !v.output_path.is_empty()
6176                                            && std::path::Path::new(&v.output_path).is_file();
6177                                        if ui
6178                                            .add_enabled(file_ok, egui::Button::new("▶  Open file"))
6179                                            .clicked()
6180                                        {
6181                                            crate::platform::open_path(std::path::Path::new(
6182                                                &v.output_path,
6183                                            ));
6184                                            ui.close();
6185                                        }
6186                                        let dir_ok = std::path::Path::new(&v.output_dir).is_dir();
6187                                        if ui
6188                                            .add_enabled(
6189                                                dir_ok,
6190                                                egui::Button::new("📂  Open folder"),
6191                                            )
6192                                            .clicked()
6193                                        {
6194                                            crate::platform::open_path(std::path::Path::new(
6195                                                &v.output_dir,
6196                                            ));
6197                                            ui.close();
6198                                        }
6199                                        if ui.button("🔗  Copy URL").clicked() {
6200                                            ui.ctx().copy_text(v.url.clone());
6201                                            ui.close();
6202                                        }
6203                                        if ui
6204                                            .add_enabled(
6205                                                !v.output_path.is_empty(),
6206                                                egui::Button::new("📋  Copy file path"),
6207                                            )
6208                                            .clicked()
6209                                        {
6210                                            ui.ctx().copy_text(v.output_path.clone());
6211                                            ui.close();
6212                                        }
6213                                        ui.separator();
6214                                        if ui.button("🗑  Delete from list").clicked() {
6215                                            *pick = Some(VideoMenuChoice::Delete);
6216                                            ui.close();
6217                                        }
6218                                    };
6219
6220                                tr.col(|ui| {
6221                                    let label = if v.title.trim().is_empty() {
6222                                        v.url.as_str()
6223                                    } else {
6224                                        v.title.as_str()
6225                                    };
6226                                    ui.label(label).on_hover_text(&v.url);
6227                                });
6228                                tr.col(|ui| {
6229                                    if !v.channel.is_empty() {
6230                                        ui.label(&v.channel).on_hover_text(&v.channel);
6231                                    }
6232                                });
6233                                tr.col(|ui| {
6234                                    platform_icon(ui, &ptex, v.platform)
6235                                        .on_hover_text(v.platform.label());
6236                                    ui.label(v.platform.label());
6237                                });
6238                                tr.col(|ui| {
6239                                    ui.label(v.tool.label()).on_hover_text(v.tool.tooltip());
6240                                });
6241                                tr.col(|ui| match progress.get(&v.id) {
6242                                    Some(&f) if v.status == "downloading" => {
6243                                        ui.add(
6244                                            egui::ProgressBar::new(f)
6245                                                .desired_width(84.0)
6246                                                .text(format!("{:.0}%", f * 100.0)),
6247                                        );
6248                                    }
6249                                    _ => {
6250                                        let resp = ui
6251                                            .colored_label(video_status_color(&v.status), &v.status);
6252                                        if v.status == "failed" {
6253                                            let mut msg = fail_hover(&v.log_excerpt);
6254                                            if let Some(code) = v.exit_code {
6255                                                msg = format!("{msg}\n(exit code {code})");
6256                                            }
6257                                            resp.on_hover_text(msg);
6258                                        }
6259                                    }
6260                                });
6261                                tr.col(|ui| {
6262                                    if v.status == "downloading" {
6263                                        if let Some(&bps) = speed.get(&v.id) {
6264                                            if bps > 0.0 {
6265                                                ui.label(fmt_speed(bps));
6266                                            }
6267                                        }
6268                                    }
6269                                });
6270                                tr.col(|ui| {
6271                                    if v.bytes > 0 {
6272                                        ui.label(fmt_bytes(v.bytes));
6273                                    }
6274                                });
6275                                tr.col(|ui| {
6276                                    ui.label(fmt_date(v.created_at));
6277                                });
6278                                tr.col(|ui| {
6279                                    if !v.output_path.is_empty() {
6280                                        ui.label(&v.output_path).on_hover_text(&v.output_path);
6281                                    }
6282                                });
6283                                if show_actions {
6284                                tr.col(|ui| {
6285                                    ui.push_id(v.id, |ui| {
6286                                        let mut btns: Vec<egui::Response> = Vec::with_capacity(5);
6287                                        if v.is_active() {
6288                                            let b =
6289                                                ui.small_button("⏹").on_hover_text("Stop download");
6290                                            if b.clicked() {
6291                                                to_stop = Some(v.id);
6292                                            }
6293                                            btns.push(b);
6294                                        } else {
6295                                            let b = ui
6296                                                .small_button("↻")
6297                                                .on_hover_text("Retry download");
6298                                            if b.clicked() {
6299                                                to_retry = Some(v.id);
6300                                            }
6301                                            btns.push(b);
6302                                        }
6303                                        let dir_ok = std::path::Path::new(&v.output_dir).is_dir();
6304                                        let b = ui
6305                                            .add_enabled(dir_ok, egui::Button::new("📂").small())
6306                                            .on_hover_text("Open output folder");
6307                                        if b.clicked() {
6308                                            crate::platform::open_path(std::path::Path::new(
6309                                                &v.output_dir,
6310                                            ));
6311                                        }
6312                                        btns.push(b);
6313                                        let file_ok = !v.output_path.is_empty()
6314                                            && std::path::Path::new(&v.output_path).is_file();
6315                                        let b = ui
6316                                            .add_enabled(file_ok, egui::Button::new("▶").small())
6317                                            .on_hover_text("Open file");
6318                                        if b.clicked() {
6319                                            crate::platform::open_path(std::path::Path::new(
6320                                                &v.output_path,
6321                                            ));
6322                                        }
6323                                        btns.push(b);
6324                                        let b = ui.small_button("📋").on_hover_text("Copy URL");
6325                                        if b.clicked() {
6326                                            ui.ctx().copy_text(v.url.clone());
6327                                        }
6328                                        btns.push(b);
6329                                        let b = ui
6330                                            .small_button("🗑")
6331                                            .on_hover_text("Delete from list (keeps the file)");
6332                                        if b.clicked() {
6333                                            to_delete = Some(v.id);
6334                                        }
6335                                        btns.push(b);
6336                                        // Buttons swallow the right-click, so give each
6337                                        // the row menu too.
6338                                        for b in &btns {
6339                                            b.context_menu(|ui| add_menu(ui, &mut menu_pick));
6340                                        }
6341                                    });
6342                                });
6343                                }
6344
6345                                // Right-click anywhere on the row opens the menu.
6346                                tr.response()
6347                                    .context_menu(|ui| add_menu(ui, &mut menu_pick));
6348
6349                                match menu_pick {
6350                                    Some(VideoMenuChoice::Stop) => to_stop = Some(v.id),
6351                                    Some(VideoMenuChoice::Retry) => to_retry = Some(v.id),
6352                                    Some(VideoMenuChoice::Delete) => to_delete = Some(v.id),
6353                                    None => {}
6354                                }
6355                            });
6356                        }
6357                    });
6358            });
6359        self.videos_sort = sort;
6360        self.videos_filters = filters;
6361
6362        // Tick while a download is queued/running so the progress bar, status and
6363        // size update live (a bit faster than 1s for a smoother bar).
6364        if any_active {
6365            ui.ctx()
6366                .request_repaint_after(std::time::Duration::from_millis(500));
6367        }
6368
6369        if let Some(id) = to_stop {
6370            self.core.manual(ManualCommand::StopVideo(id));
6371            self.status = "Stopping download…".into();
6372        }
6373        if let Some(id) = to_retry {
6374            match self.core.store.reset_video_for_retry(id) {
6375                Ok(()) => {
6376                    self.core.manual(ManualCommand::StartVideo(id));
6377                    self.status = "Re-queued download.".into();
6378                }
6379                Err(e) => self.status = format!("Error: {e}"),
6380            }
6381            self.reload_videos();
6382        }
6383        if let Some(id) = to_delete {
6384            if let Err(e) = self.core.store.delete_video(id) {
6385                self.status = format!("Error: {e}");
6386            }
6387            self.reload_videos();
6388        }
6389    }
6390
6391    /// The bottom "paste a URL + settings + Download" form on the Videos tab.
6392    fn video_add_form(&mut self, ui: &mut egui::Ui) {
6393        let platform = Platform::detect(&self.video_form.url);
6394
6395        // Re-fill the form from this platform's saved defaults whenever the
6396        // detected platform changes; the user can then override any field.
6397        if self.video_form.last_platform != Some(platform) {
6398            let d = self.download_defaults.get(platform).clone();
6399            let vf = &mut self.video_form;
6400            vf.tool = d.tool;
6401            vf.quality = d.quality;
6402            vf.output_dir = d.output_dir;
6403            vf.filename_template = d.filename_template;
6404            vf.extra_args = d.extra_args;
6405            vf.auto_title = d.auto_title;
6406            vf.auth_override = None; // "Default (per-platform)"
6407            vf.auth_value = String::new();
6408            // Snapshot the default auth too, so a later edit to the default
6409            // doesn't desync from the other (already snapshotted) fields.
6410            vf.default_auth_kind = d.auth_kind;
6411            vf.default_auth_value = d.auth_value;
6412            vf.last_platform = Some(platform);
6413        }
6414
6415        let mut do_download = false;
6416        let mut do_list_formats = false;
6417        let mut open_vf_designer = false;
6418        let mut vf_preset_delete: Option<i64> = None;
6419        let mut vf_preset_save_tmpl: Option<String> = None;
6420
6421        {
6422            let custom_presets = self.custom_presets.as_slice();
6423            let vf = &mut self.video_form;
6424
6425            ui.add_space(6.0);
6426            ui.horizontal(|ui| {
6427                ui.heading("Download a video / VOD");
6428                ui.label(
6429                    egui::RichText::new("→ MKV")
6430                        .small()
6431                        .color(egui::Color32::from_gray(0x90)),
6432                );
6433            });
6434
6435            // Four columns (label · field · label · field) so two fields share a
6436            // row — the form flows across the available width instead of stacking
6437            // into a tall, scrolling single column.
6438            egui::Grid::new("video_form_grid")
6439                .num_columns(4)
6440                .spacing([12.0, 6.0])
6441                .show(ui, |ui| {
6442                    // URL (wide) + Name.
6443                    ui.label("URL");
6444                    ui.horizontal(|ui| {
6445                        ui.add(
6446                            egui::TextEdit::singleline(&mut vf.url)
6447                                .desired_width(340.0)
6448                                .hint_text(
6449                                    "YouTube video, Twitch VOD, or any streamlink/yt-dlp URL",
6450                                ),
6451                        );
6452                        platform_badge(ui, platform);
6453                        ui.label(platform.label());
6454                    });
6455                    ui.label("Name");
6456                    ui.add(egui::TextEdit::singleline(&mut vf.title).hint_text(
6457                        "optional — used for the filename (default: the title, else \"video\")",
6458                    ));
6459                    ui.end_row();
6460
6461                    // Auto-detect + Tool.
6462                    ui.label("Auto-detect");
6463                    ui.checkbox(&mut vf.auto_title, "Detect title + channel")
6464                        .on_hover_text(
6465                            "Looks up the real title and channel via yt-dlp at download time: \
6466                             fills the Channel column and the {title}/{channel} variables (and \
6467                             {name} when Name is left blank).",
6468                        );
6469                    ui.label("Tool").on_hover_text(vf.tool.tooltip());
6470                    egui::ComboBox::from_id_salt("video_tool_cb")
6471                        .selected_text(vf.tool.label())
6472                        .show_ui(ui, |ui| {
6473                            for t in Tool::ALL {
6474                                ui.selectable_value(&mut vf.tool, t, t.label())
6475                                    .on_hover_text(t.tooltip());
6476                            }
6477                        });
6478                    ui.end_row();
6479
6480                    // Quality + Auth.
6481                    ui.label("Quality");
6482                    ui.add(
6483                        egui::TextEdit::singleline(&mut vf.quality)
6484                            .hint_text("best, 1080p, or a yt-dlp -f selector"),
6485                    );
6486                    ui.label("Auth");
6487                    let auth_text = match vf.auth_override {
6488                        None => "Default (per-platform)".to_string(),
6489                        Some(k) => k.label().to_string(),
6490                    };
6491                    egui::ComboBox::from_id_salt("video_auth_cb")
6492                        .selected_text(auth_text)
6493                        .show_ui(ui, |ui| {
6494                            ui.selectable_value(
6495                                &mut vf.auth_override,
6496                                None,
6497                                "Default (per-platform)",
6498                            );
6499                            for k in AuthKind::ALL {
6500                                ui.selectable_value(&mut vf.auth_override, Some(k), k.label());
6501                            }
6502                        });
6503                    ui.end_row();
6504
6505                    // Auth value (only for cookie/token overrides) — its own row.
6506                    match vf.auth_override {
6507                        Some(AuthKind::CookiesBrowser) => {
6508                            ui.label("Browser");
6509                            ui.text_edit_singleline(&mut vf.auth_value)
6510                                .on_hover_text("Browser, or browser:profile — e.g. firefox:dmrf6eed.YouTube (the folder under …/Firefox/Profiles, or an absolute path)");
6511                            ui.end_row();
6512                        }
6513                        Some(AuthKind::CookiesFile) => {
6514                            ui.label("Cookies file");
6515                            ui.horizontal(|ui| {
6516                                ui.text_edit_singleline(&mut vf.auth_value);
6517                                if ui.button("Browse…").clicked() {
6518                                    self.pending_browse = Some(spawn_browse_file(
6519                                        &vf.auth_value,
6520                                        |app, p| app.video_form.auth_value = p,
6521                                    ));
6522                                }
6523                            });
6524                            ui.end_row();
6525                        }
6526                        Some(AuthKind::Token) => {
6527                            ui.label("Auth token");
6528                            ui.add(egui::TextEdit::singleline(&mut vf.auth_value).password(true))
6529                                .on_hover_text("Twitch OAuth token (streamlink)");
6530                            ui.end_row();
6531                        }
6532                        // Default (None), Global (Inherit), and None (Disabled) need no value.
6533                        _ => {}
6534                    }
6535
6536                    // Output folder + Filename template.
6537                    ui.label("Output folder");
6538                    ui.horizontal(|ui| {
6539                        ui.text_edit_singleline(&mut vf.output_dir);
6540                        if ui.button("Browse…").clicked() {
6541                            self.pending_browse = Some(spawn_browse_folder(
6542                                &vf.output_dir,
6543                                |app, p| app.video_form.output_dir = p,
6544                            ));
6545                        }
6546                    });
6547                    let tmpl_hint = "Variables: {name} {title} {channel} {date} {time} {timestamp} {year} {month} {day} {hour} {minute} {second} {tool} {mode} {platform} {video_id} {quality} {resolution} {height} {width} {fps} {vcodec} {acodec} {take} {games} {went_live_date} {went_live_time}";
6548                    ui.label("Filename template").on_hover_text(tmpl_hint);
6549                    ui.horizontal(|ui| {
6550                        let (del, save) = filename_preset_combo(
6551                            ui,
6552                            "video_form_tmpl",
6553                            &mut vf.filename_template,
6554                            custom_presets,
6555                        );
6556                        if del.is_some() { vf_preset_delete = del; }
6557                        if save { vf_preset_save_tmpl = Some(vf.filename_template.clone()); }
6558                        ui.text_edit_singleline(&mut vf.filename_template).on_hover_text(tmpl_hint);
6559                        if ui.button("Design…").on_hover_text("Open the Format Designer").clicked() {
6560                            open_vf_designer = true;
6561                        }
6562                    });
6563                    ui.end_row();
6564
6565                    // Extra args + Audio tracks.
6566                    ui.label("Extra args");
6567                    ui.text_edit_singleline(&mut vf.extra_args);
6568                    ui.label("Audio tracks");
6569                    ui.text_edit_singleline(&mut vf.audio_tracks).on_hover_text(
6570                        "Audio tracks to capture (streamlink --hls-audio-select). \
6571                         Empty = the tool's default; 'all' (or '*') = every track; or a \
6572                         comma-separated list of language codes/names. streamlink-only; \
6573                         yt-dlp/ffmpeg keep the chosen format's tracks.",
6574                    );
6575                    ui.end_row();
6576
6577                    // Subtitle tracks + Log chat.
6578                    ui.label("Subtitle tracks");
6579                    ui.text_edit_singleline(&mut vf.subtitle_tracks).on_hover_text(
6580                        "Subtitle tracks to download (yt-dlp --sub-langs, written as sidecar \
6581                         files next to the video). Empty = none; 'all' (or '*') = every \
6582                         subtitle; or a comma-separated list of language codes. yt-dlp-only.",
6583                    );
6584                    ui.label("Log chat");
6585                    ui.checkbox(&mut vf.chat_log, "").on_hover_text(
6586                        "Download chat alongside the video (yt-dlp's live_chat → a \
6587                         .live_chat.json sidecar, e.g. a YouTube VOD's chat replay). \
6588                         Sources without a chat track simply produce none.",
6589                    );
6590                    ui.end_row();
6591                });
6592
6593            ui.add_space(6.0);
6594            ui.horizontal(|ui| {
6595                let can = !vf.url.trim().is_empty();
6596                if ui
6597                    .add_enabled(can, egui::Button::new("⬇  Download"))
6598                    .clicked()
6599                {
6600                    do_download = true;
6601                }
6602                if ui
6603                    .add_enabled(can, egui::Button::new("List formats"))
6604                    .on_hover_text(
6605                        "Show available formats/qualities for this URL using the selected tool",
6606                    )
6607                    .clicked()
6608                {
6609                    do_list_formats = true;
6610                }
6611            });
6612            ui.add_space(6.0);
6613        }
6614
6615        if do_download {
6616            self.start_video_download();
6617        }
6618        if do_list_formats {
6619            self.start_format_probe(ui.ctx().clone());
6620        }
