6621        if open_vf_designer {
6622            let tmpl = self.video_form.filename_template.clone();
6623            self.open_format_designer(tmpl, Some(FormatDesignerTarget::VideoForm));
6624        }
6625        if let Some(id) = vf_preset_delete {
6626            if let Err(e) = self.core.store.delete_filename_preset(id) {
6627                self.status = format!("Error deleting preset: {e:#}");
6628            } else {
6629                self.custom_presets = self.core.store.get_filename_presets().unwrap_or_default();
6630            }
6631        }
6632        if let Some(tmpl) = vf_preset_save_tmpl {
6633            self.save_preset_dialog = Some(SavePresetDraft {
6634                template: tmpl,
6635                name: String::new(),
6636                error: String::new(),
6637            });
6638        }
6639    }
6640
6641    /// Insert the form's video as a queued download and kick off the supervisor.
6642    fn start_video_download(&mut self) {
6643        let url = self.video_form.url.trim().to_string();
6644        if url.is_empty() {
6645            return;
6646        }
6647        let platform = Platform::detect(&url);
6648        // "Default" auth uses the snapshotted platform default; an explicit
6649        // choice overrides it. (All fields resolve from the same snapshot.)
6650        let (auth_kind, auth_value) = match self.video_form.auth_override {
6651            Some(kind) => (kind, self.video_form.auth_value.clone()),
6652            None => (
6653                self.video_form.default_auth_kind,
6654                self.video_form.default_auth_value.clone(),
6655            ),
6656        };
6657        let video = Video {
6658            id: 0,
6659            platform,
6660            url,
6661            title: self.video_form.title.trim().to_string(),
6662            channel: String::new(),
6663            tool: self.video_form.tool,
6664            quality: self.video_form.quality.clone(),
6665            output_dir: self.video_form.output_dir.clone(),
6666            filename_template: self.video_form.filename_template.clone(),
6667            auth_kind,
6668            auth_value,
6669            audio_tracks: self.video_form.audio_tracks.trim().to_string(),
6670            subtitle_tracks: self.video_form.subtitle_tracks.trim().to_string(),
6671            chat_log: self.video_form.chat_log,
6672            extra_args: self.video_form.extra_args.clone(),
6673            auto_title: self.video_form.auto_title,
6674            status: "queued".into(),
6675            output_path: String::new(),
6676            bytes: 0,
6677            exit_code: None,
6678            log_excerpt: String::new(),
6679            created_at: 0,
6680            started_at: None,
6681            ended_at: None,
6682        };
6683        match self.core.store.insert_video(&video) {
6684            Ok(id) => {
6685                self.core.manual(ManualCommand::StartVideo(id));
6686                self.status = "Queued video download.".into();
6687                // Clear the URL/name; re-fill defaults for the next download.
6688                self.video_form.url.clear();
6689                self.video_form.title.clear();
6690                self.video_form.last_platform = None;
6691                self.reload_videos();
6692            }
6693            Err(e) => self.status = format!("Error: {e}"),
6694        }
6695    }
6696
6697    /// Probe available formats/qualities for the form's URL with the selected
6698    /// tool, on the async runtime; the result appears in a window.
6699    fn start_format_probe(&mut self, ctx: egui::Context) {
6700        let url = self.video_form.url.trim().to_string();
6701        if url.is_empty() {
6702            self.status = "Enter a URL first.".into();
6703            return;
6704        }
6705        let tool = self.video_form.tool;
6706        let (auth_kind, auth_value) = match self.video_form.auth_override {
6707            Some(kind) => (kind, self.video_form.auth_value.clone()),
6708            None => (
6709                self.video_form.default_auth_kind,
6710                self.video_form.default_auth_value.clone(),
6711            ),
6712        };
6713        let global_method = setting_or_empty(&self.core, K_DOWNLOAD_AUTH);
6714        let global_browser = setting_or_empty(&self.core, K_COOKIES_BROWSER);
6715        let auth = crate::downloader::resolve_auth_for(
6716            auth_kind,
6717            &auth_value,
6718            &global_method,
6719            &global_browser,
6720        );
6721
6722        let probe = self.format_probe.clone();
6723        *probe.lock().unwrap() = FormatProbe::Running;
6724        self.status = "Listing formats…".into();
6725        self.core.rt.spawn(async move {
6726            let result = crate::downloader::probe_formats(tool, &url, &auth).await;
6727            *probe.lock().unwrap() = match result {
6728                Ok(s) => FormatProbe::Done(s),
6729                Err(e) => FormatProbe::Failed(e),
6730            };
6731            ctx.request_repaint();
6732        });
6733    }
6734
6735    /// Window showing the result of a "List formats" probe.
6736    #[allow(deprecated)]
6737    fn format_probe_window(&mut self, ctx: &egui::Context) {
6738        let probe = self.format_probe.lock().unwrap().clone();
6739        let (title, body, done) = match &probe {
6740            FormatProbe::Idle => return,
6741            FormatProbe::Running => ("Listing formats…", "Running…".to_string(), false),
6742            FormatProbe::Done(s) => ("Available formats", s.clone(), true),
6743            FormatProbe::Failed(e) => ("Format probe failed", e.clone(), true),
6744        };
6745        let mut open = true;
6746        ctx.show_viewport_immediate(
6747            egui::ViewportId::from_hash_of("format_probe_vp"),
6748            egui::ViewportBuilder::default()
6749                .with_title(title.to_string())
6750                .with_inner_size([680.0, 460.0]),
6751            |ctx, _class| {
6752                if ctx.input(|i| i.viewport().close_requested()) {
6753                    open = false;
6754                }
6755                egui::CentralPanel::default().show(ctx, |ui| {
6756                    if done && ui.button("📋  Copy").clicked() {
6757                        ui.ctx().copy_text(body.clone());
6758                    }
6759                    ui.add_space(4.0);
6760                    egui::ScrollArea::both()
6761                        .auto_shrink([false, false])
6762                        .show(ui, |ui| {
6763                            ui.add(
6764                                egui::Label::new(egui::RichText::new(&body).monospace())
6765                                    .selectable(true),
6766                            );
6767                        });
6768                });
6769            },
6770        );
6771        if !open {
6772            *self.format_probe.lock().unwrap() = FormatProbe::Idle;
6773        }
6774    }
6775
6776    // ── Format Designer ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
6777
6778    /// Open (or replace) the Format Designer window, pre-loading recordings for
6779    /// the first monitor in the list.
6780    fn open_format_designer(&mut self, template: String, target: Option<FormatDesignerTarget>) {
6781        let mut state = FormatDesignerState::new(template, target);
6782        // Load recordings for the first monitor off the UI thread.
6783        if let Some(m) = self.rows.first() {
6784            let store = Arc::clone(&self.core.store);
6785            let monitor_id = m.monitor.id;
6786            let (tx, rx) = std::sync::mpsc::channel();
6787            debug!(monitor_id, "spawning fd-recordings-load thread");
6788            std::thread::Builder::new()
6789                .name("fd-recordings-load".into())
6790                .spawn(move || {
6791                    let t = std::time::Instant::now();
6792                    let recs = store.recordings_for_monitor(monitor_id).unwrap_or_default();
6793                    let default_idx = recs.len().saturating_sub(1);
6794                    debug!(elapsed_ms = t.elapsed().as_millis(), monitor_id, count = recs.len(), "fd-recordings-load done");
6795                    let _ = tx.send((recs, default_idx));
6796                })
6797                .ok();
6798            state.recordings_load = Some(rx);
6799        }
6800        self.format_designer = Some(state);
6801    }
6802
6803    /// The floating Format Designer window: token reference, live preview, and
6804    /// optional write-back to the field that opened it.
6805    #[allow(deprecated)]
6806    fn format_designer_window(&mut self, ctx: &egui::Context) {
6807        if self.format_designer.is_none() {
6808            return;
6809        }
6810
6811        // Token catalogue: (category label, &[(token, tooltip)])
6812        const TOKENS: &[(&str, &[(&str, &str)])] = &[
6813            ("Identity", &[
6814                ("{name}", "Channel / stream name"),
6815                ("{channel}", "Channel name (VOD downloads)"),
6816                ("{video_id}", "Stream or video ID"),
6817                ("{take}", "Recording attempt number"),
6818            ]),
6819            ("Capture time", &[
6820                ("{date}", "Date YYYYMMDD"),
6821                ("{time}", "Time HHMMSS"),
6822                ("{year}", "4-digit year"),
6823                ("{month}", "2-digit month"),
6824                ("{day}", "2-digit day"),
6825                ("{hour}", "2-digit hour (UTC)"),
6826                ("{minute}", "2-digit minute"),
6827                ("{second}", "2-digit second"),
6828                ("{timestamp}", "Unix timestamp"),
6829            ]),
6830            ("Live timing", &[
6831                ("{went_live_date}", "Broadcast go-live date YYYYMMDD"),
6832                ("{went_live_time}", "Broadcast go-live time HHMMSS"),
6833            ]),
6834            ("Stream info", &[
6835                ("{title}", "Stream title"),
6836                ("{games}", "Games / categories played"),
6837                ("{quality}", "Configured quality selector"),
6838                ("{platform}", "twitch · youtube · kick · generic"),
6839                ("{mode}", "live · sabr · dash · hybrid · direct · vod"),
6840                ("{tool}", "streamlink · yt-dlp · ffmpeg"),
6841            ]),
6842            ("Media (post-probe)", &[
6843                ("{resolution}", "e.g. 1920x1080"),
6844                ("{height}", "e.g. 1080"),
6845                ("{width}", "e.g. 1920"),
6846                ("{fps}", "e.g. 60"),
6847                ("{vcodec}", "Video codec e.g. h264 · hevc · av1"),
6848                ("{acodec}", "Audio codec e.g. aac · opus"),
6849            ]),
6850        ];
6851
6852        // ── Drain any completed background recordings load ────────────────────
6853        // When a load is in-flight, schedule a repaint so we check again next
6854        // frame even if there is no user input — otherwise the data sits in the
6855        // channel until the user moves the mouse.
6856        let still_loading = if let Some(fd) = self.format_designer.as_mut() {
6857            if let Some(rx) = &fd.recordings_load {
6858                match rx.try_recv() {
6859                    Ok((recs, default_idx)) => {
6860                        fd.recordings = recs;
6861                        fd.selected_recording_idx = default_idx;
6862                        fd.recordings_load = None;
6863                        false
6864                    }
6865                    Err(std::sync::mpsc::TryRecvError::Disconnected) => {
6866                        fd.recordings_load = None;
6867                        false
6868                    }
6869                    Err(std::sync::mpsc::TryRecvError::Empty) => true,
6870                }
6871            } else {
6872                false
6873            }
6874        } else {
6875            false
6876        };
6877        if still_loading {
6878            ctx.request_repaint_after(std::time::Duration::from_millis(30));
6879        }
6880
6881        // ── Snapshot state before closure (avoids borrow conflicts) ──────────
6882        let template = self.format_designer.as_ref().unwrap().template.clone();
6883        let selected_monitor_idx = self.format_designer.as_ref().unwrap().selected_monitor_idx;
6884        let selected_recording_idx = self.format_designer.as_ref().unwrap().selected_recording_idx;
6885        let recordings = self.format_designer.as_ref().unwrap().recordings.clone();
6886        let target = self.format_designer.as_ref().unwrap().target.clone();
6887
6888        let monitor_names: Vec<String> = self.rows.iter()
6889            .map(|r| r.channel.name.clone())
6890            .collect();
6891        let selected_monitor = self.rows.get(selected_monitor_idx).cloned();
6892        let selected_recording = recordings.get(selected_recording_idx).cloned();
6893
6894        // Pre-compute preview (stale by one frame on fast typing — acceptable).
6895        let preview = selected_monitor.as_ref()
6896            .map(|m| build_preview_filename(m, selected_recording.as_ref(), &template))
6897            .unwrap_or_default();
6898
6899        // ── Mutable locals for the closure to write into ─────────────────────
6900        let mut new_template = template.clone();
6901        let mut new_monitor_idx = selected_monitor_idx;
6902        let mut new_recording_idx = selected_recording_idx;
6903        let mut close = false;
6904        let mut apply = false;
6905        let mut fd_save_preset = false;
6906
6907        ctx.show_viewport_immediate(
6908            egui::ViewportId::from_hash_of("format_designer_vp"),
6909            egui::ViewportBuilder::default()
6910                .with_title("Format Designer")
6911                .with_inner_size([820.0, 600.0])
6912                .with_resizable(true),
6913            |ctx, _class| {
6914                if ctx.input(|i| i.viewport().close_requested()) {
6915                    close = true;
6916                }
6917                egui::CentralPanel::default().show(ctx, |ui| {
6918                    ui.add_space(2.0);
6919                    ui.label("Listing of all possible {formatter} options — highlighted when in use in the template below.");
6920                    ui.add_space(6.0);
6921
6922                    // ── Channel + Recording dropdowns ────────────────────────
6923                    ui.horizontal(|ui| {
6924                        ui.label("Channel:");
6925                        let ch_label = monitor_names.get(new_monitor_idx)
6926                            .cloned()
6927                            .unwrap_or_else(|| "— none —".to_string());
6928                        egui::ComboBox::from_id_salt("fd_channel_cb")
6929                            .selected_text(&ch_label)
6930                            .width(180.0)
6931                            .show_ui(ui, |ui| {
6932                                for (i, name) in monitor_names.iter().enumerate() {
6933                                    if ui.selectable_value(&mut new_monitor_idx, i, name).clicked() {
6934                                        new_recording_idx = usize::MAX; // sentinel → reload
6935                                    }
6936                                }
6937                            });
6938
6939                        ui.add_space(12.0);
6940                        ui.label("Recording:");
6941                        let rec_label = recordings.get(new_recording_idx)
6942                            .map(|r| {
6943                                chrono::DateTime::from_timestamp(r.started_at, 0)
6944                                    .map(|dt| dt.with_timezone(&chrono::Local)
6945                                        .format("%Y-%m-%d %H:%M").to_string())
6946                                    .unwrap_or_else(|| r.started_at.to_string())
6947                            })
6948                            .unwrap_or_else(|| "— sample data —".to_string());
6949                        egui::ComboBox::from_id_salt("fd_recording_cb")
6950                            .selected_text(&rec_label)
6951                            .width(200.0)
6952                            .show_ui(ui, |ui| {
6953                                // "— sample data —" option (no real recording)
6954                                let no_rec_label = "— sample data —";
6955                                if ui.selectable_label(new_recording_idx == usize::MAX, no_rec_label).clicked() {
6956                                    new_recording_idx = usize::MAX;
6957                                }
6958                                // Recordings newest-first
6959                                for (i, r) in recordings.iter().enumerate().rev() {
6960                                    let label = chrono::DateTime::from_timestamp(r.started_at, 0)
6961                                        .map(|dt| dt.with_timezone(&chrono::Local)
6962                                            .format("%Y-%m-%d %H:%M").to_string())
6963                                        .unwrap_or_else(|| r.started_at.to_string());
6964                                    let label = format!("{label}  ({})", r.status);
6965                                    if ui.selectable_value(&mut new_recording_idx, i, &label).clicked() {}
6966                                }
6967                            });
6968                    });
6969
6970                    ui.add_space(10.0);
6971                    ui.separator();
6972                    ui.add_space(6.0);
6973
6974                    // ── Token grid ───────────────────────────────────────────
6975                    let accent = ui.style().visuals.selection.bg_fill;
6976                    let dim = egui::Color32::from_gray(45);
6977                    let text_col = ui.style().visuals.text_color();
6978
6979                    for (category, tokens) in TOKENS {
6980                        ui.horizontal_wrapped(|ui| {
6981                            ui.strong(*category);
6982                            ui.label("  ");
6983                            for (tok, desc) in *tokens {
6984                                let in_use = new_template.contains(tok);
6985                                let fill = if in_use { accent } else { dim };
6986                                let label_text = egui::RichText::new(*tok)
6987                                    .monospace()
6988                                    .small()
6989                                    .color(text_col);
6990                                let btn = egui::Button::new(label_text)
6991                                    .fill(fill)
6992                                    .corner_radius(3.0);
6993                                if ui.add(btn).on_hover_text(*desc).clicked() {
6994                                    new_template.push_str(tok);
6995                                }
6996                            }
6997                        });
6998                    }
6999
7000                    ui.add_space(8.0);
7001                    ui.separator();
7002                    ui.add_space(6.0);
7003
7004                    // ── Template input ───────────────────────────────────────
7005                    ui.horizontal(|ui| {
7006                        ui.label("Template:");
7007                        ui.add_sized(
7008                            [ui.available_width(), 20.0],
7009                            egui::TextEdit::singleline(&mut new_template)
7010                                .font(egui::TextStyle::Monospace)
7011                                .hint_text("{name}_{date}_{time}"),
7012                        );
7013                    });
7014
7015                    ui.add_space(6.0);
7016
7017                    // ── Preview ──────────────────────────────────────────────
7018                    ui.horizontal(|ui| {
7019                        ui.label("Preview:");
7020                        let ext = ".mkv";
7021                        let preview_str = if preview.is_empty() {
7022                            format!("(no channel selected){ext}")
7023                        } else {
7024                            format!("{preview}{ext}")
7025                        };
7026                        egui::Frame::new()
7027                            .fill(egui::Color32::from_gray(28))
7028                            .corner_radius(4.0)
7029                            .inner_margin(egui::Margin::symmetric(8, 4))
7030                            .show(ui, |ui| {
7031                                ui.set_min_width(ui.available_width() - 4.0);
7032                                ui.add(
7033                                    egui::Label::new(
7034                                        egui::RichText::new(&preview_str)
7035                                            .monospace()
7036                                    ).selectable(true),
7037                                );
7038                            });
7039                    });
7040
7041                    ui.add_space(10.0);
7042
7043                    // ── Action buttons ───────────────────────────────────────
7044                    ui.horizontal(|ui| {
7045                        if target.is_some() && ui.button("Apply").on_hover_text("Write this template back to the field that opened the designer").clicked() {
7046                            apply = true;
7047                        }
7048                        if ui.button("💾 Save as preset…").on_hover_text("Save this template as a named preset available in all filename dropdowns").clicked() {
7049                            fd_save_preset = true;
7050                        }
7051                        if ui.button("Close").clicked() {
7052                            close = true;
7053                        }
7054                    });
7055                });
7056            },
7057        );
7058
7059        // ── Apply closure results back to state ──────────────────────────────
7060        let monitor_changed = new_monitor_idx != selected_monitor_idx;
7061
7062        if let Some(fd) = self.format_designer.as_mut() {
7063            fd.template = new_template.clone();
7064            fd.selected_monitor_idx = new_monitor_idx;
7065            if monitor_changed {
7066                // Load recordings for the newly selected monitor off the UI thread.
7067                if let Some(m) = self.rows.get(new_monitor_idx) {
7068                    let store = Arc::clone(&self.core.store);
7069                    let monitor_id = m.monitor.id;
7070                    let (tx, rx) = std::sync::mpsc::channel();
7071                    debug!(monitor_id, "spawning fd-recordings-load thread (monitor change)");
7072                    std::thread::Builder::new()
7073                        .name("fd-recordings-load".into())
7074                        .spawn(move || {
7075                            let t = std::time::Instant::now();
7076                            let recs = store.recordings_for_monitor(monitor_id).unwrap_or_default();
7077                            let default_idx = recs.len().saturating_sub(1);
7078                            debug!(elapsed_ms = t.elapsed().as_millis(), monitor_id, count = recs.len(), "fd-recordings-load done");
7079                            let _ = tx.send((recs, default_idx));
7080                        })
7081                        .ok();
7082                    fd.recordings_load = Some(rx);
7083                }
7084                fd.selected_recording_idx = 0;
7085            } else {
7086                fd.selected_recording_idx = new_recording_idx;
7087            }
7088        }
7089
7090        if fd_save_preset {
7091            self.save_preset_dialog = Some(SavePresetDraft {
7092                template: new_template.clone(),
7093                name: String::new(),
7094                error: String::new(),
7095            });
7096        }
7097
7098        if apply {
7099            match &target {
7100                Some(FormatDesignerTarget::MonitorForm) => {
7101                    if let Some(form) = self.form.as_mut() {
7102                        form.filename_template = new_template.clone();
7103                    }
7104                }
7105                Some(FormatDesignerTarget::VideoForm) => {
7106                    self.video_form.filename_template = new_template.clone();
7107                }
7108                None => {}
7109            }
7110            self.format_designer = None;
7111        } else if close {
7112            self.format_designer = None;
7113        }
7114    }
7115
7116    /// Window listing where ad breaks cause hard cuts in a take's finished file.
7117    /// Opened by double-clicking an Ads / Ad time cell.
7118    #[allow(deprecated)]
7119    fn ad_popup_window(&mut self, ctx: &egui::Context) {
7120        let Some(rid) = self.ad_popup else {
7121            return;
7122        };
7123        // Reuse the cached cut list (cleared on reload) rather than re-querying
7124        // every frame the popup is open.
7125        if !self.ad_break_cache.contains_key(&rid) {
7126            let v = self
7127                .core
7128                .store
7129                .ad_breaks_for_recording(rid)
7130                .unwrap_or_default();
7131            self.ad_break_cache.insert(rid, v);
7132        }
7133        let breaks = self.ad_break_cache.get(&rid).cloned().unwrap_or_default();
7134        let total: i64 = breaks.iter().map(|b| b.duration_secs).sum();
7135        let mut open = true;
7136        ctx.show_viewport_immediate(
7137            egui::ViewportId::from_hash_of("ad_breaks_vp"),
7138            egui::ViewportBuilder::default()
7139                .with_title("Ad breaks — cut points")
7140                .with_inner_size([360.0, 260.0]),
7141            |ctx, _class| {
7142                if ctx.input(|i| i.viewport().close_requested()) {
7143                    open = false;
7144                }
7145                egui::CentralPanel::default().show(ctx, |ui| {
7146                    if breaks.is_empty() {
7147                        ui.label("No ad breaks recorded for this take.");
7148                        return;
7149                    }
7150                    ui.label(format!(
7151                        "{} ad break(s), {} total. Each is a hard cut in the recorded file \
7152                         (streamlink filters ad segments out).",
7153                        breaks.len(),
7154                        fmt_duration(total),
7155                    ));
7156                    ui.add_space(6.0);
7157                    let lines = ad_cut_lines(&breaks);
7158                    egui::ScrollArea::vertical()
7159                        .auto_shrink([false, true])
7160                        .show(ui, |ui| {
7161                            for line in &lines {
7162                                ui.label(egui::RichText::new(line).monospace());
7163                            }
7164                        });
7165                    ui.add_space(6.0);
7166                    if ui.button("📋  Copy").clicked() {
7167                        ui.ctx().copy_text(lines.join("\n"));
7168                    }
7169                });
7170            },
7171        );
7172        if !open {
7173            self.ad_popup = None;
7174        }
7175    }
7176
7177    /// Load a recording's metadata-change rows into the cache if absent.
7178    fn ensure_meta_cached(&mut self, rid: i64) {
7179        if !self.meta_change_cache.contains_key(&rid) {
7180            let v = self
7181                .core
7182                .store
7183                .meta_changes_for_recording(rid)
7184                .unwrap_or_default();
7185            self.meta_change_cache.insert(rid, v);
7186        }
7187    }
7188
7189    #[allow(deprecated)]
7190    fn meta_popup_window(&mut self, ctx: &egui::Context) {
7191        let Some(popup) = self.meta_popup.clone() else {
7192            return;
7193        };
7194        // Build the change list: one take directly, or a stream's takes merged
7195        // chronologically with the per-take re-baselines dropped.
7196        let (changes, multi) = match &popup {
7197            MetaPopup::Take(rid) => {
7198                self.ensure_meta_cached(*rid);
7199                (self.meta_change_cache.get(rid).cloned().unwrap_or_default(), false)
7200            }
7201            MetaPopup::Stream(takes) => {
7202                for (rid, _) in takes {
7203                    self.ensure_meta_cached(*rid);
7204                }
7205                let loaded: Vec<(i64, Vec<StreamMetaChange>)> = takes
7206                    .iter()
7207                    .map(|(rid, started)| {
7208                        (*started, self.meta_change_cache.get(rid).cloned().unwrap_or_default())
7209                    })
7210                    .collect();
7211                (aggregate_stream_changes(&loaded), takes.len() > 1)
7212            }
7213        };
7214        let mut open = true;
7215        ctx.show_viewport_immediate(
7216            egui::ViewportId::from_hash_of("title_changes_vp"),
7217            egui::ViewportBuilder::default()
7218                .with_title("Title & category changes")
7219                .with_inner_size([460.0, 280.0]),
7220            |ctx, _class| {
7221                if ctx.input(|i| i.viewport().close_requested()) {
7222                    open = false;
7223                }
7224                egui::CentralPanel::default().show(ctx, |ui| {
7225                    // Only actual changes (the initial value of each field is the
7226                    // starting state, not a change); shown as `old → new`.
7227                    let lines = meta_change_lines(&changes);
7228                    if lines.is_empty() {
7229                        ui.label("No title or category changes recorded.");
7230                        return;
7231                    }
7232                    let scope = if multi {
7233                        "across this stream's takes"
7234                    } else {
7235                        "during this recording"
7236                    };
7237                    ui.label(format!(
7238                        "{} change(s) {scope} (offset from the start; each shows the \
7239                         value before → after).",
7240                        lines.len(),
7241                    ));
7242                    ui.add_space(6.0);
7243                    egui::ScrollArea::vertical()
7244                        .auto_shrink([false, true])
7245                        .show(ui, |ui| {
7246                            for line in &lines {
7247                                ui.label(egui::RichText::new(line).monospace());
7248                            }
7249                        });
7250                    ui.add_space(6.0);
7251                    if ui.button("📋  Copy").clicked() {
7252                        ui.ctx().copy_text(lines.join("\n"));
7253                    }
7254                });
7255            },
7256        );
7257        if !open {
7258            self.meta_popup = None;
7259        }
7260    }
7261
7262    /// Properties dialog for a single recording take.
7263    /// Opened via right-click → Properties on a history-tree take row.
7264    #[allow(deprecated)]
7265    fn recording_properties_window(&mut self, ctx: &egui::Context) {
7266        let Some(rid) = self.rec_props else {
7267            return;
7268        };
7269        // Pull the recording out of the cache; close if the take was deleted.
7270        let Some(rec) = self
7271            .rec_cache
7272            .values()
7273            .flat_map(|v| v.iter())
7274            .find(|r| r.id == rid)
7275            .cloned()
7276        else {
7277            self.rec_props = None;
7278            return;
7279        };
7280        let now = crate::models::now_unix();
7281        let mut open = true;
7282        // Collect inter-frame actions so the closure doesn't borrow `self`.
7283        let mut copy_path: Option<String> = None;
7284        let mut notes_changed: Option<String> = None;
7285        // Snapshot the draft so the TextEdit can borrow it inside the closure.
7286        let mut notes_draft = self.rec_props_notes.clone();
7287
7288        ctx.show_viewport_immediate(
7289            egui::ViewportId::from_hash_of("recording_props_vp"),
7290            egui::ViewportBuilder::default()
7291                .with_title(format!("Recording properties — take #{rid}"))
7292                .with_inner_size([500.0, 540.0]),
7293            |ctx, _class| {
7294                if ctx.input(|i| i.viewport().close_requested()) {
7295                    open = false;
7296                }
7297                egui::CentralPanel::default().show(ctx, |ui| {
7298                    egui::ScrollArea::vertical().show(ui, |ui| {
7299                        // ── File ──────────────────────────────────────────
7300                        ui.strong("File");
7301                        egui::Grid::new("rp_file")
7302                            .num_columns(2)
7303                            .striped(true)
7304                            .min_col_width(90.0)
7305                            .show(ui, |ui| {
7306                                ui.label("Path");
7307                                ui.horizontal(|ui| {
7308                                    ui.add(
7309                                        egui::Label::new(
7310                                            egui::RichText::new(&rec.output_path).monospace(),
7311                                        )
7312                                        .truncate(),
7313                                    );
7314                                    if !rec.output_path.is_empty()
7315                                        && ui
7316                                            .small_button("📋")
7317                                            .on_hover_text("Copy path")
7318                                            .clicked()
7319                                    {
7320                                        copy_path = Some(rec.output_path.clone());
7321                                    }
7322                                });
7323                                ui.end_row();
7324                                ui.label("Size");
7325                                ui.label(fmt_bytes(rec.bytes));
7326                                ui.end_row();
7327                                ui.label("Status");
7328                                ui.label(&rec.status);
7329                                ui.end_row();
7330                                if let Some(code) = rec.exit_code {
7331                                    ui.label("Exit code");
7332                                    ui.label(code.to_string());
7333                                    ui.end_row();
7334                                }
7335                            });
7336
7337                        ui.add_space(8.0);
7338                        // ── Capture timing ────────────────────────────────
7339                        ui.strong("Capture");
7340                        egui::Grid::new("rp_timing")
7341                            .num_columns(2)
7342                            .striped(true)
7343                            .min_col_width(90.0)
7344                            .show(ui, |ui| {
7345                                ui.label("Started");
7346                                ui.label(fmt_datetime_short(rec.started_at));
7347                                ui.end_row();
7348                                if let Some(ended) = rec.ended_at {
7349                                    ui.label("Ended");
7350                                    ui.label(fmt_datetime_short(ended));
7351                                    ui.end_row();
7352                                }
7353                                ui.label("Duration");
7354                                ui.label(fmt_duration(rec.duration_secs(now)));
7355                                ui.end_row();
7356                                if let Some(live) = rec.went_live_at {
7357                                    ui.label("Went live");
7358                                    let approx =
7359                                        if rec.went_live_approx { " (approx)" } else { "" };
7360                                    ui.label(format!(
7361                                        "{}{}",
7362                                        fmt_datetime_short(live),
7363                                        approx
7364                                    ));
7365                                    ui.end_row();
7366                                }
7367                                if let Some(lost) = rec.lost_secs {
7368                                    ui.label("Lost footage");
7369                                    ui.label(format!(
7370                                        "{} ({})",
7371                                        fmt_duration(lost),
7372                                        fmt_duration_secs(lost)
7373                                    ));
7374                                    ui.end_row();
7375                                }
7376                            });
7377
7378                        ui.add_space(8.0);
7379                        // ── Stream info ───────────────────────────────────
7380                        ui.strong("Stream");
7381                        egui::Grid::new("rp_stream")
7382                            .num_columns(2)
7383                            .striped(true)
7384                            .min_col_width(90.0)
7385                            .show(ui, |ui| {
7386                                if !rec.title.is_empty() {
7387                                    ui.label("Title");
7388                                    ui.add(
7389                                        egui::Label::new(&rec.title).wrap_mode(egui::TextWrapMode::Wrap),
7390                                    );
7391                                    ui.end_row();
7392                                }
7393                                if !rec.category.is_empty() {
7394                                    ui.label("Category");
7395                                    ui.label(&rec.category);
7396                                    ui.end_row();
7397                                }
7398                                if rec.ad_count > 0 {
7399                                    ui.label("Ad breaks");
7400                                    ui.label(format!(
7401                                        "{} break(s), {} total",
7402                                        rec.ad_count,
7403                                        fmt_duration(rec.ad_secs)
7404                                    ));
7405                                    ui.end_row();
7406                                }
7407                                if rec.meta_change_count > 0 {
7408                                    ui.label("Meta changes");
7409                                    ui.label(format!("{} change(s)", rec.meta_change_count));
7410                                    ui.end_row();
7411                                }
7412                                if let Some(sid) = &rec.stream_id {
7413                                    ui.label("Stream ID");
7414                                    ui.add(
7415                                        egui::Label::new(egui::RichText::new(sid).monospace())
7416                                            .truncate(),
7417                                    );
7418                                    ui.end_row();
7419                                }
7420                                if let Some(tg) = &rec.take_group {
7421                                    ui.label("Take group");
7422                                    ui.add(
7423                                        egui::Label::new(egui::RichText::new(tg).monospace())
7424                                            .truncate(),
7425                                    );
7426                                    ui.end_row();
7427                                }
7428                            });
7429
7430                        // ── VOD (Twitch only) ─────────────────────────────
7431                        if rec.vod_state.is_some() {
7432                            ui.add_space(8.0);
7433                            ui.strong("VOD");
7434                            egui::Grid::new("rp_vod")
7435                                .num_columns(2)
7436                                .striped(true)
7437                                .min_col_width(90.0)
7438                                .show(ui, |ui| {
7439                                    ui.label("State");
7440                                    let (label, color) = match rec.vod_state.as_deref() {
7441                                        Some("pending") => ("Checking…", egui::Color32::GRAY),
7442                                        Some("found") => ("Published", egui::Color32::from_rgb(80, 200, 80)),
7443                                        Some("not_published") => ("Not published", egui::Color32::from_rgb(220, 80, 80)),
7444                                        _ => ("Unknown", egui::Color32::GRAY),
7445                                    };
7446                                    ui.colored_label(color, label);
7447                                    ui.end_row();
7448                                    if let Some(vod_url) = rec.vod_url() {
7449                                        ui.label("VOD URL");
7450                                        ui.hyperlink_to(&vod_url, &vod_url);
7451                                        ui.end_row();
7452                                    }
7453                                    if let Some(muted) = rec.vod_muted_secs {
7454                                        ui.label("Muted");
7455                                        if muted == 0 {
7456                                            ui.colored_label(egui::Color32::from_rgb(80, 200, 80), "None (clean copy)");
7457                                        } else {
7458                                            ui.colored_label(
7459                                                egui::Color32::from_rgb(220, 160, 30),
7460                                                format!("{} muted (online copy damaged)", fmt_duration(muted)),
7461                                            );
7462                                        }
7463                                        ui.end_row();
7464                                    }
7465                                });
7466                        }
7467
7468                        if !rec.log_excerpt.is_empty() {
7469                            ui.add_space(8.0);
7470                            ui.strong("Log excerpt");
7471                            egui::ScrollArea::vertical()
7472                                .id_salt("rp_log")
7473                                .max_height(90.0)
7474                                .show(ui, |ui| {
7475                                    ui.add(
7476                                        egui::Label::new(
7477                                            egui::RichText::new(&rec.log_excerpt)
7478                                                .monospace()
7479                                                .small(),
7480                                        )
7481                                        .wrap_mode(egui::TextWrapMode::Wrap),
7482                                    );
7483                                });
7484                        }
7485
7486                        // ── Notes (editable) ──────────────────────────────
7487                        ui.add_space(8.0);
7488                        ui.strong("Notes");
7489                        let resp = ui.add(
7490                            egui::TextEdit::multiline(&mut notes_draft)
7491                                .hint_text("Add notes for this take…")
7492                                .desired_rows(4)
7493                                .desired_width(f32::INFINITY),
7494                        );
7495                        if resp.changed() {
7496                            notes_changed = Some(notes_draft.clone());
7497                        }
7498                    });
7499                });
7500            },
7501        );
7502        if !open {
7503            self.rec_props = None;
7504        }
7505        if let Some(path) = copy_path {
7506            ctx.copy_text(path);
7507        }
7508        if let Some(notes) = notes_changed {
7509            self.rec_props_notes = notes.clone();
7510            // Update in-memory cache so the draft stays in sync if the dialog
7511            // is closed and reopened without a full reload.
7512            for recs in self.rec_cache.values_mut() {
7513                for r in recs.iter_mut() {
7514                    if r.id == rid {
7515                        r.notes = notes.clone();
7516                    }
7517                }
7518            }
7519            let _ = self.core.store.set_recording_notes(rid, &notes);
7520        }
7521    }
7522
7523    /// Window listing a monitor's upcoming scheduled streams (datetime — title).
7524    /// Opened by double-clicking a Next stream cell.
7525    #[allow(deprecated)]
7526    fn schedule_popup_window(&mut self, ctx: &egui::Context) {
7527        let Some(mid) = self.schedule_popup else {
7528            return;
7529        };
7530        if !self.schedule_cache.contains_key(&mid) {
7531            let v = self
7532                .core
7533                .store
7534                .schedule_for_monitor(mid, now_unix())
7535                .unwrap_or_default();
7536            self.schedule_cache.insert(mid, v);
7537        }
7538        let segs = self.schedule_cache.get(&mid).cloned().unwrap_or_default();
7539        let mut open = true;
7540        ctx.show_viewport_immediate(
7541            egui::ViewportId::from_hash_of("upcoming_streams_vp"),
7542            egui::ViewportBuilder::default()
7543                .with_title("Upcoming streams")
7544                .with_inner_size([460.0, 280.0]),
7545            |ctx, _class| {
7546                if ctx.input(|i| i.viewport().close_requested()) {
7547                    open = false;
7548                }
7549                egui::CentralPanel::default().show(ctx, |ui| {
7550                    if segs.is_empty() {
7551                        ui.label("No upcoming scheduled streams.");
7552                        return;
7553                    }
7554                    ui.label(format!("{} upcoming scheduled stream(s).", segs.len()));
7555                    ui.add_space(6.0);
7556                    let lines: Vec<String> = segs
7557                        .iter()
7558                        .map(|s| {
7559                            let when = fmt_datetime_short(s.start_time);
7560                            if s.category.is_empty() {
7561                                format!("{when}  —  {}", s.title)
7562                            } else {
7563                                format!("{when}  —  {}  ({})", s.title, s.category)
7564                            }
7565                        })
7566                        .collect();
7567                    egui::ScrollArea::vertical()
7568                        .auto_shrink([false, true])
7569                        .show(ui, |ui| {
7570                            for l in &lines {
7571                                ui.label(egui::RichText::new(l).monospace());
7572                            }
7573                        });
7574                    ui.add_space(6.0);
7575                    if ui.button("📋  Copy").clicked() {
7576                        ui.ctx().copy_text(lines.join("\n"));
7577                    }
7578                });
7579            },
7580        );
7581        if !open {
7582            self.schedule_popup = None;
7583        }
7584    }
7585
7586    /// Load the persisted source order into the draft and open the dialog.
7587    fn open_schedule_sources(&mut self) {
7588        self.schedule_sources_draft = load_source_order(&self.core.store);
7589        self.schedule_sources_selected = None;
7590        self.show_schedule_sources = true;
7591    }
7592
7593    /// The "Schedule sources" dialog: two columns (Available / Enabled) with →/←
7594    /// transfer and ▲/▼ priority reordering, mirroring the user's mockup. Every
7595    /// change persists the order and asks the refresher to re-walk the sources.
7596    #[allow(deprecated)]
7597    fn schedule_sources_window(&mut self, ctx: &egui::Context) {
7598        if !self.show_schedule_sources {
7599            return;
7600        }
7601        let mut open = true;
7602        // Actions collected during the (borrowing) render, applied afterwards.
7603        let mut enable_id: Option<String> = None;
7604        let mut disable_id: Option<String> = None;
7605        let mut move_up_id: Option<String> = None;
7606        let mut move_down_id: Option<String> = None;
7607        let mut select_id: Option<String> = None;
7608
7609        // Filtered, draft-ordered views of the two columns: (draft index, kind).
7610        let enabled: Vec<(usize, ScheduleSourceKind)> = self
7611            .schedule_sources_draft
7612            .iter()
7613            .enumerate()
7614            .filter(|(_, e)| e.enabled)
7615            .filter_map(|(i, e)| e.kind().map(|k| (i, k)))
7616            .collect();
7617        let available: Vec<(usize, ScheduleSourceKind)> = self
7618            .schedule_sources_draft
7619            .iter()
7620            .enumerate()
7621            .filter(|(_, e)| !e.enabled)
7622            .filter_map(|(i, e)| e.kind().map(|k| (i, k)))
7623            .collect();
7624        let selected = self.schedule_sources_selected.clone();
7625        let sel_in_enabled = enabled
7626            .iter()
7627            .any(|(i, _)| Some(&self.schedule_sources_draft[*i].id) == selected.as_ref());
7628        let sel_in_available = available
7629            .iter()
7630            .any(|(i, _)| Some(&self.schedule_sources_draft[*i].id) == selected.as_ref());
7631        let sel_pos = enabled
7632            .iter()
7633            .position(|(i, _)| Some(&self.schedule_sources_draft[*i].id) == selected.as_ref());
7634
7635        ctx.show_viewport_immediate(
7636            egui::ViewportId::from_hash_of("schedule_sources_vp"),
7637            egui::ViewportBuilder::default()
7638                .with_title("Schedule sources")
7639                .with_inner_size([600.0, 440.0]),
7640            |ctx, _class| {
7641                if ctx.input(|i| i.viewport().close_requested()) {
7642                    open = false;
7643                }
7644                egui::CentralPanel::default().show(ctx, |ui| {
7645                    ui.label(
7646                        "Sources are tried top-to-bottom per channel; the first one to resolve \
7647                         an actual schedule wins. Move sources between the columns and order the \
7648                         enabled ones by priority.",
7649                    );
7650                    ui.add_space(8.0);
7651
7652                    ui.horizontal_top(|ui| {
7653                        // ── Available column ──
7654                        ui.vertical(|ui| {
7655                            ui.set_width(240.0);
7656                            ui.strong("Available sources");
7657                            egui::Frame::group(ui.style()).show(ui, |ui| {
7658                                ui.set_width(228.0);
7659                                ui.set_min_height(300.0);
7660                                if available.is_empty() {
7661                                    ui.weak("(all sources enabled)");
7662                                }
7663                                for (i, kind) in &available {
7664                                    let id = &self.schedule_sources_draft[*i].id;
7665                                    let resp = source_row(ui, *kind, selected.as_deref() == Some(id));
7666                                    if resp.clicked() {
7667                                        select_id = Some(id.clone());
7668                                    }
7669                                    if resp.double_clicked() {
7670                                        enable_id = Some(id.clone());
7671                                    }
7672                                }
7673                            });
7674                        });
7675
7676                        // ── Transfer / reorder buttons ──
7677                        ui.vertical(|ui| {
7678                            ui.add_space(48.0);
7679                            if ui
7680                                .add_enabled(sel_in_available, egui::Button::new("→"))
7681                                .on_hover_text("Enable the selected source")
7682                                .clicked()
7683                            {
7684                                enable_id = selected.clone();
7685                            }
7686                            if ui
7687                                .add_enabled(sel_in_enabled, egui::Button::new("←"))
7688                                .on_hover_text("Disable the selected source")
7689                                .clicked()
7690                            {
7691                                disable_id = selected.clone();
7692                            }
7693                            ui.add_space(16.0);
7694                            if ui
7695                                .add_enabled(
7696                                    sel_pos.is_some_and(|p| p > 0),
7697                                    egui::Button::new("▲"),
7698                                )
7699                                .on_hover_text("Higher priority")
7700                                .clicked()
7701                            {
7702                                move_up_id = selected.clone();
7703                            }
7704                            if ui
7705                                .add_enabled(
7706                                    sel_pos.is_some_and(|p| p + 1 < enabled.len()),
7707                                    egui::Button::new("▼"),
7708                                )
7709                                .on_hover_text("Lower priority")
7710                                .clicked()
7711                            {
7712                                move_down_id = selected.clone();
7713                            }
7714                        });
7715
7716                        // ── Enabled column (priority order) ──
7717                        ui.vertical(|ui| {
7718                            ui.set_width(260.0);
7719                            ui.strong("Enabled sources (priority order)");
7720                            egui::Frame::group(ui.style()).show(ui, |ui| {
7721                                ui.set_width(248.0);
7722                                ui.set_min_height(300.0);
7723                                if enabled.is_empty() {
7724                                    ui.weak("(no sources enabled — schedules won't update)");
7725                                }
7726                                for (rank, (i, kind)) in enabled.iter().enumerate() {
7727                                    let id = &self.schedule_sources_draft[*i].id;
7728                                    let resp = source_row_ranked(
7729                                        ui,
7730                                        rank + 1,
7731                                        *kind,
7732                                        selected.as_deref() == Some(id),
7733                                    );
7734                                    if resp.clicked() {
7735                                        select_id = Some(id.clone());
7736                                    }
7737                                    if resp.double_clicked() {
7738                                        disable_id = Some(id.clone());
7739                                    }
7740                                }
7741                            });
7742                        });
7743                    });
7744
7745                    ui.add_space(8.0);
7746                    // Description / risk note for the current selection.
7747                    if let Some(kind) = selected.as_deref().and_then(ScheduleSourceKind::from_id) {
7748                        ui.label(kind.description());
7749                        if kind.risky() {
7750                            ui.colored_label(
7751                                egui::Color32::from_rgb(0xe0, 0x6c, 0x6c),
7752                                "⚠ Risky source — may violate a platform's Terms of Service. \
7753                                 Use at your own risk.",
7754                            );
7755                        }
7756                    } else {
7757                        ui.weak("Select a source to see what it does.");
7758                    }
7759
7760                    ui.add_space(8.0);
7761                    if ui.button("Close").clicked() {
7762                        open = false;
7763                    }
7764                });
7765            },
7766        );
7767
7768        // ── Apply collected actions (mutating the draft). ──
7769        let mut changed = false;
7770        if let Some(id) = &select_id {
7771            self.schedule_sources_selected = Some(id.clone());
7772        }
7773        if let Some(id) = &enable_id {
7774            if let Some(e) = self.schedule_sources_draft.iter_mut().find(|e| &e.id == id) {
7775                e.enabled = true;
7776                changed = true;
7777            }
7778            self.schedule_sources_selected = Some(id.clone());
7779        }
7780        if let Some(id) = &disable_id {
7781            if let Some(e) = self.schedule_sources_draft.iter_mut().find(|e| &e.id == id) {
7782                e.enabled = false;
7783                changed = true;
7784            }
7785            self.schedule_sources_selected = Some(id.clone());
7786        }
7787        // Reorder swaps the selected enabled entry with its enabled neighbour, by
7788        // swapping their draft slots (disabled entries in between are unaffected).
7789        if let (Some(id), Some(p)) = (&move_up_id, sel_pos) {
7790            if p > 0 {
7791                self.schedule_sources_draft.swap(enabled[p].0, enabled[p - 1].0);
7792                changed = true;
7793            }
7794            self.schedule_sources_selected = Some(id.clone());
7795        }
7796        if let (Some(id), Some(p)) = (&move_down_id, sel_pos) {
7797            if p + 1 < enabled.len() {
7798                self.schedule_sources_draft.swap(enabled[p].0, enabled[p + 1].0);
7799                changed = true;
7800            }
7801            self.schedule_sources_selected = Some(id.clone());
7802        }
7803        if changed {
7804            if let Err(e) = save_source_order(&self.core.store, &self.schedule_sources_draft) {
7805                self.status = format!("Error saving schedule sources: {e}");
7806            } else {
7807                self.core.request_schedule_refresh();
7808            }
7809        }
7810        if !open {
7811            self.show_schedule_sources = false;
7812        }
7813    }
7814
7815    /// The Schedule tab: a month/week/day calendar of all upcoming scheduled
7816    /// streams, with a left sidebar to filter channels and a collision highlight.
7817    fn schedule_view(&mut self, ui: &mut egui::Ui) {
7818        use chrono::Datelike;
7819
7820        // Lazy load on first view + initialize the focused date to today.
7821        if !self.schedule_loaded {
7822            if self.pending_schedule.is_none() {
7823                self.spawn_reload_schedule();
7824            }
7825            ui.centered_and_justified(|ui| {
7826                ui.label("Loading schedule…");
7827            });
7828            return;
7829        }
7830        let anchor = *self
7831            .schedule_anchor
7832            .get_or_insert_with(|| chrono::Local::now().date_naive());
7833
7834        // Empty state: nothing scheduled across any monitor.
7835        if self.schedule_all.is_empty() {
7836            ui.add_space(24.0);
7837            ui.vertical_centered(|ui| {
7838                ui.label("No upcoming streams scheduled.");
7839                ui.label(
7840                    "Schedules come from a channel's published Twitch/YouTube upcoming \
7841                     streams — channels without one (Twitch returns no segments) show nothing.",
7842                );
7843                ui.add_space(8.0);
7844                if ui.button("⟳  Fetch now").clicked() {
7845                    self.core.request_schedule_refresh();
7846                    self.spawn_reload_schedule();
7847                }
7848            });
7849            return;
7850        }
7851
7852        // Platform favicons (cheap Arc-backed clone) so the panel closures below can
7853        // borrow `self` immutably — they only read schedule data.
7854        let ptex = self
7855            .platform_tex
7856            .get_or_insert_with(|| PlatformTextures::load(ui.ctx()))
7857            .clone();
7858
7859        // Precompute (immutable reads of `self`) what the closures need: collisions
7860        // and the per-day buckets of visible streams (indices into `schedule_all`).
7861        let collide: HashSet<usize> = if self.schedule_collisions {
7862            schedule_collisions(&self.schedule_all, &self.schedule_hidden)
7863        } else {
7864            HashSet::new()
7865        };
7866        let mut by_day: HashMap<chrono::NaiveDate, Vec<usize>> = HashMap::new();
7867        for (i, s) in self.schedule_all.iter().enumerate() {
7868            if self.schedule_hidden.contains(&s.channel_id) {
7869                continue;
7870            }
7871            // Skip soft-hidden segments unless the user has toggled "show hidden".
7872            if !self.schedule_show_hidden
7873                && self.schedule_hidden_segments.contains(&s.segment_id)
7874            {
7875                continue;
7876            }
7877            // Skip segments that are secondaries of a merge (auto or manual) —
7878            // their primary renders the merged event block.
7879            if s.merged_into.is_some() { continue; }
7880            if self.schedule_auto_secondary.contains(&s.segment_id) { continue; }
7881            if let Some(d) = local_date(s.start_time) {
7882                by_day.entry(d).or_default().push(i);
7883            }
7884        }
7885        // `schedule_all` is sorted by start_time, so each day's list is time-sorted.
7886
7887        // Actions collected during rendering, applied after the borrowing closures.
7888        let mut open_day: Option<chrono::NaiveDate> = None;
7889        let mut nav_anchor: Option<chrono::NaiveDate> = None;
7890        let mut set_mode: Option<ScheduleMode> = None;
7891        let mut do_refresh = false;
7892        let mut open_sources = false;
7893        let mut clear_hidden = false;
7894        let mut hide_all = false;
7895        let mut toggle_channel: Option<i64> = None;
7896        let mut set_collisions: Option<bool> = None;
7897        let mut set_show_hidden: Option<bool> = None;
7898
7899        // ── Left sidebar: per-channel filter + collision toggle. ──
7900        egui::Panel::left("schedule_sidebar")
7901            .resizable(true)
7902            .default_size(210.0)
7903            .size_range(160.0..=380.0)
7904            .show_inside(ui, |ui| {
7905                ui.add_space(4.0);
7906                ui.heading("Channels");
7907                ui.add_space(2.0);
7908
7909                // Distinct channels with upcoming streams, sorted by name.
7910                let mut chans: Vec<(i64, &str)> = Vec::new();
7911                let mut seen: HashSet<i64> = HashSet::new();
7912                for s in &self.schedule_all {
7913                    if seen.insert(s.channel_id) {
7914                        chans.push((s.channel_id, s.channel_name.as_str()));
7915                    }
7916                }
7917                chans.sort_by_key(|(_, name)| name.to_lowercase());
7918
7919                let mut all = self.schedule_hidden.is_empty();
7920                if ui
7921                    .checkbox(&mut all, "All channels")
7922                    .on_hover_text("Show streams from every channel")
7923                    .changed()
7924                {
7925                    if all {
7926                        clear_hidden = true;
7927                    } else {
7928                        hide_all = true;
7929                    }
7930                }
7931                ui.separator();
7932
7933                egui::ScrollArea::vertical()
7934                    .auto_shrink([false, false])
7935                    .show(ui, |ui| {
7936                        for (id, name) in &chans {
7937                            let cid = *id;
7938                            // Count + distinct platforms for this channel's upcoming streams.
7939                            let mut count = 0usize;
7940                            let mut plats: Vec<Platform> = Vec::new();
7941                            for s in self.schedule_all.iter().filter(|s| s.channel_id == cid) {
7942                                count += 1;
7943                                let p = s.platform();
7944                                if !plats.contains(&p) {
7945                                    plats.push(p);
7946                                }
7947                            }
7948                            // Pre-compute for context-menu closure (can't re-borrow self inside).
7949                            let ch_is_hidden = self.schedule_hidden.contains(&cid);
7950                            let row = ui.horizontal(|ui| {
7951                                let mut vis = !ch_is_hidden;
7952                                if ui.checkbox(&mut vis, "").changed() {
7953                                    toggle_channel = Some(cid);
7954                                }
7955                                for &p in &plats {
7956                                    platform_icon(ui, &ptex, p).on_hover_text(p.label());
7957                                }
7958                                ui.add(
7959                                    egui::Label::new(format!("{name}  ({count})")).truncate(),
7960                                );
7961                            }).response;
7962                            // Context menu — captures only Copy values, uses temp data.
7963                            row.context_menu(|ui| {
7964                                let label = if ch_is_hidden {
7965                                    "👁  Show channel"
7966                                } else {
7967                                    "🙈  Hide channel"
7968                                };
7969                                if ui.button(label).clicked() {
7970                                    ui.ctx().data_mut(|d| {
7971                                        d.insert_temp(egui::Id::new("sched_ch_toggle"), cid)
7972                                    });
7973                                    ui.close();
7974                                }
7975                                ui.separator();
7976                                if ui
7977                                    .button("⟳  Refetch schedule")
7978                                    .on_hover_text("Re-fetch this channel's schedule now, ignoring the cache")
7979                                    .clicked()
7980                                {
7981                                    ui.ctx().data_mut(|d| {
7982                                        d.insert_temp(egui::Id::new("sched_ch_refetch"), cid)
7983                                    });
7984                                    ui.close();
7985                                }
7986                            });
7987                        }
7988
7989                        // Hidden-segment toggle (shown only when any exist).
7990                        let hidden_n = self.schedule_hidden_segments.len();
7991                        if hidden_n > 0 {
7992                            ui.separator();
7993                            let show_hidden = self.schedule_show_hidden;
7994                            let label = if show_hidden {
7995                                format!("🔒  Hide {hidden_n} hidden")
7996                            } else {
7997                                format!("👁  Show {hidden_n} hidden")
7998                            };
7999                            if ui
8000                                .button(label)
8001                                .on_hover_text(if show_hidden {
8002                                    "Filter out soft-hidden events again"
8003                                } else {
8004                                    "Show soft-hidden events dimmed (⊘) — right-click to restore"
8005                                })
8006                                .clicked()
8007                            {
8008                                set_show_hidden = Some(!show_hidden);
8009                            }
8010                        }
8011                    });
8012            });
8013
8014        // Visible date range + header title for the current mode.
8015        let mode = self.schedule_mode;
8016        let today = chrono::Local::now().date_naive();
8017        let (range_start, range_end, title) = match mode {
8018            ScheduleMode::Month => {
8019                let first = chrono::NaiveDate::from_ymd_opt(anchor.year(), anchor.month(), 1)
8020                    .unwrap_or(anchor);
8021                let gs = week_start(first);
8022                (gs, add_days(gs, 42), month_title(anchor.year(), anchor.month()))
8023            }
8024            ScheduleMode::Week => {
8025                let ws = week_start(anchor);
8026                let we = add_days(ws, 6);
8027                // Honor the date-format setting on both ends (so the start year shows
8028                // for a cross-year week, and the order matches the user's preference).
8029                let pat = active_date_fmt().date_pattern();
8030                let title = format!("{} – {}", ws.format(pat), we.format(pat));
8031                (ws, add_days(ws, 7), title)
8032            }
8033            ScheduleMode::Day => {
8034                let title = anchor
8035                    .format(&format!("%A, {}", active_date_fmt().date_pattern()))
8036                    .to_string();
8037                (anchor, add_days(anchor, 1), title)
8038            }
8039            ScheduleMode::Agenda => {
8040                // Show all upcoming from anchor; use far-future end so the collision
8041                // badge counts everything visible.
8042                (anchor, add_days(anchor, 365), "Agenda".to_string())
8043            }
8044        };
8045        let (prev_date, next_date) = match mode {
8046            // Snap month nav to the 1st: the grid only uses the month anyway, and it
8047            // keeps paging idempotent (no day-of-month drift across short months).
8048            ScheduleMode::Month => (
8049                shift_month(anchor, -1).with_day(1).unwrap_or(anchor),
8050                shift_month(anchor, 1).with_day(1).unwrap_or(anchor),
8051            ),
8052            ScheduleMode::Week | ScheduleMode::Agenda => (add_days(anchor, -7), add_days(anchor, 7)),
8053            ScheduleMode::Day => (add_days(anchor, -1), add_days(anchor, 1)),
8054        };
8055        // Collisions visible in the current view (the per-chip ⚠ uses the global
8056        // `collide` set; the badge counts only what's on screen).
8057        let collisions_in_view = collide
8058            .iter()
8059            .filter(|&&i| {
8060                local_date(self.schedule_all[i].start_time)
8061                    .is_some_and(|d| d >= range_start && d < range_end)
8062            })
8063            .count();
8064
8065        // ── Center: the calendar for the selected mode. ──
8066        egui::CentralPanel::default().show_inside(ui, |ui| {
8067            // Header: view mode + navigation + title + collision controls.
8068            ui.horizontal(|ui| {
8069                let mut m = mode;
8070                ui.selectable_value(&mut m, ScheduleMode::Month, "Month");
8071                ui.selectable_value(&mut m, ScheduleMode::Week, "Week");
8072                ui.selectable_value(&mut m, ScheduleMode::Day, "Day");
8073                ui.selectable_value(&mut m, ScheduleMode::Agenda, "Agenda");
8074                if m != mode {
8075                    set_mode = Some(m);
8076                }
8077                ui.separator();
8078                if ui.button("◀").on_hover_text("Previous").clicked() {
8079                    nav_anchor = Some(prev_date);
8080                }
8081                if ui.button("Today").clicked() {
8082                    nav_anchor = Some(today);
8083                }
8084                if ui.button("▶").on_hover_text("Next").clicked() {
8085                    nav_anchor = Some(next_date);
8086                }
8087                ui.add_space(8.0);
8088                ui.heading(title);
8089
8090                ui.with_layout(egui::Layout::right_to_left(egui::Align::Center), |ui| {
8091                    if ui
8092                        .button("⟳")
8093                        .on_hover_text("Fetch the latest schedules now (F5)")
8094                        .clicked()
8095                    {
8096                        do_refresh = true;
8097                    }
8098                    if ui
8099                        .button("⛭ Sources")
8100                        .on_hover_text(
8101                            "Choose which schedule sources to use and their priority order",
8102                        )
8103                        .clicked()
8104                    {
8105                        open_sources = true;
8106                    }
8107                    let mut hc = self.schedule_collisions;
8108                    if ui
8109                        .checkbox(&mut hc, "Highlight collisions")
8110                        .on_hover_text("Flag streams whose scheduled times overlap")
8111                        .changed()
8112                    {
8113                        set_collisions = Some(hc);
8114                    }
8115                    if self.schedule_collisions && collisions_in_view > 0 {
8116                        ui.colored_label(HL_COLLISION, format!("⚠ {collisions_in_view}"))
8117                            .on_hover_text("Overlapping streams in view");
8118                    }
8119                });
8120            });
8121            ui.separator();
8122
8123            // ── Selection action bar (shown when any events are selected). ──
8124            let n_sel = self.schedule_selected.len();
8125            if n_sel > 0 {
8126                let accent = ui.visuals().selection.bg_fill;
8127                ui.horizontal(|ui| {
8128                    ui.colored_label(accent, format!("{n_sel} selected"));
8129                    ui.separator();
8130                    // Merge: only valid when ≥2 events from the same channel are selected
8131                    let can_merge = n_sel >= 2 && {
8132                        let ch_ids: HashSet<i64> = self
8133                            .schedule_selected
8134                            .iter()
8135                            .filter_map(|&sid| {
8136                                self.schedule_all.iter().find(|s| s.segment_id == sid)
8137                            })
8138                            .map(|s| s.channel_id)
8139                            .collect();
8140                        ch_ids.len() == 1
8141                    };
8142                    if ui
8143                        .add_enabled(can_merge, egui::Button::new("🔀 Merge"))
8144                        .on_hover_text("Merge selected events into one calendar entry")
8145                        .on_disabled_hover_text(
8146                            if n_sel < 2 {
8147                                "Select 2+ events to merge"
8148                            } else {
8149                                "Can only merge events from the same channel"
8150                            },
8151                        )
8152                        .clicked()
8153                    {
8154                        let mut segs: Vec<UpcomingStream> = self
8155                            .schedule_selected
8156                            .iter()
8157                            .filter_map(|&sid| {
8158                                self.schedule_all.iter().find(|s| s.segment_id == sid).cloned()
8159                            })
8160                            .collect();
8161                        // Sort highest priority first (YouTube first) so index 0 is the default primary.
8162                        segs.sort_by_key(|s| merge_source_priority(&s.source));
8163                        self.merge_preview = Some(MergePreviewDraft {
8164                            segments: segs,
8165                            primary_idx: 0,
8166                            error: String::new(),
8167                        });
8168                    }
8169                    if ui
8170                        .button("🗑 Delete")
8171                        .on_hover_text("Delete all selected events")
8172                        .clicked()
8173                    {
8174                        self.confirm_delete_segments =
8175                            Some(self.schedule_selected.iter().copied().collect());
8176                    }
8177                    ui.with_layout(egui::Layout::right_to_left(egui::Align::Center), |ui| {
8178                        if ui.button("✕ Clear").on_hover_text("Clear selection").clicked() {
8179                            self.schedule_selected.clear();
8180                        }
8181                    });
8182                });
8183                ui.separator();
8184            }
8185
8186            match mode {
8187                ScheduleMode::Month => {
8188                    self.schedule_month_grid(ui, anchor, today, &by_day, &collide, &ptex, &mut open_day)
8189                }
8190                ScheduleMode::Week => {
8191                    self.schedule_week_grid(ui, anchor, today, &by_day, &collide, &ptex, &mut open_day)
8192                }
8193                ScheduleMode::Day => {
8194                    self.schedule_day_grid(ui, anchor, today, &by_day, &collide, &mut open_day)
8195                }
8196                ScheduleMode::Agenda => {
8197                    self.schedule_agenda_view(ui, anchor, &by_day, &collide, &ptex, &mut open_day)
8198                }
8199            }
8200        });
8201
8202        // ── Apply collected actions. ──
8203        if let Some(m) = set_mode {
8204            self.schedule_mode = m;
8205        }
8206        if let Some(d) = nav_anchor {
8207            self.schedule_anchor = Some(d);
8208        }
8209        if clear_hidden {
8210            self.schedule_hidden.clear();
8211        }
8212        if hide_all {
