8213            let ids: Vec<i64> = self.schedule_all.iter().map(|s| s.channel_id).collect();
8214            self.schedule_hidden.extend(ids);
8215        }
8216        if let Some(id) = toggle_channel {
8217            // Toggle this channel's visibility.
8218            if self.schedule_hidden.contains(&id) {
8219                self.schedule_hidden.remove(&id);
8220            } else {
8221                self.schedule_hidden.insert(id);
8222            }
8223        }
8224        if let Some(v) = set_collisions {
8225            self.schedule_collisions = v;
8226        }
8227        if let Some(d) = open_day {
8228            self.schedule_day_popup = Some(d);
8229        }
8230        if do_refresh {
8231            // Trigger a real network re-fetch (not just a DB reload); the refresher
8232            // emits an event when done, which reloads the calendar. Also reload now
8233            // so the current stored data shows immediately.
8234            self.core.request_schedule_refresh();
8235            self.spawn_reload_schedule();
8236            self.status = "Fetching latest schedules…".into();
8237        }
8238        if open_sources {
8239            self.open_schedule_sources();
8240        }
8241        // Context-menu actions written into egui temp storage by schedule_copy_menu
8242        // (closures can't borrow `self` directly when deep inside panel closures).
8243        if let Some(mid) = ui
8244            .ctx()
8245            .data_mut(|d| d.remove_temp::<i64>(egui::Id::new("sched_jump")))
8246        {
8247            self.view = View::Streams;
8248            self.selected_monitor = Some(mid);
8249        }
8250        if let Some(mid) = ui
8251            .ctx()
8252            .data_mut(|d| d.remove_temp::<i64>(egui::Id::new("sched_start")))
8253        {
8254            self.core.manual(ManualCommand::Start { id: mid, notify_offline: true });
8255            self.status = "Checking channel… will record if live.".into();
8256        }
8257        if let Some(sid) = ui
8258            .ctx()
8259            .data_mut(|d| d.remove_temp::<i64>(egui::Id::new("sched_edit")))
8260        {
8261            self.open_edit_schedule(sid);
8262        }
8263        if let Some(sid) = ui
8264            .ctx()
8265            .data_mut(|d| d.remove_temp::<i64>(egui::Id::new("sched_open_src")))
8266        {
8267            let ctx = ui.ctx().clone();
8268            self.open_schedule_source(sid, &ctx);
8269        }
8270        if let Some(sid) = ui
8271            .ctx()
8272            .data_mut(|d| d.remove_temp::<i64>(egui::Id::new("sched_hide")))
8273        {
8274            if self.schedule_hidden_segments.contains(&sid) {
8275                self.schedule_hidden_segments.remove(&sid);
8276            } else {
8277                self.schedule_hidden_segments.insert(sid);
8278            }
8279        }
8280        if let Some(sid) = ui
8281            .ctx()
8282            .data_mut(|d| d.remove_temp::<i64>(egui::Id::new("sched_delete")))
8283        {
8284            self.confirm_delete_segment = Some(sid);
8285        }
8286        if let Some(cid) = ui
8287            .ctx()
8288            .data_mut(|d| d.remove_temp::<i64>(egui::Id::new("sched_ch_toggle")))
8289        {
8290            if self.schedule_hidden.contains(&cid) {
8291                self.schedule_hidden.remove(&cid);
8292            } else {
8293                self.schedule_hidden.insert(cid);
8294            }
8295        }
8296        if let Some(cid) = ui
8297            .ctx()
8298            .data_mut(|d| d.remove_temp::<i64>(egui::Id::new("sched_ch_refetch")))
8299        {
8300            self.core.request_schedule_refresh_for_channel(cid);
8301            self.spawn_reload_schedule();
8302            self.status = "Fetching schedule…".into();
8303        }
8304        if let Some(v) = set_show_hidden {
8305            self.schedule_show_hidden = v;
8306        }
8307        // Selection actions written into temp storage from schedule_time_grid
8308        // (free function, can't borrow self).
8309        if let Some(sid) = ui
8310            .ctx()
8311            .data_mut(|d| d.remove_temp::<i64>(egui::Id::new("sched_sel_toggle")))
8312        {
8313            if self.schedule_selected.contains(&sid) {
8314                self.schedule_selected.remove(&sid);
8315            } else {
8316                self.schedule_selected.insert(sid);
8317            }
8318        }
8319        if let Some(sid) = ui
8320            .ctx()
8321            .data_mut(|d| d.remove_temp::<i64>(egui::Id::new("sched_sel_single")))
8322        {
8323            self.schedule_selected.clear();
8324            self.schedule_selected.insert(sid);
8325        }
8326        // Un-merge actions from context menus.
8327        if let Some(primary_id) = ui
8328            .ctx()
8329            .data_mut(|d| d.remove_temp::<i64>(egui::Id::new("sched_unmerge_manual")))
8330        {
8331            if let Err(e) = self.core.store.unmerge_segment(primary_id) {
8332                self.status = format!("Error un-merging: {e:#}");
8333            } else {
8334                self.spawn_reload_schedule();
8335            }
8336        }
8337        if let Some(primary_id) = ui
8338            .ctx()
8339            .data_mut(|d| d.remove_temp::<i64>(egui::Id::new("sched_unmerge_auto")))
8340        {
8341            // Set auto_merge_excluded on all auto-secondaries of this primary.
8342            let secondary_ids: Vec<i64> = self
8343                .schedule_auto_secondary
8344                .iter()
8345                .copied()
8346                .filter(|&sid| {
8347                    // Find this segment in schedule_all; check if it overlaps the primary
8348                    // and belongs to the same channel.
8349                    if let Some(primary) = self.schedule_all.iter().find(|s| s.segment_id == primary_id) {
8350                        self.schedule_all.iter().any(|s| {
8351                            s.segment_id == sid && s.channel_id == primary.channel_id
8352                        })
8353                    } else {
8354                        false
8355                    }
8356                })
8357                .collect();
8358            let mut changed = false;
8359            for sid in secondary_ids {
8360                if let Err(e) = self.core.store.set_auto_merge_excluded(sid, true) {
8361                    self.status = format!("Error excluding from auto-merge: {e:#}");
8362                } else {
8363                    changed = true;
8364                }
8365            }
8366            if changed {
8367                self.spawn_reload_schedule();
8368            }
8369        }
8370    }
8371
8372    /// One compact calendar chip (colored stripe · ⚠ · platform icon · time range · channel)
8373    /// with a hover detail and the copy context menu. Returns the click response so
8374    /// the caller can react (e.g. open the day popup). Shared by month + week views.
8375    fn schedule_chip(
8376        &self,
8377        ui: &mut egui::Ui,
8378        i: usize,
8379        colliding: bool,
8380        ptex: &PlatformTextures,
8381    ) -> egui::Response {
8382        let s = &self.schedule_all[i];
8383        let is_hidden = self.schedule_hidden_segments.contains(&s.segment_id);
8384        let is_selected = self.schedule_selected.contains(&s.segment_id);
8385        let merge_label = self.schedule_merge_labels.get(&s.segment_id).map(String::as_str);
8386        let color = channel_event_color(s.channel_id, &s.channel_color);
8387        let stripe_color = if is_hidden {
8388            egui::Color32::from_rgba_unmultiplied(color.r(), color.g(), color.b(), 85)
8389        } else {
8390            color
8391        };
8392        let resp = ui
8393            .horizontal(|ui| {
8394                ui.spacing_mut().item_spacing.x = 3.0;
8395                // 3px colored left stripe
8396                let (stripe_rect, _) = ui.allocate_exact_size(
8397                    egui::vec2(3.0, ui.text_style_height(&egui::TextStyle::Body)),
8398                    egui::Sense::hover(),
8399                );
8400                ui.painter().rect_filled(stripe_rect, egui::CornerRadius::same(2), stripe_color);
8401                if is_hidden {
8402                    ui.weak("⊘");
8403                }
8404                if is_selected {
8405                    ui.label(egui::RichText::new("✓").color(ui.visuals().selection.bg_fill).small());
8406                }
8407                if merge_label.is_some() {
8408                    ui.label(egui::RichText::new("🔀").small());
8409                }
8410                if colliding {
8411                    ui.colored_label(HL_COLLISION, "⚠");
8412                }
8413                platform_icon(ui, ptex, s.platform());
8414                schedule_source_badge(ui, &s.source);
8415                let label_text = format!(
8416                    "{}  {}",
8417                    fmt_time_range(s.start_time, s.end_time),
8418                    s.channel_name
8419                );
8420                let label = if is_hidden {
8421                    egui::RichText::new(label_text).weak()
8422                } else {
8423                    egui::RichText::new(label_text)
8424                };
8425                ui.add(egui::Label::new(label).truncate());
8426            })
8427            .response
8428            .interact(egui::Sense::click());
8429        let ml_owned = merge_label.map(str::to_string);
8430        let resp = resp.on_hover_text(schedule_detail_line_merged(s, merge_label));
8431        resp.context_menu(|ui| schedule_copy_menu(ui, s, is_hidden, ml_owned.as_deref()));
8432        resp
8433    }
8434
8435    /// Month view: a 6×7 grid of day cells.
8436    #[allow(clippy::too_many_arguments)]
8437    fn schedule_month_grid(
8438        &self,
8439        ui: &mut egui::Ui,
8440        anchor: chrono::NaiveDate,
8441        today: chrono::NaiveDate,
8442        by_day: &HashMap<chrono::NaiveDate, Vec<usize>>,
8443        collide: &HashSet<usize>,
8444        ptex: &PlatformTextures,
8445        open_day: &mut Option<chrono::NaiveDate>,
8446    ) {
8447        use chrono::Datelike;
8448        let month = anchor.month();
8449        let first = chrono::NaiveDate::from_ymd_opt(anchor.year(), month, 1).unwrap_or(anchor);
8450        let grid_start = week_start(first);
8451
8452        let spacing = 4.0;
8453        let cell_h = 108.0;
8454        const WD: [&str; 7] = ["Mon", "Tue", "Wed", "Thu", "Fri", "Sat", "Sun"];
8455        const MAX_CHIPS: usize = 3;
8456        // Reserve room for a vertical scrollbar so the columns don't shift when it
8457        // appears, and floor the width so a too-narrow panel gets a horizontal
8458        // scrollbar instead of clipping the weekend columns.
8459        let usable = (ui.available_width() - 16.0).max(160.0);
8460        let col_w = ((usable - spacing * 6.0) / 7.0).floor().max(72.0);
8461
8462        // Header + weeks share one scroll viewport so their columns stay aligned.
8463        egui::ScrollArea::both()
8464            .id_salt("sched_month")
8465            .auto_shrink([false, false])
8466            .show(ui, |ui| {
8467                ui.spacing_mut().item_spacing = egui::vec2(spacing, spacing);
8468                ui.horizontal(|ui| {
8469                    for &wd in &WD {
8470                        ui.allocate_ui_with_layout(
8471                            egui::vec2(col_w, 16.0),
8472                            egui::Layout::top_down(egui::Align::Center),
8473                            |ui| {
8474                                ui.label(egui::RichText::new(wd).strong());
8475                            },
8476                        );
8477                    }
8478                });
8479                for week in 0..6u64 {
8480                    ui.horizontal(|ui| {
8481                        for dow in 0..7u64 {
8482                            let day = add_days(grid_start, (week * 7 + dow) as i64);
8483                            ui.allocate_ui_with_layout(
8484                                egui::vec2(col_w, cell_h),
8485                                egui::Layout::top_down(egui::Align::Min),
8486                                |ui| {
8487                                    self.schedule_cell(
8488                                        ui,
8489                                        day,
8490                                        month,
8491                                        today,
8492                                        col_w,
8493                                        cell_h,
8494                                        MAX_CHIPS,
8495                                        by_day.get(&day),
8496                                        collide,
8497                                        ptex,
8498                                        open_day,
8499                                    );
8500                                },
8501                            );
8502                        }
8503                    });
8504                }
8505            });
8506    }
8507
8508    /// Week view: 7-column time-grid with a 24-hour vertical axis.
8509    #[allow(clippy::too_many_arguments)]
8510    fn schedule_week_grid(
8511        &self,
8512        ui: &mut egui::Ui,
8513        anchor: chrono::NaiveDate,
8514        today: chrono::NaiveDate,
8515        by_day: &HashMap<chrono::NaiveDate, Vec<usize>>,
8516        collide: &HashSet<usize>,
8517        _ptex: &PlatformTextures,
8518        open_day: &mut Option<chrono::NaiveDate>,
8519    ) {
8520        use chrono::Datelike;
8521        let ws = week_start(anchor);
8522        let days: Vec<chrono::NaiveDate> = (0..7).map(|d| add_days(ws, d)).collect();
8523
8524        // Day-header row (outside the scroll area so it stays fixed).
8525        let time_col_w = SCHED_TIME_COL_W;
8526        let avail_w = ui.available_width();
8527        let col_w = ((avail_w - time_col_w - 6.0 * SCHED_COL_GAP) / 7.0).max(60.0);
8528        ui.horizontal(|ui| {
8529            ui.add_space(time_col_w);
8530            for &day in &days {
8531                let is_today = day == today;
8532                let hdr = format!("{}\n{}", day.format("%a"), day.day());
8533                let text = if is_today {
8534                    egui::RichText::new(hdr).strong().color(ui.visuals().hyperlink_color)
8535                } else {
8536                    egui::RichText::new(hdr).strong()
8537                };
8538                let resp = ui.allocate_ui_with_layout(
8539                    egui::vec2(col_w + SCHED_COL_GAP, 36.0),
8540                    egui::Layout::top_down(egui::Align::Center),
8541                    |ui| {
8542                        if is_today {
8543                            let r = ui.max_rect();
8544                            ui.painter().rect_filled(r, egui::CornerRadius::ZERO, TODAY_BG);
8545                        }
8546                        ui.add(egui::Label::new(text).sense(egui::Sense::click()))
8547                            .on_hover_text("Open day detail")
8548                    },
8549                );
8550                if resp.inner.clicked() {
8551                    *open_day = Some(day);
8552                }
8553            }
8554        });
8555        ui.separator();
8556
8557        schedule_time_grid(
8558            ui,
8559            "sched_week",
8560            &days,
8561            col_w,
8562            &self.schedule_all,
8563            by_day,
8564            collide,
8565            open_day,
8566            &self.schedule_hidden_segments,
8567            &self.schedule_selected,
8568            &self.schedule_merge_labels,
8569        );
8570    }
8571
8572    /// Day view: single-column time-grid with full-width event blocks.
8573    #[allow(clippy::too_many_arguments)]
8574    fn schedule_day_grid(
8575        &self,
8576        ui: &mut egui::Ui,
8577        anchor: chrono::NaiveDate,
8578        today: chrono::NaiveDate,
8579        by_day: &HashMap<chrono::NaiveDate, Vec<usize>>,
8580        collide: &HashSet<usize>,
8581        open_day: &mut Option<chrono::NaiveDate>,
8582    ) {
8583        let is_today = anchor == today;
8584        let hdr = anchor
8585            .format(&format!("%A, {}", active_date_fmt().date_pattern()))
8586            .to_string();
8587        let text = if is_today {
8588            egui::RichText::new(hdr).strong().color(ui.visuals().hyperlink_color)
8589        } else {
8590            egui::RichText::new(hdr).strong()
8591        };
8592        ui.label(text);
8593        ui.separator();
8594
8595        let avail_w = ui.available_width();
8596        let col_w = (avail_w - SCHED_TIME_COL_W - 2.0).max(80.0);
8597        schedule_time_grid(
8598            ui,
8599            "sched_day",
8600            &[anchor],
8601            col_w,
8602            &self.schedule_all,
8603            by_day,
8604            collide,
8605            open_day,
8606            &self.schedule_hidden_segments,
8607            &self.schedule_selected,
8608            &self.schedule_merge_labels,
8609        );
8610    }
8611
8612    /// Render one month-grid day cell: a bordered box with the day number and up to
8613    /// `max_chips` stream chips (overflow folds into a clickable "+N more"). A
8614    /// left-click on the day or a chip opens the day popup (`open_day`).
8615    #[allow(clippy::too_many_arguments)]
8616    fn schedule_cell(
8617        &self,
8618        ui: &mut egui::Ui,
8619        day: chrono::NaiveDate,
8620        month: u32,
8621        today: chrono::NaiveDate,
8622        col_w: f32,
8623        cell_h: f32,
8624        max_chips: usize,
8625        entries: Option<&Vec<usize>>,
8626        collide: &HashSet<usize>,
8627        ptex: &PlatformTextures,
8628        open_day: &mut Option<chrono::NaiveDate>,
8629    ) {
8630        use chrono::Datelike;
8631        let in_month = day.month() == month;
8632        let is_today = day == today;
8633
8634        let mut frame = egui::Frame::group(ui.style()).inner_margin(egui::Margin::same(4));
8635        if is_today {
8636            frame = frame.fill(TODAY_BG);
8637        }
8638        frame.show(ui, |ui| {
8639            ui.set_min_size(egui::vec2(col_w - 10.0, cell_h - 10.0));
8640            ui.vertical(|ui| {
8641                // Day number: strong in-month (today is set off by its tinted
8642                // cell background), dimmed for the leading/trailing days that spill
8643                // in from the neighbouring months.
8644                let num = egui::RichText::new(day.day().to_string());
8645                let num = if is_today || in_month {
8646                    num.strong()
8647                } else {
8648                    num.weak()
8649                };
8650                if ui
8651                    .add(egui::Label::new(num).sense(egui::Sense::click()))
8652                    .on_hover_text("Show this day's streams")
8653                    .clicked()
8654                {
8655                    *open_day = Some(day);
8656                }
8657
8658                let entries = entries.map(Vec::as_slice).unwrap_or(&[]);
8659                let shown = entries.len().min(max_chips);
8660                for &i in &entries[..shown] {
8661                    let colliding = collide.contains(&i);
8662                    if self.schedule_chip(ui, i, colliding, ptex).clicked() {
8663                        *open_day = Some(day);
8664                    }
8665                }
8666                if entries.len() > shown {
8667                    let more = entries.len() - shown;
8668                    if ui
8669                        .add(
8670                            egui::Label::new(
8671                                egui::RichText::new(format!("+{more} more…")).weak(),
8672                            )
8673                            .sense(egui::Sense::click()),
8674                        )
8675                        .clicked()
8676                    {
8677                        *open_day = Some(day);
8678                    }
8679                }
8680            });
8681        });
8682    }
8683
8684    /// Agenda view: date-grouped chronological list of all upcoming streams from `anchor`.
8685    #[allow(clippy::too_many_arguments)]
8686    fn schedule_agenda_view(
8687        &self,
8688        ui: &mut egui::Ui,
8689        anchor: chrono::NaiveDate,
8690        by_day: &HashMap<chrono::NaiveDate, Vec<usize>>,
8691        collide: &HashSet<usize>,
8692        ptex: &PlatformTextures,
8693        open_day: &mut Option<chrono::NaiveDate>,
8694    ) {
8695        // Collect and sort the days from `anchor` forward that have visible entries.
8696        let mut days: Vec<chrono::NaiveDate> = by_day
8697            .keys()
8698            .filter(|&&d| d >= anchor)
8699            .copied()
8700            .collect();
8701        days.sort();
8702
8703        if days.is_empty() {
8704            ui.add_space(12.0);
8705            ui.label(egui::RichText::new("No streams scheduled from this date.").weak());
8706            return;
8707        }
8708
8709        egui::ScrollArea::vertical()
8710            .id_salt("sched_agenda")
8711            .auto_shrink([false, false])
8712            .show(ui, |ui| {
8713                for day in &days {
8714                    let Some(indices) = by_day.get(day) else { continue };
8715                    if indices.is_empty() { continue }
8716
8717                    // Date group header
8718                    let heading = day
8719                        .format(&format!("%A, {}", active_date_fmt().date_pattern()))
8720                        .to_string();
8721                    ui.add_space(6.0);
8722                    ui.horizontal(|ui| {
8723                        ui.strong(heading);
8724                    });
8725                    ui.separator();
8726
8727                    for &i in indices {
8728                        let s = &self.schedule_all[i];
8729                        let is_hidden = self.schedule_hidden_segments.contains(&s.segment_id);
8730                        let merge_label_agenda = self.schedule_merge_labels.get(&s.segment_id).map(String::as_str);
8731                        let color = channel_event_color(s.channel_id, &s.channel_color);
8732                        let stripe_color = if is_hidden {
8733                            egui::Color32::from_rgba_unmultiplied(color.r(), color.g(), color.b(), 85)
8734                        } else {
8735                            color
8736                        };
8737                        let colliding = collide.contains(&i);
8738
8739                        let row_resp = ui.horizontal(|ui| {
8740                            ui.spacing_mut().item_spacing.x = 6.0;
8741
8742                            // Colored stripe
8743                            let (stripe_rect, _) = ui.allocate_exact_size(
8744                                egui::vec2(4.0, ui.text_style_height(&egui::TextStyle::Body) * 1.4),
8745                                egui::Sense::hover(),
8746                            );
8747                            ui.painter().rect_filled(stripe_rect, egui::CornerRadius::same(2), stripe_color);
8748                            if is_hidden {
8749                                ui.weak("⊘");
8750                            }
8751                            if merge_label_agenda.is_some() {
8752                                ui.label(egui::RichText::new("🔀").small());
8753                            }
8754
8755                            // Time range
8756                            if colliding {
8757                                ui.colored_label(HL_COLLISION, "⚠");
8758                            }
8759                            ui.add(egui::Label::new(
8760                                egui::RichText::new(fmt_time_range(s.start_time, s.end_time))
8761                                    .monospace()
8762                                    .size(12.0),
8763                            ));
8764
8765                            // Platform icon + source badge
8766                            platform_icon(ui, ptex, s.platform());
8767                            schedule_source_badge(ui, &s.source);
8768
8769                            // Channel name (bold or weak if hidden)
8770                            if is_hidden {
8771                                ui.weak(&s.channel_name);
8772                            } else {
8773                                ui.strong(&s.channel_name);
8774                            }
8775
8776                            // Title (muted, truncated)
8777                            if !s.title.is_empty() {
8778                                ui.add(
8779                                    egui::Label::new(
8780                                        egui::RichText::new(format!("— {}", s.title))
8781                                            .weak()
8782                                            .size(12.0),
8783                                    )
8784                                    .truncate(),
8785                                );
8786                            }
8787
8788                            // Category in parens (weak)
8789                            if !s.category.is_empty() {
8790                                ui.add(
8791                                    egui::Label::new(
8792                                        egui::RichText::new(format!("({})", s.category))
8793                                            .weak()
8794                                            .size(11.0),
8795                                    )
8796                                    .truncate(),
8797                                );
8798                            }
8799                        })
8800                        .response
8801                        .interact(egui::Sense::click());
8802
8803                        let ml_agenda_owned = merge_label_agenda.map(str::to_string);
8804                        let row_resp = row_resp.on_hover_text(schedule_detail_line_merged(s, merge_label_agenda));
8805                        row_resp.context_menu(|ui| schedule_copy_menu(ui, s, is_hidden, ml_agenda_owned.as_deref()));
8806                        if row_resp.clicked() {
8807                            *open_day = Some(*day);
8808                        }
8809                        ui.add_space(1.0);
8810                    }
8811                }
8812            });
8813    }
8814
8815    /// Popup listing every (visible) stream on one calendar day, with the same
8816    /// per-entry copy menu as the calendar chips.
8817    #[allow(deprecated)]
8818    fn schedule_day_window(&mut self, ctx: &egui::Context) {
8819        let Some(date) = self.schedule_day_popup else {
8820            return;
8821        };
8822        let ptex = self
8823            .platform_tex
8824            .get_or_insert_with(|| PlatformTextures::load(ctx))
8825            .clone();
8826        // Visible streams on that local date (respects the sidebar filter).
8827        let entries: Vec<&UpcomingStream> = self
8828            .schedule_all
8829            .iter()
8830            .filter(|s| !self.schedule_hidden.contains(&s.channel_id))
8831            .filter(|s| local_date(s.start_time) == Some(date))
8832            .collect();
8833        // Weekday + the user's chosen date format (so the heading matches the chips).
8834        let heading = date
8835            .format(&format!("%A, {}", active_date_fmt().date_pattern()))
8836            .to_string();
8837
8838        let hidden_segs = self.schedule_hidden_segments.clone();
8839        let merge_labels = self.schedule_merge_labels.clone();
8840        let mut open = true;
8841        let mut copy_all: Option<String> = None;
8842        ctx.show_viewport_immediate(
8843            egui::ViewportId::from_hash_of("schedule_day_vp"),
8844            egui::ViewportBuilder::default()
8845                .with_title(format!("Streams · {heading}"))
8846                .with_inner_size([480.0, 360.0]),
8847            |ctx, _class| {
8848                if ctx.input(|i| i.viewport().close_requested()) {
8849                    open = false;
8850                }
8851                egui::CentralPanel::default().show(ctx, |ui| {
8852                    if entries.is_empty() {
8853                        ui.label("No streams scheduled this day.");
8854                        return;
8855                    }
8856                    ui.label(format!("{} scheduled stream(s).", entries.len()));
8857                    ui.add_space(6.0);
8858                    egui::ScrollArea::vertical()
8859                        .auto_shrink([false, true])
8860                        .show(ui, |ui| {
8861                            for s in &entries {
8862                                // The popup doesn't carry the collision set; the calendar
8863                                // surfaces ⚠ markers, so rows here are shown unmarked.
8864                                let hidden = hidden_segs.contains(&s.segment_id);
8865                                let ml = merge_labels.get(&s.segment_id).map(String::as_str);
8866                                schedule_detail_row(ui, s, false, hidden, &ptex, ml);
8867                                // Action button strip — writes to the same temp-data keys
8868                                // that schedule_view() drains each frame.
8869                                ui.horizontal(|ui| {
8870                                    ui.add_space(10.0);
8871                                    if ui.small_button("✏  Edit").on_hover_text("Edit title, category or time").clicked() {
8872                                        ctx.data_mut(|d| d.insert_temp(egui::Id::new("sched_edit"), s.segment_id));
8873                                    }
8874                                    let can_open_src = !s.is_manual()
8875                                        && ScheduleSourceKind::from_id(&s.source)
8876                                            .is_some_and(|k| k.has_open_target());
8877                                    ui.add_enabled(can_open_src, egui::Button::new("🔗  Source").small())
8878                                        .on_hover_text("Open where this item came from (schedule page or OCR image)")
8879                                        .on_disabled_hover_text("No external source (manually edited or Discord event)")
8880                                        .clicked()
8881                                        .then(|| ctx.data_mut(|d| d.insert_temp(egui::Id::new("sched_open_src"), s.segment_id)));
8882                                    let hide_label = if hidden { "👁  Show" } else { "🙈  Hide" };
8883                                    let hide_tip   = if hidden { "Show this event on the calendar" } else { "Soft-hide (still stored, just greyed out)" };
8884                                    if ui.small_button(hide_label).on_hover_text(hide_tip).clicked() {
8885                                        ctx.data_mut(|d| d.insert_temp(egui::Id::new("sched_hide"), s.segment_id));
8886                                    }
8887                                    if ui.add(egui::Button::new(
8888                                            egui::RichText::new("🗑  Delete").color(HL_ERROR_TEXT)).small())
8889                                        .on_hover_text("Tombstone — permanently suppress; won't reappear on refresh")
8890                                        .clicked()
8891                                    {
8892                                        ctx.data_mut(|d| d.insert_temp(egui::Id::new("sched_delete"), s.segment_id));
8893                                    }
8894                                });
8895                                ui.add_space(4.0);
8896                            }
8897                        });
8898                    ui.add_space(6.0);
8899                    if ui.button("📋  Copy all").clicked() {
8900                        copy_all = Some(
8901                            entries
8902                                .iter()
8903                                .map(|s| schedule_detail_line(s))
8904                                .collect::<Vec<_>>()
8905                                .join("\n\n"),
8906                        );
8907                    }
8908                });
8909            },
8910        );
8911        if let Some(t) = copy_all {
8912            ctx.copy_text(t);
8913        }
8914        if !open {
8915            self.schedule_day_popup = None;
8916        }
8917    }
8918
8919    /// Open the "Edit schedule item" dialog for a calendar occurrence (by segment
8920    /// id), seeding the draft from its current stored values. No-op if the segment
8921    /// is no longer in the loaded calendar (e.g. a refresh dropped it).
8922    fn open_edit_schedule(&mut self, segment_id: i64) {
8923        let Some(s) = self
8924            .schedule_all
8925            .iter()
8926            .find(|s| s.segment_id == segment_id)
8927        else {
8928            return;
8929        };
8930        let (date, time) = split_local_datetime(s.start_time);
8931        let (end_date, end_time) = match s.end_time {
8932            Some(e) => split_local_datetime(e),
8933            None => (String::new(), String::new()),
8934        };
8935        self.edit_schedule = Some(EditScheduleDraft {
8936            segment_id,
8937            channel_name: s.channel_name.clone(),
8938            source: s.source.clone(),
8939            title: s.title.clone(),
8940            category: s.category.clone(),
8941            date,
8942            time,
8943            end_date,
8944            end_time,
8945            error: String::new(),
8946        });
8947    }
8948
8949    /// Open where a calendar item's schedule came from: the platform schedule page,
8950    /// the community/profile page, or the source image. No-op for manual rows and
8951    /// Discord events (the context item is disabled for those).
8952    fn open_schedule_source(&mut self, segment_id: i64, ctx: &egui::Context) {
8953        enum Target {
8954            Url(String),
8955            Path(std::path::PathBuf),
8956        }
8957        let Some(s) = self
8958            .schedule_all
8959            .iter()
8960            .find(|s| s.segment_id == segment_id)
8961        else {
8962            return;
8963        };
8964        let Some(kind) = ScheduleSourceKind::from_id(&s.source) else {
8965            self.status = "No external source to open for this item.".into();
8966            return;
8967        };
8968        let target = match kind {
8969            ScheduleSourceKind::TwitchSchedule => crate::detectors::twitch_login(&s.url)
8970                .map(|login| Target::Url(format!("https://www.twitch.tv/{login}/schedule"))),
8971            ScheduleSourceKind::YouTubeScrape | ScheduleSourceKind::YouTubeApi => {
8972                Some(Target::Url(crate::detectors::youtube_streams_url(&s.url)))
8973            }
8974            ScheduleSourceKind::YouTubeCommunityOcr => {
8975                Some(Target::Url(crate::detectors::youtube_community_url(&s.url)))
8976            }
8977            ScheduleSourceKind::TwitchBannerOcr => {
8978                // Prefer the OCR'd offline-banner image on disk; fall back to the
8979                // channel page (which shows the banner when offline).
8980                let dir = crate::assets::channel_asset_dir(&s.channel_name, Platform::Twitch);
8981                crate::assets::find_asset(&dir, "banner.")
8982                    .map(Target::Path)
8983                    .or_else(|| {
8984                        crate::detectors::twitch_login(&s.url)
8985                            .map(|login| Target::Url(format!("https://www.twitch.tv/{login}")))
8986                    })
8987            }
8988            ScheduleSourceKind::TwitterPinned => {
8989                let handle = load_channel_cfg(&self.core.store, s.channel_id).twitter_handle;
8990                let handle = handle.trim().trim_start_matches('@');
8991                (!handle.is_empty()).then(|| Target::Url(format!("https://x.com/{handle}")))
8992            }
8993            ScheduleSourceKind::OtherImageOcr => {
8994                let img = load_channel_cfg(&self.core.store, s.channel_id).other_image;
8995                let img = img.trim().to_string();
8996                if img.is_empty() {
8997                    None
8998                } else if img.starts_with("http://") || img.starts_with("https://") {
8999                    Some(Target::Url(img))
9000                } else {
9001                    Some(Target::Path(std::path::PathBuf::from(img)))
9002                }
9003            }
9004            ScheduleSourceKind::Discord => None,
9005        };
9006        match target {
9007            Some(Target::Url(url)) => ctx.open_url(egui::OpenUrl::new_tab(url)),
9008            Some(Target::Path(path)) => crate::platform::open_path(&path),
9009            None => self.status = "Couldn't resolve this item's source to open.".into(),
9010        }
9011    }
9012
9013    /// The "Edit schedule item" dialog (None = closed). Lets the user correct an
9014    /// occurrence's time/title/category or delete it; saving marks the row
9015    /// Rename-recording dialog: shows a text-edit for the new file stem, a live
9016    /// preview of the final filename, and OK / Cancel buttons.
9017    #[allow(deprecated)]
9018    fn rename_dialog_window(&mut self, ctx: &egui::Context) {
9019        if !self.show_rename_dialog {
9020            return;
9021        }
9022        let rec_id = match self.rename_rec_id {
9023            Some(id) => id,
9024            None => { self.show_rename_dialog = false; return; }
9025        };
9026
9027        let mut open = true;
9028        let mut do_rename = false;
9029        // These are local vars captured mutably by the closure.
9030        let mut new_draft = self.rename_draft.clone();
9031        let preview = self.rename_preview.clone();
9032
9033        ctx.show_viewport_immediate(
9034            egui::ViewportId::from_hash_of("rename_recording_vp"),
9035            egui::ViewportBuilder::default()
9036                .with_title("Rename recording")
9037                .with_inner_size([500.0, 160.0])
9038                .with_resizable(false),
9039            |ctx, _class| {
9040                if ctx.input(|i| i.viewport().close_requested()) {
9041                    open = false;
9042                }
9043                egui::CentralPanel::default().show(ctx, |ui| {
9044                    ui.add_space(8.0);
9045                    ui.label("New file name (without extension):");
9046                    ui.add_space(4.0);
9047                    ui.add(
9048                        egui::TextEdit::singleline(&mut new_draft)
9049                            .desired_width(ui.available_width())
9050                            .hint_text("new stem"),
9051                    );
9052                    ui.add_space(6.0);
9053                    ui.label(egui::RichText::new(format!("→ {preview}.mkv"))
9054                        .color(egui::Color32::from_rgb(0xa0, 0xa0, 0xa0)));
9055                    ui.add_space(8.0);
9056                    ui.horizontal(|ui| {
9057                        if ui.button("✔  OK").clicked() {
9058                            do_rename = true;
9059                        }
9060                        if ui.button("✖  Cancel").clicked() {
9061                            open = false;
9062                        }
9063                    });
9064                });
9065            },
9066        );
9067
9068        // Update draft and recompute preview outside the closure (borrow is released).
9069        if new_draft != self.rename_draft {
9070            self.rename_draft = new_draft.clone();
9071            self.rename_preview = crate::downloader::preview_filename(
9072                &new_draft,
9073                &crate::downloader::TemplateVars {
9074                    name: &new_draft, title: &new_draft, channel: "",
9075                    video_id: "", quality: "", resolution: "", height: "",
9076                    width: "", fps: "", vcodec: "", acodec: "",
9077                    take: "", games: "", tool: "", mode: "", platform: "",
9078                    secs: 0, went_live: 0,
9079                },
9080            );
9081        }
9082
9083        if do_rename {
9084            let stem = self.rename_preview.clone();
9085            self.core.manual(ManualCommand::RenameRecording { rec_id, new_stem: stem });
9086            self.show_rename_dialog = false;
9087            self.rename_rec_id = None;
9088        } else if !open {
9089            self.show_rename_dialog = false;
9090            self.rename_rec_id = None;
9091        }
9092    }
9093
9094    /// Dialog for naming and saving a custom filename-template preset.
9095    #[allow(deprecated)]
9096    fn save_preset_window(&mut self, ctx: &egui::Context) {
9097        if self.save_preset_dialog.is_none() {
9098            return;
9099        }
9100        let mut open = true;
9101        let mut do_save = false;
9102
9103        ctx.show_viewport_immediate(
9104            egui::ViewportId::from_hash_of("save_preset_vp"),
9105            egui::ViewportBuilder::default()
9106                .with_title("Save as preset")
9107                .with_inner_size([340.0, 120.0])
9108                .with_resizable(false),
9109            |ctx, _class| {
9110                if ctx.input(|i| i.viewport().close_requested()) {
9111                    open = false;
9112                }
9113                let Some(d) = self.save_preset_dialog.as_mut() else { return; };
9114                egui::CentralPanel::default().show(ctx, |ui| {
9115                    ui.label("Preset name:");
9116                    let resp = ui.add(
9117                        egui::TextEdit::singleline(&mut d.name)
9118                            .hint_text("e.g. My favourite format")
9119                            .desired_width(310.0),
9120                    );
9121                    if resp.lost_focus() && ctx.input(|i| i.key_pressed(egui::Key::Enter)) {
9122                        do_save = true;
9123                    }
9124                    if !d.error.is_empty() {
9125                        ui.colored_label(HL_ERROR_TEXT, &d.error);
9126                    }
9127                    ui.add_space(6.0);
9128                    ui.horizontal(|ui| {
9129                        let can_save = !d.name.trim().is_empty();
9130                        if ui.add_enabled(can_save, egui::Button::new("Save")).clicked() {
9131                            do_save = true;
9132                        }
9133                        if ui.button("Cancel").clicked() {
9134                            open = false;
9135                        }
9136                    });
9137                });
9138            },
9139        );
9140
9141        if do_save {
9142            if let Some(d) = self.save_preset_dialog.take() {
9143                let name = d.name.trim().to_string();
9144                match self.core.store.save_filename_preset(&name, &d.template) {
9145                    Ok(_) => {
9146                        self.custom_presets =
9147                            self.core.store.get_filename_presets().unwrap_or_default();
9148                        self.status = format!("Preset \"{name}\" saved.");
9149                    }
9150                    Err(e) => {
9151                        self.save_preset_dialog = Some(SavePresetDraft {
9152                            name: d.name,
9153                            template: d.template,
9154                            error: format!("Error saving: {e:#}"),
9155                        });
9156                    }
9157                }
9158            }
9159        } else if !open {
9160            self.save_preset_dialog = None;
9161        }
9162    }
9163
9164    /// Preview dialog for merging 2+ selected schedule events into one calendar entry.
9165    /// The user picks which event is the "primary" (its time/title/URL is shown);
9166    /// the others become hidden secondaries. The merge is stored in the DB via
9167    /// `merge_segments_manual`.
9168    #[allow(deprecated)]
9169    fn merge_preview_window(&mut self, ctx: &egui::Context) {
9170        if self.merge_preview.is_none() {
9171            return;
9172        }
9173        let mut open = true;
9174        let mut do_merge = false;
9175        let mut do_cancel = false;
9176
9177        ctx.show_viewport_immediate(
9178            egui::ViewportId::from_hash_of("merge_preview_vp"),
9179            egui::ViewportBuilder::default()
9180                .with_title("Merge schedule events")
9181                .with_inner_size([520.0, 380.0]),
9182            |ctx, _class| {
9183                if ctx.input(|i| i.viewport().close_requested()) {
9184                    open = false;
9185                }
9186                let Some(d) = self.merge_preview.as_mut() else {
9187                    return;
9188                };
9189                egui::CentralPanel::default().show(ctx, |ui| {
9190                    ui.label("Select which event is the primary. The primary's time, title and URL will be shown on the calendar; the others will be hidden as part of the group.");
9191                    ui.add_space(8.0);
9192
9193                    egui::ScrollArea::vertical().max_height(240.0).show(ui, |ui| {
9194                        for (i, s) in d.segments.iter().enumerate() {
9195                            let (src_badge, src_label) = source_badge(&s.source);
9196                            let is_primary = d.primary_idx == i;
9197                            ui.horizontal(|ui| {
9198                                ui.radio_value(&mut d.primary_idx, i, "");
9199                                ui.vertical(|ui| {
9200                                    ui.horizontal(|ui| {
9201                                        if is_primary {
9202                                            ui.strong("★ Primary");
9203                                        } else {
9204                                            ui.weak("Secondary");
9205                                        }
9206                                        ui.label(format!("· {src_badge} {src_label}"));
9207                                    });
9208                                    ui.label(format!(
9209                                        "{} – {}",
9210                                        fmt_datetime_short(s.start_time),
9211                                        s.end_time
9212                                            .map(|e| fmt_datetime_short(e))
9213                                            .unwrap_or_else(|| "?".into()),
9214                                    ));
9215                                    if !s.title.is_empty() {
9216                                        ui.label(format!("Title: {}", s.title));
9217                                    }
9218                                    if !s.category.is_empty() {
9219                                        ui.weak(format!("Category: {}", s.category));
9220                                    }
9221                                });
9222                            });
9223                            ui.separator();
9224                        }
9225                    });
9226
9227                    if !d.error.is_empty() {
9228                        ui.add_space(4.0);
9229                        ui.colored_label(HL_ERROR_TEXT, &d.error);
9230                    }
9231
9232                    ui.add_space(8.0);
9233                    ui.horizontal(|ui| {
9234                        if ui.button("🔀 Merge").clicked() {
9235                            do_merge = true;
9236                        }
9237                        if ui.button("Cancel").clicked() {
9238                            do_cancel = true;
9239                        }
9240                    });
9241                });
9242            },
9243        );
9244
9245        if do_merge {
9246            if let Some(d) = self.merge_preview.take() {
9247                let primary_id = d.segments[d.primary_idx].segment_id;
9248                let secondary_ids: Vec<i64> = d
9249                    .segments
9250                    .iter()
9251                    .enumerate()
9252                    .filter(|(i, _)| *i != d.primary_idx)
9253                    .map(|(_, s)| s.segment_id)
9254                    .collect();
9255                match self.core.store.merge_segments_manual(primary_id, &secondary_ids) {
9256                    Ok(()) => {
9257                        self.schedule_selected.clear();
9258                        self.spawn_reload_schedule();
9259                        self.status = format!(
9260                            "Merged {} events.",
9261                            secondary_ids.len() + 1
9262                        );
9263                    }
9264                    Err(e) => {
9265                        // Re-open the dialog with the error shown.
9266                        self.merge_preview = Some(MergePreviewDraft {
9267                            segments: d.segments,
9268                            primary_idx: d.primary_idx,
9269                            error: format!("Error merging: {e:#}"),
9270                        });
9271                    }
9272                }
9273            }
9274        } else if do_cancel || !open {
9275            self.merge_preview = None;
9276        }
9277    }
9278
9279    /// Confirmation dialog for deleting multiple selected schedule events at once.
9280    #[allow(deprecated)]
9281    fn confirm_delete_segments_window(&mut self, ctx: &egui::Context) {
9282        let Some(ids) = self.confirm_delete_segments.as_ref() else {
9283            return;
9284        };
9285        let count = ids.len();
9286        let mut open = true;
9287        let mut do_delete = false;
9288        let mut do_cancel = false;
9289
9290        ctx.show_viewport_immediate(
9291            egui::ViewportId::from_hash_of("del_segments_vp"),
9292            egui::ViewportBuilder::default()
9293                .with_title("Delete schedule items")
9294                .with_inner_size([400.0, 130.0])
9295                .with_resizable(false),
9296            |ctx, _class| {
9297                if ctx.input(|i| i.viewport().close_requested()) {
9298                    open = false;
9299                }
9300                egui::CentralPanel::default().show(ctx, |ui| {
9301                    ui.label(format!(
9302                        "Permanently delete {count} selected schedule item{}?",
9303                        if count == 1 { "" } else { "s" }
9304                    ));
9305                    ui.label("They will be suppressed and won't reappear on refresh.");
9306                    ui.add_space(8.0);
9307                    ui.horizontal(|ui| {
9308                        if ui
9309                            .button(egui::RichText::new("🗑 Delete").color(HL_ERROR_TEXT))
9310                            .clicked()
9311                        {
9312                            do_delete = true;
9313                        }
9314                        if ui.button("Cancel").clicked() {
9315                            do_cancel = true;
9316                        }
9317                    });
9318                });
9319            },
9320        );
9321
9322        if do_delete {
9323            if let Some(ids) = self.confirm_delete_segments.take() {
9324                let mut errors = 0usize;
9325                for sid in &ids {
9326                    match self.core.store.delete_schedule_segment(*sid) {
9327                        Ok(_) => {
9328                            self.schedule_hidden_segments.remove(sid);
9329                        }
9330                        Err(e) => {
9331                            warn!("Error deleting schedule segment {sid}: {e:#}");
9332                            errors += 1;
9333                        }
9334                    }
9335                }
9336                self.schedule_selected.clear();
9337                self.spawn_reload_schedule();
9338                if errors == 0 {
9339                    self.status = format!(
9340                        "Deleted {count} schedule item{}.",
9341                        if count == 1 { "" } else { "s" }
9342                    );
9343                } else {
9344                    self.status = format!(
9345                        "Deleted {} of {count} items; {errors} error(s) — check logs.",
9346                        count - errors
9347                    );
9348                }
9349            }
9350        } else if do_cancel || !open {
9351            self.confirm_delete_segments = None;
9352        }
9353    }
9354
9355    /// `"manual"` so a later automatic refresh leaves the correction intact.
9356    #[allow(deprecated)] // CentralPanel::show inside a viewport (matches the other dialogs)
9357    fn edit_schedule_window(&mut self, ctx: &egui::Context) {
9358        if self.edit_schedule.is_none() {
9359            return;
9360        }
9361        let mut open = true;
9362        // Actions collected inside the closure, applied after it (the closure
9363        // borrows the draft mutably; these touch the store / reload).
9364        let mut do_save = false;
9365        let mut do_delete = false;
9366        ctx.show_viewport_immediate(
9367            egui::ViewportId::from_hash_of("edit_schedule_vp"),
9368            egui::ViewportBuilder::default()
9369                .with_title("Edit schedule item")
9370                .with_inner_size([440.0, 320.0]),
9371            |ctx, _class| {
9372                if ctx.input(|i| i.viewport().close_requested()) {
9373                    open = false;
9374                }
9375                let Some(d) = self.edit_schedule.as_mut() else {
9376                    return;
9377                };
9378                egui::CentralPanel::default().show(ctx, |ui| {
9379                    let (badge, label) = source_badge(&d.source);
9380                    ui.horizontal(|ui| {
9381                        ui.strong(&d.channel_name);
9382                        ui.weak(format!("· source: {badge} {label}"));
9383                    });
9384                    ui.add_space(2.0);
9385                    ui.label(
9386                        egui::RichText::new(
9387                            "Times are in your local timezone. Saving marks this item as manually \
9388                             edited so automatic refreshes won't overwrite it.",
9389                        )
9390                        .small()
9391                        .weak(),
9392                    );
9393                    ui.add_space(8.0);
9394                    egui::Grid::new("edit_sched_grid")
9395                        .num_columns(2)
9396                        .spacing([12.0, 6.0])
9397                        .show(ui, |ui| {
9398                            ui.label("Title");
9399                            ui.add(
9400                                egui::TextEdit::singleline(&mut d.title).desired_width(300.0),
9401                            );
9402                            ui.end_row();
9403
9404                            ui.label("Category");
9405                            ui.add(
9406                                egui::TextEdit::singleline(&mut d.category)
9407                                    .hint_text("optional")
9408                                    .desired_width(300.0),
9409                            );
9410                            ui.end_row();
9411
9412                            ui.label("Start");
9413                            ui.horizontal(|ui| {
9414                                ui.add(
9415                                    egui::TextEdit::singleline(&mut d.date)
9416                                        .hint_text("YYYY-MM-DD")
9417                                        .desired_width(110.0),
9418                                );
9419                                ui.add(
9420                                    egui::TextEdit::singleline(&mut d.time)
9421                                        .hint_text("HH:MM")
9422                                        .desired_width(70.0),
9423                                );
9424                            });
9425                            ui.end_row();
9426
9427                            ui.label("End");
9428                            ui.horizontal(|ui| {
9429                                ui.add(
9430                                    egui::TextEdit::singleline(&mut d.end_date)
9431                                        .hint_text("YYYY-MM-DD")
9432                                        .desired_width(110.0),
9433                                );
9434                                ui.add(
9435                                    egui::TextEdit::singleline(&mut d.end_time)
9436                                        .hint_text("HH:MM")
9437                                        .desired_width(70.0),
9438                                );
9439                                ui.weak("(optional)");
9440                            });
9441                            ui.end_row();
9442                        });
9443
9444                    if !d.error.is_empty() {
9445                        ui.add_space(4.0);
9446                        ui.colored_label(HL_ERROR_TEXT, &d.error);
9447                    }
9448
9449                    ui.add_space(10.0);
9450                    ui.horizontal(|ui| {
9451                        if ui.button("💾  Save").clicked() {
9452                            do_save = true;
9453                        }
9454                        if ui.button("Cancel").clicked() {
9455                            open = false;
9456                        }
9457                        ui.add_space(16.0);
9458                        if ui
9459                            .button(egui::RichText::new("🗑  Delete").color(HL_ERROR_TEXT))
9460                            .on_hover_text("Remove this occurrence from the calendar.")
9461                            .clicked()
9462                        {
9463                            do_delete = true;
9464                        }
9465                    });
9466                });
9467            },
9468        );
9469
9470        if do_delete {
9471            if let Some(d) = self.edit_schedule.take() {
9472                match self.core.store.delete_schedule_segment(d.segment_id) {
9473                    Err(e) => self.status = format!("Error deleting item: {e}"),
9474                    Ok(0) => {
9475                        self.spawn_reload_schedule();
9476                        self.status = "Schedule item was already gone.".into();
9477                    }
9478                    Ok(_) => {
9479                        self.spawn_reload_schedule();
9480                        self.status = "Schedule item deleted.".into();
9481                    }
9482                }
9483            }
9484            return;
9485        }
9486
9487        if do_save {
9488            // Validate against the draft, writing the error back into it on failure
9489            // (so the dialog stays open and shows why).
9490            let parsed = self.edit_schedule.as_ref().and_then(|d| {
9491                let start = parse_local_datetime(&d.date, &d.time)?;
9492                // End is optional; when both fields are blank there's no end. When
9493                // partially filled or unparseable, treat as an error below. A start
9494                // before today's local midnight is rejected up front: the calendar
9495                // only loads start ≥ today, so saving a past time would silently
9496                // drop the row from every view despite a "success" message.
9497                let end = if start < today_start_unix() {
9498                    Err("Start must be today or later.")
9499                } else if d.end_date.trim().is_empty() && d.end_time.trim().is_empty() {
9500                    Ok(None)
9501                } else {
9502                    match parse_local_datetime(&d.end_date, &d.end_time) {
9503                        Some(e) if e > start => Ok(Some(e)),
9504                        Some(_) => Err("End must be after start."),
9505                        None => Err("End date/time is invalid."),
9506                    }
9507                };
9508                Some((d.segment_id, start, end, d.title.trim().to_string(), d.category.trim().to_string()))
9509            });
9510            match parsed {
9511                None => {
9512                    if let Some(d) = self.edit_schedule.as_mut() {
9513                        d.error = "Start date/time is invalid (use YYYY-MM-DD and HH:MM).".into();
9514                    }
9515                }
9516                Some((_, _, Err(msg), _, _)) => {
9517                    if let Some(d) = self.edit_schedule.as_mut() {
9518                        d.error = msg.into();
9519                    }
9520                }
9521                Some((id, start, Ok(end), title, category)) if !title.is_empty() => {
9522                    match self.core.store.update_schedule_segment_manual(
9523                        id, start, end, &title, &category,
9524                    ) {
9525                        Ok(0) => {
9526                            if let Some(d) = self.edit_schedule.as_mut() {
9527                                d.error =
9528                                    "This item no longer exists (a refresh may have cleared it).".into();
9529                            }
9530                        }
9531                        Ok(_) => {
9532                            self.edit_schedule = None;
9533                            self.spawn_reload_schedule();
9534                            self.status = "Schedule item updated (marked manual).".into();
9535                        }
9536                        Err(e) => {
9537                            if let Some(d) = self.edit_schedule.as_mut() {
9538                                d.error = format!("Error saving: {e}");
9539                            }
9540                        }
9541                    }
9542                }
9543                Some(_) => {
9544                    if let Some(d) = self.edit_schedule.as_mut() {
9545                        d.error = "Title can't be empty.".into();
9546                    }
9547                }
9548            }
9549        }
9550
9551        if !open {
9552            self.edit_schedule = None;
9553        }
9554    }
9555
9556    fn channels_view(&mut self, ui: &mut egui::Ui) {
9557        if self.channels.is_empty() {
9558            ui.add_space(24.0);
9559            ui.vertical_centered(|ui| {
9560                ui.label("No channels yet.");
9561                ui.label("Click “Add stream” to add a channel + its first instance, or “Add channel” for an empty container.");
9562            });
9563            return;
9564        }
9565
9566        // Self-mutating actions, collected during rendering and applied after the
9567        // table closure (which only borrows `self` immutably).
9568        let mut acts = RowActions::default();
9569        let mut toggle_channel: Option<i64> = None;
9570        let mut toggle_instance: Option<i64> = None;
9571        let mut toggle_stream: Option<String> = None;
9572        let mut open_path: Option<std::path::PathBuf> = None;
9573        let mut open_in_player: Option<StreamTarget> = None;
9574        let mut play_new_instance_mid: Option<i64> = None;
9575        let mut copy_text: Option<String> = None;
9576        let mut delete_recording: Option<i64> = None;
9577        let mut open_recording_props: Option<i64> = None;
9578        // Container-level actions.
9579        let mut toggle_channel_enabled: Option<(i64, bool)> = None; // set all instances
9580        let mut rename_channel: Option<i64> = None;
9581        let mut delete_channel: Option<(i64, String)> = None;
9582        let mut clear_channel_err: Option<i64> = None;
9583        let mut open_channel_props: Option<i64> = None;
9584
9585        let selected_monitor = self.selected_monitor;
9586        let now = crate::models::now_unix();
9587        let any_active = self
9588            .rows
9589            .iter()
9590            .any(|r| r.last_recording_status.as_deref() == Some("recording"));
9591
9592        // Build one entry per channel container (including empty ones), attaching
9593        // its instance rows (indices into self.rows).
9594        struct ChanEntry {
9595            channel: Channel,
9596            rows: Vec<usize>,
9597        }
9598        let mut rows_by_channel: HashMap<i64, Vec<usize>> = HashMap::new();
9599        for (i, row) in self.rows.iter().enumerate() {
9600            rows_by_channel.entry(row.channel.id).or_default().push(i);
9601        }
9602        let chan_entries: Vec<ChanEntry> = self
9603            .channels
9604            .iter()
9605            .map(|c| ChanEntry {
9606                channel: c.clone(),
9607                rows: rows_by_channel.get(&c.id).cloned().unwrap_or_default(),
9608            })
9609            .collect();
9610
9611        // Resolve each container's avatar (its chosen-platform profile pic) and its
9612        // name colour up front — both need `&mut self` (caches), so the read-only
9613        // table closure below can just look them up by channel id.
9614        let mut channel_avatars: HashMap<i64, egui::TextureHandle> = HashMap::new();
9615        // Per-container name colour as (base, adjust): `adjust` marks a fetched
9616        // Twitch broadcaster colour that should be made readable against the row's
9617        // *effective* background at render time (rows tint when recording/ad/error).
9618        // Manual + auto-palette colours are used as-is (already curated).
9619        let mut channel_name_colors: HashMap<i64, (egui::Color32, bool)> = HashMap::new();
9620        for e in &chan_entries {
9621            let cid = e.channel.id;
9622            let platforms = {
9623                let mons: Vec<&MonitorWithChannel> =
9624                    e.rows.iter().map(|&i| &self.rows[i]).collect();
9625                channel_platforms(&mons)
9626            };
9627            let tex = self
9628                .channel_icons_small
9629                .entry(cid)
9630                .or_insert_with(|| resolve_channel_icon_small(&e.channel, &platforms, ui.ctx()))
9631                .clone();
9632            if let Some(t) = tex {
9633                channel_avatars.insert(cid, t);
9634            }
9635            // Name colour: a manual custom colour wins; otherwise tint Twitch
9636            // channels with the streamer's own (cached) name colour; otherwise the
9637            // automatic palette.
9638            let name_color = if !e.channel.color.is_empty() {
9639                (channel_event_color(cid, &e.channel.color), false)
9640            } else if platforms.contains(&Platform::Twitch) {
9641                match *self
9642                    .channel_twitch_colors
9643                    .entry(cid)
9644                    .or_insert_with(|| load_twitch_name_color(&e.channel.name))
9645                {
9646                    Some(c) => (c, true), // raw broadcaster colour → readability at render
9647                    None => (channel_event_color(cid, ""), false),
9648                }
9649            } else {
9650                (channel_event_color(cid, ""), false)
9651            };
9652            channel_name_colors.insert(cid, name_color);
9653        }
9654
9655        // Lazily load + cache recordings for currently-expanded monitors, then
9656        // group each monitor's takes into streams.
9657        // A channel always shows its instances when expanded; an instance shows
9658        // its stream history when *it* is expanded — so we only need recordings
9659        // for expanded instances inside expanded channels.
9660        let mut expanded_monitors: Vec<i64> = Vec::new();
9661        for e in &chan_entries {
9662            if !self.expanded_channels.contains(&e.channel.id) {
9663                continue;
9664            }
9665            for &ri in &e.rows {
9666                let mid = self.rows[ri].monitor.id;
9667                if self.expanded_instances.contains(&mid) {
9668                    expanded_monitors.push(mid);
9669                }
9670            }
9671        }
9672        for &mid in &expanded_monitors {
9673            if !self.rec_cache.contains_key(&mid) {
9674                let recs = self
9675                    .core
9676                    .store
9677                    .recordings_for_monitor(mid)
9678                    .unwrap_or_default();
9679                self.rec_cache.insert(mid, recs);
9680            }
9681        }
9682        let groups: HashMap<i64, Vec<StreamGroup>> = expanded_monitors
9683            .iter()
9684            .map(|&mid| {
9685                let recs = self.rec_cache.get(&mid).map(Vec::as_slice).unwrap_or(&[]);
9686                (mid, group_recordings(recs))
9687            })
9688            .collect();
9689
9690        // Per-recording ad-break detail (offsets) for the cut-list tooltips on
9691        // expanded history rows. Cached (cleared on reload) so we issue the SELECT
9692        // once per take with ads, not every frame; bounded by what's expanded.
9693        for &mid in &expanded_monitors {
9694            let need: Vec<i64> = match self.rec_cache.get(&mid) {
9695                Some(recs) => recs
9696                    .iter()
9697                    .filter(|r| r.ad_count > 0 && !self.ad_break_cache.contains_key(&r.id))
9698                    .map(|r| r.id)
9699                    .collect(),
9700                None => Vec::new(),
9701            };
9702            for rid in need {
9703                let v = self
9704                    .core
9705                    .store
9706                    .ad_breaks_for_recording(rid)
9707                    .unwrap_or_default();
9708                self.ad_break_cache.insert(rid, v);
9709            }
9710        }
9711        let ad_breaks = &self.ad_break_cache;
9712        // Same lazy caching for per-recording title/category change logs.
9713        for &mid in &expanded_monitors {
9714            let need: Vec<i64> = match self.rec_cache.get(&mid) {
9715                Some(recs) => recs
9716                    .iter()
9717                    .filter(|r| {
9718                        r.meta_change_count > 0 && !self.meta_change_cache.contains_key(&r.id)
9719                    })
9720                    .map(|r| r.id)
9721                    .collect(),
9722                None => Vec::new(),
9723            };
9724            for rid in need {
9725                let v = self
9726                    .core
9727                    .store
9728                    .meta_changes_for_recording(rid)
9729                    .unwrap_or_default();
9730                self.meta_change_cache.insert(rid, v);
9731            }
9732        }
9733        let meta_logs = &self.meta_change_cache;
9734        // Collected in the table closure (which borrows `self` immutably), applied
9735        // afterwards: a double-click on an ad / changes cell opens that take's popup.
9736        let mut open_ad_popup: Option<i64> = None;
9737        let mut open_meta_popup: Option<MetaPopup> = None;
9738        let mut open_schedule_popup: Option<i64> = None;
9739
9740        // Snapshot expansion state for read-only use inside the table closure.
9741        let exp_channels = self.expanded_channels.clone();
9742        let exp_instances = self.expanded_instances.clone();
9743        let exp_streams = self.expanded_streams.clone();
9744        // Snapshot which monitors currently have an ad playing (for the row tint).
9745        let ad_active = self.core.ad_active.lock().unwrap().clone();
9746        let ad_running = |mid: i64| ad_active.get(&mid).is_some_and(|&end| now < end);
9747
9748        // Channel-level sort/filter model (one entry per top-level channel row).
9749        let model: Vec<Vec<Cell>> = chan_entries
9750            .iter()
9751            .map(|e| {
9752                let mons: Vec<&MonitorWithChannel> =
9753                    e.rows.iter().map(|&i| &self.rows[i]).collect();
9754                channel_cells(&e.channel, &mons, now)
9755            })
9756            .collect();
9757        let mut sort = self.streams_sort;
9758        let mut filters = self.streams_filters.clone();
9759        if filters.len() != STREAM_COLS {
9760            filters = vec![String::new(); STREAM_COLS];
9761        }
9762        // Whether status row tints are drawn (top-bar "Status bgcolor" toggle).
9763        let status_bgcolor = self.status_bgcolor;
9764        // Whether the Actions column is shown (Settings → Display). When off it's
9765        // skipped in the builder, header, and every renderer so the counts match.
9766        let show_actions = self.show_actions;
9767        // Snapshot before the table closure so we can read it inside (which only
9768        // has an immutable borrow of self) and clear it afterwards.
9769        let scroll_to_cid = self.scroll_to_channel;
9770
9771        // Fill the available height so the horizontal scrollbar sits at the
9772        // bottom of the window rather than directly under the (short) row list.
9773        egui::ScrollArea::both()
9774            .auto_shrink([false, false])
9775            .show(ui, |ui| {
9776                // Labels are selectable by default, which makes them sense clicks
9777                // (for text selection) and swallow right-clicks over their text —
9778                // breaking the row context menu. Turn it off for the table so the
9779                // row's click sense wins (the menu offers "Copy URL" instead).
9780                ui.style_mut().interaction.selectable_labels = false;
9781                // Theme accent used for recording/selected rows; ad/error states
9782                // override the per-row selection color before each row.
9783                let sel_color = ui.visuals().selection.bg_fill;
9784                // Platform favicons, uploaded once and cheaply cloned per frame.
9785                let ptex = self
9786                    .platform_tex
9787                    .get_or_insert_with(|| PlatformTextures::load(ui.ctx()))
9788                    .clone();
9789                let reset_cols = std::mem::replace(&mut self.reset_streams_columns, false);
9790                let mut tb = TableBuilder::new(ui)
9791                    .id_salt("streams_table")
9792                    .striped(true)
9793                    .resizable(true)
9794                    // Make rows sense clicks so they can be selected and carry a
9795                    // right-click context menu.
9796                    .sense(egui::Sense::click())
9797                    .cell_layout(egui::Layout::left_to_right(egui::Align::Center));
9798                if reset_cols {
9799                    // Clear persisted column widths so the next load() triggers a
9800                    // fresh sizing pass at the columns' initial widths.
9801                    tb.reset();
9802                }
9803                // One column per descriptor — count is guaranteed to match the
9804                // header and the per-row cells (all driven by STREAM_COLUMNS). The
9805                // Actions column is skipped (here, in the header, and in every
9806                // renderer) when hidden, so the counts still match.
9807                for (i, c) in STREAM_COLUMNS.iter().enumerate() {
9808                    if !show_actions && i == STREAM_ACTIONS_COL {
9809                        continue;
9810                    }
9811                    let col = if reset_cols {
9812                        // Drive a clean sizing pass: auto_with_initial_suggestion
9813                        // seeds the column at min_width (not 0) so cells render
9814                        // normally during the pass — no zero-width wrapping, no
9815                        // vertical row bounce. After the pass, content widths are
9816                        // stored and the next frame snaps to them.
9817                        Column::auto_with_initial_suggestion(c.min_width)
9818                            .at_least(c.min_width)
9819                            .clip(c.initial > 0.0)
9820                    } else if c.initial > 0.0 {
9821                        // Content-capped column (Title / Game): start narrow and
9822                        // clip — the cell truncates and shows the full text on hover.
9823                        Column::initial(c.initial).at_least(c.min_width).clip(true)
9824                    } else {
9825                        Column::auto().at_least(c.min_width)
9826                    };
9827                    tb = tb.column(col);
9828                }
9829                let table = tb.header(46.0, |mut header| {
9830                    for (i, c) in STREAM_COLUMNS.iter().enumerate() {
9831                        if !show_actions && i == STREAM_ACTIONS_COL {
9832                            continue;
9833                        }
9834                        header.col(|ui| {
9835                            if c.sortable {
9836                                sort_filter_header(
9837                                    ui, i, c.title, c.tooltip, true, &mut sort, &mut filters[i],
9838                                );
9839                            } else {
9840                                ui.strong(c.title).on_hover_text(c.tooltip);
9841                            }
9842                        });
9843                    }
9844                });
9845                table.body(|mut body| {
9846                    let order = ordered_rows(&model, &sort, &filters);
9847
9848                    // Flatten the channel -> (instance) -> stream -> take tree into
9849                    // the rows currently visible (respecting expansion state).
9850                    #[derive(Clone, Copy)]
9851                    enum Vis {
9852                        Channel(usize),
9853                        Instance { row: usize, depth: usize },
9854                        Stream { mid: i64, gi: usize, depth: usize },
9855                        Take { mid: i64, gi: usize, ti: usize, depth: usize },
9856                    }
9857                    let mut vis: Vec<Vis> = Vec::new();
9858                    for &ci in &order {
9859                        let e = &chan_entries[ci];
9860                        vis.push(Vis::Channel(ci));
9861                        if !exp_channels.contains(&e.channel.id) {
9862                            continue;
9863                        }
9864                        // Channel container -> its instances -> each instance's
9865                        // stream history -> takes.
9866                        for &ri in &e.rows {
9867                            let mid = self.rows[ri].monitor.id;
9868                            vis.push(Vis::Instance { row: ri, depth: 1 });
9869                            if !exp_instances.contains(&mid) {
9870                                continue;
9871                            }
9872                            if let Some(grps) = groups.get(&mid) {
9873                                for (gi, g) in grps.iter().enumerate() {
