9874                                    vis.push(Vis::Stream { mid, gi, depth: 2 });
9875                                    if g.takes.len() > 1 && exp_streams.contains(&g.key) {
9876                                        for ti in 0..g.takes.len() {
9877                                            vis.push(Vis::Take { mid, gi, ti, depth: 3 });
9878                                        }
9879                                    }
9880                                }
9881                            }
9882                        }
9883                    }
9884
9885                    for v in &vis {
9886                        match *v {
9887                            Vis::Channel(ci) => {
9888                                let e = &chan_entries[ci];
9889                                let ch = &e.channel;
9890                                let cid = ch.id;
9891                                let mons: Vec<&MonitorWithChannel> =
9892                                    e.rows.iter().map(|&ri| &self.rows[ri]).collect();
9893                                let ninst = mons.len();
9894                                let any_rec = mons.iter().any(|m| {
9895                                    self.core.active.lock().unwrap().contains_key(&m.monitor.id)
9896                                });
9897                                let expanded = exp_channels.contains(&cid);
9898                                let platforms = channel_platforms(&mons);
9899                                let last_poll = mons
9900                                    .iter()
9901                                    .filter_map(|m| m.monitor.last_checked_at)
9902                                    .max()
9903                                    .unwrap_or(0);
9904                                // Latest activity across instances drives the time columns.
9905                                let primary = channel_primary(&mons);
9906                                let rec = primary.map(|m| recording_cells(m, now));
9907                                let ads = primary.map(|m| {
9908                                    (m.last_recording_ad_count, m.last_recording_ad_secs)
9909                                });
9910                                let meta_changes =
9911                                    primary.map(|m| m.last_recording_meta_changes);
9912                                let cur_category = primary
9913                                    .filter(|m| m.last_recording_status.as_deref() == Some("recording"))
9914                                    .map(|m| m.last_recording_category.clone())
9915                                    .unwrap_or_default();
9916                                let cur_title = primary
9917                                    .filter(|m| m.last_recording_status.as_deref() == Some("recording"))
9918                                    .map(|m| m.last_recording_title.clone())
9919                                    .unwrap_or_default();
9920                                // The channel's next stream = the SOONEST upcoming
9921                                // across its instances (the past-recording primary
9922                                // may be a different platform with no schedule).
9923                                let next_mon = mons
9924                                    .iter()
9925                                    .filter(|m| m.next_stream_at.is_some())
9926                                    .min_by_key(|m| m.next_stream_at.unwrap());
9927                                let next_stream_at = next_mon.and_then(|m| m.next_stream_at);
9928                                let next_stream_title = next_mon
9929                                    .map(|m| m.next_stream_title.clone())
9930                                    .unwrap_or_default();
9931                                let next_stream_mid = next_mon.map(|m| m.monitor.id);
9932                                let ad_free =
9933                                    ad_free_summary(channel_ad_free_count(&mons), ninst);
9934                                // Tint the container row by the rolled-up state of
9935                                // its instances (ad playing / recording / errored).
9936                                let any_ad = mons.iter().any(|m| ad_running(m.monitor.id));
9937                                let any_err = mons.iter().copied().any(monitor_errored);
9938                                let tint =
9939                                    row_tint(any_rec, any_ad, any_err, false, sel_color, status_bgcolor);
9940                                if let Some(c) = tint {
9941                                    body.ui_mut().visuals_mut().selection.bg_fill = c;
9942                                }
9943                                body.row(24.0, |mut tr| {
9944                                    tr.set_selected(tint.is_some());
9945                                    let mut disc = false;
9946                                    tr.col(|ui| {
9947                                        // Scroll the new channel into view on the
9948                                        // first render after a save.
9949                                        if scroll_to_cid == Some(cid) {
9950                                            ui.scroll_to_cursor(Some(egui::Align::Center));
9951                                        }
9952                                        let mut on = ch.enabled;
9953                                        let cb = ui
9954                                            .add_enabled(ninst > 0, egui::Checkbox::new(&mut on, ""))
9955                                            .on_hover_text("Enable/disable this channel. Independent from each instance's own toggle.");
9956                                        if cb.changed() {
9957                                            toggle_channel_enabled = Some((cid, on));
9958                                        }
9959                                    });
9960                                    if show_actions {
9961                                        tr.col(|ui| {
9962                                            ui.push_id(cid, |ui| {
9963                                                if ui
9964                                                    .small_button("➕")
9965                                                    .on_hover_text("Add an instance to this channel")
9966                                                    .clicked()
9967                                                {
9968                                                    acts.add_instance = Some(cid);
9969                                                }
9970                                                if ui
9971                                                    .small_button("✏")
9972                                                    .on_hover_text("Rename channel")
9973                                                    .clicked()
9974                                                {
9975                                                    rename_channel = Some(cid);
9976                                                }
9977                                                if ui
9978                                                    .small_button("🗑")
9979                                                    .on_hover_text("Delete channel and all its instances")
9980                                                    .clicked()
9981                                                {
9982                                                    delete_channel = Some((cid, ch.name.clone()));
9983                                                }
9984                                            });
9985                                        });
9986                                    }
9987                                    tr.col(|ui| {
9988                                        platform_icons(ui, &ptex, &platforms);
9989                                    });
9990                                    tr.col(|ui| {
9991                                        // Disclosure triangle, then the chosen-platform
9992                                        // avatar, then the channel name.
9993                                        let mut clicked = false;
9994                                        if ninst > 0 {
9995                                            let tri = if expanded { "▼" } else { "▶" };
9996                                            if ui
9997                                                .add(egui::Button::new(tri).small().frame(false))
9998                                                .on_hover_text("Expand / collapse")
9999                                                .clicked()
10000                                            {
10001                                                clicked = true;
10002                                            }
10003                                        } else {
10004                                            ui.add_space(16.0);
10005                                        }
10006                                        if let Some(tex) = channel_avatars.get(&cid) {
10007                                            let resp = ui.add(
10008                                                egui::Image::from_texture(tex)
10009                                                    .fit_to_exact_size(egui::vec2(18.0, 18.0))
10010                                                    .corner_radius(egui::CornerRadius::same(3)),
10011                                            );
10012                                            queue_alt_image_preview(ui.ctx(), &resp, tex);
10013                                            ui.add_space(3.0);
10014                                        }
10015                                        let (base, adjust) = channel_name_colors
10016                                            .get(&cid)
10017                                            .copied()
10018                                            .unwrap_or_else(|| {
10019                                                (channel_event_color(cid, &ch.color), false)
10020                                            });
10021                                        // Make a fetched Twitch colour readable
10022                                        // against the row's actual background (the
10023                                        // tint when highlighted, else the panel).
10024                                        let name_color = if adjust {
10025                                            let bg =
10026                                                tint.unwrap_or_else(|| ui.visuals().panel_fill);
10027                                            readable_color(base, bg)
10028                                        } else {
10029                                            base
10030                                        };
10031                                        ui.label(
10032                                            egui::RichText::new(&ch.name)
10033                                                .strong()
10034                                                .color(name_color),
10035                                        );
10036                                        disc = clicked;
10037                                    });
10038                                    tr.col(|ui| {
10039                                        ui.weak(ninst.to_string());
10040                                    });
10041                                    tr.col(|_ui| {}); // detection
10042                                    tr.col(|ui| {
10043                                        ts_label(ui, last_poll);
10044                                    });
10045                                    tr.col(|ui| {
10046                                        if any_rec {
10047                                            let (icon, color) = state_icon("recording");
10048                                            ui.colored_label(color, icon).on_hover_text("recording");
10049                                        } else if let Some(p) = primary {
10050                                            if p.last_recording_status.as_deref() == Some("failed") {
10051                                                let (icon, color) = state_icon("failed");
10052                                                ui.colored_label(color, icon)
10053                                                    .on_hover_text(fail_hover(&p.last_recording_log));
10054                                            }
10055                                        }
10056                                        let chan_needs_remux: usize = e.rows.iter()
10057                                            .filter_map(|&ri| groups.get(&self.rows[ri].monitor.id))
10058                                            .flat_map(|gs| gs.iter())
10059                                            .flat_map(|g| g.takes.iter())
10060                                            .filter(|t| {
10061                                                t.output_path.ends_with(".ts")
10062                                                    && t.output_path.contains(".cache")
10063                                            })
10064                                            .count();
10065                                        if chan_needs_remux > 0 {
10066                                            let lbl = if chan_needs_remux == 1 {
10067                                                "⚠ needs remux".to_string()
10068                                            } else {
10069                                                format!("⚠ {} need remux", chan_needs_remux)
10070                                            };
10071                                            let tip = if chan_needs_remux == 1 {
10072                                                "1 recording is stuck as .ts — expand to find it.".to_string()
10073                                            } else {
10074                                                format!("{} recordings are stuck as .ts — expand to find them.", chan_needs_remux)
10075                                            };
10076                                            ui.colored_label(egui::Color32::from_rgb(220, 140, 30), lbl)
10077                                                .on_hover_text(tip);
10078                                        }
10079                                    });
10080                                    tr.col(|ui| {
10081                                        if next_stream_cell(ui, next_stream_at, &next_stream_title, true) {
10082                                            open_schedule_popup = next_stream_mid;
10083                                        }
10084                                    });
10085                                    tr.col(|ui| {
10086                                        meta_value_cell(ui, &cur_category);
10087                                    });
10088                                    tr.col(|ui| {
10089                                        meta_value_cell(ui, &cur_title);
10090                                    });
10091                                    // ✏ Changes (index 11)
10092                                    tr.col(|ui| {
10093                                        if let Some(c) = meta_changes {
10094                                            meta_cell(ui, c, None, false);
10095                                        }
10096                                    });
10097                                    // 📢 Ads combined (index 12)
10098                                    tr.col(|ui| {
10099                                        if let Some((c, s)) = ads {
10100                                            combined_ads_cell(ui, c, s, None, None);
10101                                        }
10102                                    });
10103                                    // Went Live (index 13)
10104                                    tr.col(|ui| {
10105                                        if let Some(r) = &rec {
10106                                            ts_went_live_label(ui, r.went_live_secs, r.went_live_approx);
10107                                        }
10108                                    });
10109                                    // Started On (index 14)
10110                                    tr.col(|ui| {
10111                                        if let Some(r) = &rec {
10112                                            ts_label(ui, r.started_secs);
10113                                        }
10114                                    });
10115                                    tr.col(|ui| {
10116                                        if let Some(r) = &rec {
10117                                            ui.label(&r.lost);
10118                                        }
10119                                    });
10120                                    tr.col(|ui| {
10121                                        if let Some(r) = &rec {
10122                                            ui.label(&r.duration);
10123                                        }
10124                                    });
10125                                    tr.col(|ui| {
10126                                        if !ad_free.0.is_empty() {
10127                                            ui.colored_label(SUCCESS_GREEN, ad_free.0);
10128                                        }
10129                                    });
10130                                    tr.col(|ui| {
10131                                        ui.label(fmt_date(ch.created_at));
10132                                    });
10133                                    tr.response().context_menu(|ui| {
10134                                        ui.set_min_width(170.0);
10135                                        if ui.button("➕  Add instance").clicked() {
10136                                            acts.add_instance = Some(cid);
10137                                            ui.close();
10138                                        }
10139                                        if ui.button("✏  Rename channel").clicked() {
10140                                            rename_channel = Some(cid);
10141                                            ui.close();
10142                                        }
10143                                        if any_err {
10144                                            ui.separator();
10145                                            if ui.button("✖  Clear error").clicked() {
10146                                                clear_channel_err = Some(cid);
10147                                                ui.close();
10148                                            }
10149                                        }
10150                                        ui.separator();
10151                                        if ui.button("📁  Re-organize all recordings").on_hover_text("Move all recordings for this channel into/out of subdirectories.").clicked() {
10152                                            acts.reorganize_channel = Some(cid);
10153                                            ui.close();
10154                                        }
10155                                        ui.separator();
10156                                        if ui.button("🗑  Delete channel").clicked() {
10157                                            delete_channel = Some((cid, ch.name.clone()));
10158                                            ui.close();
10159                                        }
10160                                        ui.separator();
10161                                        if ui.button("ℹ  Properties").clicked() {
10162                                            open_channel_props = Some(cid);
10163                                            ui.close();
10164                                        }
10165                                    });
10166                                    if disc {
10167                                        toggle_channel = Some(cid);
10168                                    }
10169                                });
10170                            }
10171                            Vis::Instance { row: ri, depth } => {
10172                                let row = &self.rows[ri];
10173                                let mid = row.monitor.id;
10174                                let recording = self
10175                                    .core
10176                                    .active
10177                                    .lock()
10178                                    .unwrap()
10179                                    .contains_key(&mid);
10180                                let chat_active = self
10181                                    .core
10182                                    .active_chats
10183                                    .lock()
10184                                    .unwrap()
10185                                    .contains_key(&mid);
10186                                let is_selected = selected_monitor == Some(mid);
10187                                let has_hist = row.recording_count > 0;
10188                                let expanded = exp_instances.contains(&mid);
10189                                // Tint by state: ad playing / recording / errored /
10190                                // keyboard-selected.
10191                                let tint = row_tint(
10192                                    recording,
10193                                    ad_running(mid),
10194                                    monitor_errored(row),
10195                                    is_selected,
10196                                    sel_color,
10197                                    status_bgcolor,
10198                                );
10199                                if let Some(c) = tint {
10200                                    body.ui_mut().visuals_mut().selection.bg_fill = c;
10201                                }
10202                                let inst_needs_remux = groups.get(&mid)
10203                                    .map(|gs| {
10204                                        gs.iter()
10205                                            .flat_map(|g| g.takes.iter())
10206                                            .filter(|t| {
10207                                                t.output_path.ends_with(".ts")
10208                                                    && t.output_path.contains(".cache")
10209                                            })
10210                                            .count()
10211                                    })
10212                                    .unwrap_or(0);
10213                                let media_player = self.settings.media_player_path.trim().to_string();
10214                                // Best target to open in the media player for this monitor:
10215                                // prefer an active take's live capture the configured player
10216                                // can actually play (a dual-capture monitor falls through to
10217                                // the DASH companion under non-mpv players); fall back to the
10218                                // most recent finished recording's output file.
10219                                let inst_stream_target: Option<StreamTarget> =
10220                                    groups.get(&mid).and_then(|gs| {
10221                                        // Active takes first: prefer a target the
10222                                        // configured player can play (dual capture falls
10223                                        // through to the DASH companion under non-mpv
10224                                        // players); with nothing playable, keep an
10225                                        // unplayable one so the button can explain itself.
10226                                        let active: Vec<StreamTarget> = gs
10227                                            .iter()
10228                                            .flat_map(|g| g.takes.iter())
10229                                            .filter(|t| t.is_active())
10230                                            .filter_map(|t| stream_target_for_active(&t.output_path))
10231                                            .collect();
10232                                        if let Some(t) = active
10233                                            .iter()
10234                                            .find(|t| playable_with(t, &media_player))
10235                                            .or_else(|| active.first())
10236                                        {
10237                                            return Some(t.clone());
10238                                        }
10239                                        // Most recent finished take.
10240                                        for g in gs {
10241                                            for t in &g.takes {
10242                                                if !t.output_path.is_empty()
10243                                                    && std::path::Path::new(&t.output_path).is_file()
10244                                                {
10245                                                    return Some(StreamTarget::Finished(
10246                                                        std::path::PathBuf::from(&t.output_path),
10247                                                    ));
10248                                                }
10249                                            }
10250                                        }
10251                                        None
10252                                    });
10253                                body.row(24.0, |mut tr| {
10254                                    if render_instance_row(
10255                                        &mut tr, row, &ptex, now, recording, chat_active,
10256                                        tint.is_some(), depth, has_hist, expanded,
10257                                        show_actions, inst_needs_remux,
10258                                        inst_stream_target.as_ref(), &media_player,
10259                                        &mut acts,
10260                                    ) {
10261                                        toggle_instance = Some(mid);
10262                                    }
10263                                });
10264                            }
10265                            Vis::Stream { mid, gi, depth } => {
10266                                let g = &groups[&mid][gi];
10267                                let has_takes = g.takes.len() > 1;
10268                                let expanded = exp_streams.contains(&g.key);
10269                                let when = fmt_went_live(g.went_live_at, g.went_live_approx);
10270                                let ts_fn = |s| if short_ts_on() { fmt_datetime_compact(s) } else { fmt_datetime_short(s) };
10271                                let label = if when.is_empty() {
10272                                    format!("🎬 {}", ts_fn(g.started_at()))
10273                                } else if short_ts_on() {
10274                                    // Compact went-live with ~ prefix
10275                                    let approx = g.went_live_approx;
10276                                    let s = fmt_datetime_compact(g.went_live_at.unwrap_or(0));
10277                                    format!("🎬 {}{s}", if approx { "~" } else { "" })
10278                                } else {
10279                                    format!("🎬 {when}")
10280                                };
10281                                let span = (g.ended_at().unwrap_or(now) - g.started_at()).max(0);
10282                                let dir = g
10283                                    .takes
10284                                    .iter()
10285                                    .find(|t| !t.output_path.is_empty())
10286                                    .and_then(|t| {
10287                                        std::path::Path::new(&t.output_path)
10288                                            .parent()
10289                                            .map(|p| p.to_path_buf())
10290                                    });
10291                                // A single-take stream maps to one file (offer it in
10292                                // the context menu); multi-take streams don't.
10293                                let single_file = (g.takes.len() == 1
10294                                    && !g.takes[0].output_path.is_empty())
10295                                .then(|| g.takes[0].output_path.clone());
10296                                let ad_count = g.ad_count();
10297                                let ad_secs = g.ad_secs();
10298                                // A single-take stream carries the cut detail on its
10299                                // one take; multi-take streams show per-take cuts when
10300                                // expanded.
10301                                let ad_rec =
10302                                    if g.takes.len() == 1 { Some(g.takes[0].id) } else { None };
10303                                let meta_count = g.meta_change_count();
10304                                // Same rule as ads: a single-take stream carries its
10305                                // detail directly; multi-take shows per-take on expand.
10306                                let meta_rec =
10307                                    if g.takes.len() == 1 { Some(g.takes[0].id) } else { None };
10308                                let media_player = self.settings.media_player_path.trim().to_string();
10309                                // Best target for this stream group: an active capture the
10310                                // configured player can play first (dual capture: the SABR
10311                                // primary under mpv, else the DASH companion's .ts; with
10312                                // nothing playable an unplayable target is kept so the
10313                                // button can explain itself), then any existing output
10314                                // file across the takes.
10315                                let grp_stream_target: Option<StreamTarget> = {
10316                                    let active: Vec<StreamTarget> = g.takes.iter()
10317                                        .filter(|t| t.is_active())
10318                                        .filter_map(|t| stream_target_for_active(&t.output_path))
10319                                        .collect();
10320                                    active
10321                                        .iter()
10322                                        .find(|t| playable_with(t, &media_player))
10323                                        .or_else(|| active.first())
10324                                        .cloned()
10325                                        .or_else(|| {
10326                                            g.takes.iter()
10327                                                .find(|t| {
10328                                                    !t.output_path.is_empty()
10329                                                        && std::path::Path::new(&t.output_path).is_file()
10330                                                })
10331                                                .map(|t| StreamTarget::Finished(
10332                                                    std::path::PathBuf::from(&t.output_path),
10333                                                ))
10334                                        })
10335                                };
10336                                body.row(24.0, |mut tr| {
10337                                    let mut disc = false;
10338                                    tr.col(|_ui| {}); // on
10339                                    if show_actions {
10340                                        tr.col(|ui| {
10341                                            let ok =
10342                                                dir.as_ref().map(|d| d.is_dir()).unwrap_or(false);
10343                                            if ui
10344                                                .add_enabled(ok, egui::Button::new("📂").small())
10345                                                .on_hover_text("Open folder")
10346                                                .clicked()
10347                                            {
10348                                                open_path = dir.clone();
10349                                            }
10350                                            let player_ok = !media_player.is_empty()
10351                                                && grp_stream_target
10352                                                    .as_ref()
10353                                                    .map(|t| playable_with(t, &media_player))
10354                                                    .unwrap_or(false);
10355                                            if ui
10356                                                .add_enabled(
10357                                                    player_ok,
10358                                                    egui::Button::new("⏵").small(),
10359                                                )
10360                                                .on_hover_text(if g.status() == "recording" {
10361                                                    "Stream in player"
10362                                                } else {
10363                                                    "Open in player"
10364                                                })
10365                                                .on_disabled_hover_text(if media_player.is_empty() {
10366                                                    "Set a media player in Settings → Defaults first"
10367                                                } else if grp_stream_target.is_some() {
10368                                                    "In-progress SABR capture needs mpv (separate audio/video files)"
10369                                                } else {
10370                                                    "No playable capture file found"
10371                                                })
10372                                                .clicked()
10373                                            {
10374                                                open_in_player = grp_stream_target.clone();
10375                                            }
10376                                            if ui
10377                                                .add_enabled(
10378                                                    !media_player.is_empty(),
10379                                                    egui::Button::new("▷").small(),
10380                                                )
10381                                                .on_hover_text("Play new instance in media player at the live edge (does not record)")
10382                                                .on_disabled_hover_text("Set a media player in Settings → Defaults first")
10383                                                .clicked()
10384                                            {
10385                                                play_new_instance_mid = Some(mid);
10386                                            }
10387                                        });
10388                                    }
10389                                    tr.col(|_ui| {}); // platform
10390                                    tr.col(|ui| {
10391                                        disc = tree_name(
10392                                            ui, depth, has_takes, expanded,
10393                                            egui::RichText::new(label.clone()),
10394                                        );
10395                                        if has_takes {
10396                                            ui.weak(format!("· {} takes", g.takes.len()));
10397                                        }
10398                                    });
10399                                    tr.col(|_ui| {}); // tool
10400                                    tr.col(|_ui| {}); // detection
10401                                    tr.col(|_ui| {}); // polled
10402                                    tr.col(|ui| {
10403                                        let (icon, color) = state_icon(g.status());
10404                                        let resp = ui.colored_label(color, icon);
10405                                        if g.status() == "failed" {
10406                                            let log = g
10407                                                .takes
10408                                                .last()
10409                                                .map(|t| t.log_excerpt.as_str())
10410                                                .unwrap_or("");
10411                                            resp.on_hover_text(fail_hover(log));
10412                                        } else {
10413                                            resp.on_hover_text(g.status());
10414                                        }
10415                                        let nr = g.takes.iter().filter(|t| {
10416                                            t.output_path.ends_with(".ts")
10417                                                && t.output_path.contains(".cache")
10418                                        }).count();
10419                                        if nr > 0 {
10420                                            let lbl = if nr == 1 {
10421                                                "⚠ needs remux".to_string()
10422                                            } else {
10423                                                format!("⚠ {} need remux", nr)
10424                                            };
10425                                            ui.colored_label(egui::Color32::from_rgb(220, 140, 30), lbl)
10426                                                .on_hover_text("Right-click → Re-remux to MKV.");
10427                                        }
10428                                    });
10429                                    tr.col(|_ui| {}); // next stream (n/a per stream)
10430                                    tr.col(|ui| {
10431                                        meta_value_cell(ui, g.category());
10432                                    });
10433                                    tr.col(|ui| {
10434                                        meta_value_cell(ui, g.title());
10435                                    });
10436                                    // ✏ Changes (index 11)
10437                                    tr.col(|ui| {
10438                                        let det = meta_rec.and_then(|id| meta_logs.get(&id));
10439                                        if meta_cell(ui, meta_count, det, true) {
10440                                            open_meta_popup = Some(MetaPopup::Stream(
10441                                                g.takes.iter().map(|t| (t.id, t.started_at)).collect(),
10442                                            ));
10443                                        }
10444                                    });
10445                                    // 📢 Ads combined (index 12)
10446                                    tr.col(|ui| {
10447                                        let det = ad_rec.and_then(|id| ad_breaks.get(&id));
10448                                        if let Some(r) = combined_ads_cell(
10449                                            ui, ad_count, ad_secs, det, ad_rec,
10450                                        ) {
10451                                            open_ad_popup = Some(r);
10452                                        }
10453                                    });
10454                                    // Went Live (index 13)
10455                                    tr.col(|ui| {
10456                                        ts_went_live_label(ui, g.went_live_at.unwrap_or(0), g.went_live_approx);
10457                                    });
10458                                    // Started On (index 14)
10459                                    tr.col(|ui| {
10460                                        ts_label(ui, g.started_at());
10461                                    });
10462                                    tr.col(|ui| {
10463                                        // Resolved lost time when known; else the
10464                                        // provisional started - went_live (so the stream
10465                                        // row matches the monitor row instead of going
10466                                        // blank while a capture is still catching up).
10467                                        let lost = match g.lost_secs() {
10468                                            Some(l) => Some(fmt_duration(l.max(0))),
10469                                            None => g
10470                                                .went_live_at
10471                                                .map(|w| fmt_duration((g.started_at() - w).max(0))),
10472                                        };
10473                                        if let Some(s) = lost {
10474                                            ui.label(s);
10475                                        }
10476                                    });
10477                                    tr.col(|ui| {
10478                                        ui.label(fmt_duration(g.captured_secs(now))).on_hover_text(
10479                                            format!(
10480                                                "{} captured across {} take(s) · span {}",
10481                                                fmt_bytes(g.total_bytes()),
10482                                                g.takes.len(),
10483                                                fmt_duration(span),
10484                                            ),
10485                                        );
10486                                    });
10487                                    tr.col(|_ui| {}); // ad-free (n/a per stream)
10488                                    tr.col(|_ui| {}); // added
10489                                    tr.response().context_menu(|ui| {
10490                                        ui.set_min_width(180.0);
10491                                        let dir_ok =
10492                                            dir.as_ref().map(|d| d.is_dir()).unwrap_or(false);
10493                                        if ui
10494                                            .add_enabled(dir_ok, egui::Button::new("📂  Open folder"))
10495                                            .clicked()
10496                                        {
10497                                            open_path = dir.clone();
10498                                            ui.close();
10499                                        }
10500                                        if let Some(f) = &single_file {
10501                                            let file_ok = std::path::Path::new(f).is_file();
10502                                            if ui
10503                                                .add_enabled(
10504                                                    file_ok,
10505                                                    egui::Button::new("▶  Open file"),
10506                                                )
10507                                                .clicked()
10508                                            {
10509                                                open_path = Some(std::path::PathBuf::from(f));
10510                                                ui.close();
10511                                            }
10512                                            if ui.button("📋  Copy file path").clicked() {
10513                                                copy_text = Some(f.clone());
10514                                                ui.close();
10515                                            }
10516                                        }
10517                                        if ui
10518                                            .add_enabled(
10519                                                !media_player.is_empty()
10520                                                    && grp_stream_target
10521                                                        .as_ref()
10522                                                        .map(|t| playable_with(t, &media_player))
10523                                                        .unwrap_or(false),
10524                                                egui::Button::new("⏵  Stream in player"),
10525                                            )
10526                                            .on_hover_text(if g.status() == "recording" {
10527                                                "Open live capture in the configured media player"
10528                                            } else {
10529                                                "Open in the configured media player"
10530                                            })
10531                                            .on_disabled_hover_text(if media_player.is_empty() {
10532                                                "Set a media player in Settings → Defaults first"
10533                                            } else if grp_stream_target.is_some() {
10534                                                "In-progress SABR capture needs mpv (separate audio/video files)"
10535                                            } else {
10536                                                "No playable capture file found"
10537                                            })
10538                                            .clicked()
10539                                        {
10540                                            open_in_player = grp_stream_target.clone();
10541                                            ui.close();
10542                                        }
10543                                        if ui
10544                                            .add_enabled(
10545                                                !media_player.is_empty(),
10546                                                egui::Button::new("▷  Play new instance"),
10547                                            )
10548                                            .on_hover_text("Tune into the stream at the live edge in the media player (does not record)")
10549                                            .on_disabled_hover_text("Set a media player in Settings → Defaults first")
10550                                            .clicked()
10551                                        {
10552                                            play_new_instance_mid = Some(mid);
10553                                            ui.close();
10554                                        }
10555                                        if ui
10556                                            .add_enabled(
10557                                                dir.is_some(),
10558                                                egui::Button::new("📋  Copy folder path"),
10559                                            )
10560                                            .clicked()
10561                                        {
10562                                            copy_text =
10563                                                dir.as_ref().map(|d| d.to_string_lossy().into_owned());
10564                                            ui.close();
10565                                        }
10566                                    });
10567                                    if disc {
10568                                        toggle_stream = Some(g.key.clone());
10569                                    }
10570                                });
10571                            }
10572                            Vis::Take { mid, gi, ti, depth } => {
10573                                let g = &groups[&mid][gi];
10574                                let t = &g.takes[ti];
10575                                let take_variant = dual_take_variant(g, t);
10576                                let dir = std::path::Path::new(&t.output_path)
10577                                    .parent()
10578                                    .map(|p| p.to_path_buf());
10579                                let file_ok = !t.output_path.is_empty()
10580                                    && std::path::Path::new(&t.output_path).is_file();
10581                                let media_player = self.settings.media_player_path.trim().to_string();
10582                                body.row(24.0, |mut tr| {
10583                                    tr.col(|_ui| {}); // on
10584                                    if show_actions {
10585                                        tr.col(|ui| {
10586                                            ui.push_id(t.id, |ui| {
10587                                                if ui
10588                                                    .add_enabled(file_ok, egui::Button::new("▶").small())
10589                                                    .on_hover_text("Open file")
10590                                                    .clicked()
10591                                                {
10592                                                    open_path =
10593                                                        Some(std::path::PathBuf::from(&t.output_path));
10594                                                }
10595                                                let stream_target = if t.is_active() {
10596                                                    stream_target_for_active(&t.output_path)
10597                                                } else if file_ok {
10598                                                    Some(StreamTarget::Finished(
10599                                                        std::path::PathBuf::from(&t.output_path),
10600                                                    ))
10601                                                } else {
10602                                                    None
10603                                                };
10604                                                let player_ok = !media_player.is_empty()
10605                                                    && stream_target
10606                                                        .as_ref()
10607                                                        .map(|st| playable_with(st, &media_player))
10608                                                        .unwrap_or(false);
10609                                                if ui
10610                                                    .add_enabled(
10611                                                        player_ok,
10612                                                        egui::Button::new("⏵").small(),
10613                                                    )
10614                                                    .on_hover_text(if t.is_active() {
10615                                                        "Stream in player (opens the live capture)"
10616                                                    } else {
10617                                                        "Open in player"
10618                                                    })
10619                                                    .on_disabled_hover_text(if media_player.is_empty() {
10620                                                        "Set a media player in Settings → Defaults first"
10621                                                    } else if stream_target.is_some() {
10622                                                        "In-progress SABR capture needs mpv (separate audio/video files)"
10623                                                    } else {
10624                                                        "No playable capture file found"
10625                                                    })
10626                                                    .clicked()
10627                                                {
10628                                                    open_in_player = stream_target;
10629                                                }
10630                                                if ui
10631                                                    .add_enabled(
10632                                                        !media_player.is_empty(),
10633                                                        egui::Button::new("▷").small(),
10634                                                    )
10635                                                    .on_hover_text("Play new instance in media player at the live edge (does not record)")
10636                                                    .on_disabled_hover_text("Set a media player in Settings → Defaults first")
10637                                                    .clicked()
10638                                                {
10639                                                    play_new_instance_mid = Some(t.monitor_id);
10640                                                }
10641                                                let dir_ok =
10642                                                    dir.as_ref().map(|d| d.is_dir()).unwrap_or(false);
10643                                                if ui
10644                                                    .add_enabled(dir_ok, egui::Button::new("📂").small())
10645                                                    .on_hover_text("Open folder")
10646                                                    .clicked()
10647                                                {
10648                                                    open_path = dir.clone();
10649                                                }
10650                                                if ui
10651                                                    .add_enabled(
10652                                                        !t.output_path.is_empty(),
10653                                                        egui::Button::new("📋").small(),
10654                                                    )
10655                                                    .on_hover_text("Copy file path")
10656                                                    .clicked()
10657                                                {
10658                                                    copy_text = Some(t.output_path.clone());
10659                                                }
10660                                                let del_hint = if t.is_active() {
10661                                                    "Stop the recording before removing this take"
10662                                                } else {
10663                                                    "Remove this take from the list (keeps the file)"
10664                                                };
10665                                                if ui
10666                                                    .add_enabled(
10667                                                        !t.is_active(),
10668                                                        egui::Button::new("🗑").small(),
10669                                                    )
10670                                                    .on_hover_text(del_hint)
10671                                                    .clicked()
10672                                                {
10673                                                    delete_recording = Some(t.id);
10674                                                }
10675                                            });
10676                                        });
10677                                    }
10678                                    tr.col(|_ui| {}); // platform
10679                                    tr.col(|ui| {
10680                                        let label = match take_variant {
10681                                            Some(v) => format!("Take {} · {}", ti + 1, v),
10682                                            None => format!("Take {}", ti + 1),
10683                                        };
10684                                        tree_name(
10685                                            ui, depth, false, false,
10686                                            egui::RichText::new(label).weak(),
10687                                        );
10688                                    });
10689                                    tr.col(|_ui| {}); // tool
10690                                    tr.col(|_ui| {}); // detection
10691                                    tr.col(|_ui| {}); // polled
10692                                    tr.col(|ui| {
10693                                        let (icon, color) = state_icon(&t.status);
10694                                        let resp = ui.colored_label(color, icon);
10695                                        if t.status == "failed" {
10696                                            let mut msg = fail_hover(&t.log_excerpt);
10697                                            if let Some(code) = t.exit_code {
10698                                                msg = format!("{msg}\n(exit code {code})");
10699                                            }
10700                                            resp.on_hover_text(msg);
10701                                        } else if t.status == "ended" {
10702                                            resp.on_hover_text(
10703                                                "The stream had already ended or wasn't live when we \
10704                                                 tried — nothing to capture (not a failure).",
10705                                            );
10706                                        } else if let Some(code) = t.exit_code {
10707                                            resp.on_hover_text(format!("exit code {code}"));
10708                                        } else {
10709                                            resp.on_hover_text(&t.status);
10710                                        }
10711                                        // VOD state badge (Twitch only)
10712                                        match t.vod_state.as_deref() {
10713                                            Some("not_published") => {
10714                                                ui.colored_label(
10715                                                    egui::Color32::from_rgb(220, 80, 80),
10716                                                    "⚠ no VOD",
10717                                                ).on_hover_text("No VOD was published — this local recording may be the only surviving copy.");
10718                                            }
10719                                            Some("found") if t.vod_muted_secs.unwrap_or(0) > 0 => {
10720                                                ui.colored_label(
10721                                                    egui::Color32::from_rgb(220, 160, 30),
10722                                                    "✂ muted",
10723                                                ).on_hover_text(format!(
10724                                                    "VOD has {} of muted content (DMCA) — local recording is the authoritative archive.",
10725                                                    fmt_duration(t.vod_muted_secs.unwrap_or(0))
10726                                                ));
10727                                            }
10728                                            _ => {}
10729                                        }
10730                                        // In-progress / needs-attention badges
10731                                        let needs_remux = t.output_path.ends_with(".ts")
10732                                            && t.output_path.contains(".cache");
10733                                        let remuxing = self.background_tasks.iter().any(|bt| {
10734                                            bt.kind == crate::events::BackgroundTaskKind::Remux
10735                                                && bt.id == t.id as u64
10736                                        });
10737                                        if remuxing {
10738                                            ui.colored_label(
10739                                                egui::Color32::from_rgb(80, 160, 220),
10740                                                "⏳ Remuxing…",
10741                                            ).on_hover_text("Converting .ts capture to .mkv — check the Background tab for progress.");
10742                                        } else if needs_remux {
10743                                            ui.colored_label(
10744                                                egui::Color32::from_rgb(220, 140, 30),
10745                                                "⚠ needs remux",
10746                                            ).on_hover_text("Automatic remux failed — right-click → Re-remux to MKV.");
10747                                        }
10748                                    });
10749                                    tr.col(|_ui| {}); // next stream (n/a per take)
10750                                    tr.col(|ui| {
10751                                        meta_value_cell(ui, &t.category);
10752                                    });
10753                                    tr.col(|ui| {
10754                                        meta_value_cell(ui, &t.title);
10755                                    });
10756                                    // ✏ Changes (index 11)
10757                                    tr.col(|ui| {
10758                                        let det = meta_logs.get(&t.id);
10759                                        if meta_cell(ui, t.meta_change_count, det, true) {
10760                                            open_meta_popup = Some(MetaPopup::Take(t.id));
10761                                        }
10762                                    });
10763                                    // 📢 Ads combined (index 12)
10764                                    tr.col(|ui| {
10765                                        let det = ad_breaks.get(&t.id);
10766                                        if let Some(r) = combined_ads_cell(
10767                                            ui, t.ad_count, t.ad_secs, det, Some(t.id),
10768                                        ) {
10769                                            open_ad_popup = Some(r);
10770                                        }
10771                                    });
10772                                    // Went Live (index 13 — n/a per take, blank)
10773                                    tr.col(|_ui| {});
10774                                    // Started On (index 14)
10775                                    tr.col(|ui| {
10776                                        ts_label(ui, t.started_at);
10777                                    });
10778                                    tr.col(|ui| {
10779                                        // Resolved lost time when known; else the
10780                                        // provisional started - went_live (matches the
10781                                        // monitor row, so a re-attached/in-progress take
10782                                        // isn't blank while it's still catching up).
10783                                        let lost = match t.lost_secs {
10784                                            Some(l) => Some(fmt_duration(l.max(0))),
10785                                            None => t
10786                                                .went_live_at
10787                                                .map(|w| fmt_duration((t.started_at - w).max(0))),
10788                                        };
10789                                        if let Some(s) = lost {
10790                                            ui.label(s);
10791                                        }
10792                                    });
10793                                    tr.col(|ui| {
10794                                        let d = ui.label(fmt_duration(t.duration_secs(now)));
10795                                        if t.bytes > 0 {
10796                                            d.on_hover_text(fmt_bytes(t.bytes));
10797                                        }
10798                                    });
10799                                    tr.col(|_ui| {}); // ad-free (n/a per take)
10800                                    tr.col(|_ui| {}); // added
10801                                    tr.response().context_menu(|ui| {
10802                                        ui.set_min_width(180.0);
10803                                        // Offer re-remux when the finalized file is still a .ts
10804                                        // (the automatic remux failed at recording end).
10805                                        let needs_remux = t.output_path.ends_with(".ts")
10806                                            && t.output_path.contains(".cache");
10807                                        if needs_remux {
10808                                            let remux_dest = std::path::Path::new(&t.output_path)
10809                                                .parent() // .cache/
10810                                                .and_then(|p| p.parent()) // output dir
10811                                                .and_then(|d| {
10812                                                    std::path::Path::new(&t.output_path)
10813                                                        .file_stem()
10814                                                        .map(|s| d.join(format!("{}.mkv", s.to_string_lossy())))
10815                                                });
10816                                            if ui
10817                                                .button("🔄  Re-remux to MKV")
10818                                                .on_hover_text("Convert the captured .ts to .mkv using ffmpeg (the automatic remux failed when the recording ended).")
10819                                                .clicked()
10820                                            {
10821                                                if let Some(dest) = remux_dest {
10822                                                    self.core.manual(ManualCommand::ReRemux {
10823                                                        rec_id: t.id,
10824                                                        capture: std::path::PathBuf::from(&t.output_path),
10825                                                        final_: dest,
10826                                                    });
10827                                                    self.status = "Re-remux started…".into();
10828                                                }
10829                                                ui.close();
10830                                            }
10831                                            ui.separator();
10832                                        }
10833                                        if ui
10834                                            .add_enabled(file_ok, egui::Button::new("▶  Open file"))
10835                                            .clicked()
10836                                        {
10837                                            open_path =
10838                                                Some(std::path::PathBuf::from(&t.output_path));
10839                                            ui.close();
10840                                        }
10841                                        {
10842                                            let stream_target = if t.is_active() {
10843                                                stream_target_for_active(&t.output_path)
10844                                            } else if file_ok {
10845                                                Some(StreamTarget::Finished(
10846                                                    std::path::PathBuf::from(&t.output_path),
10847                                                ))
10848                                            } else {
10849                                                None
10850                                            };
10851                                            let player_ok = !media_player.is_empty()
10852                                                && stream_target
10853                                                    .as_ref()
10854                                                    .map(|st| playable_with(st, &media_player))
10855                                                    .unwrap_or(false);
10856                                            if ui
10857                                                .add_enabled(
10858                                                    player_ok,
10859                                                    egui::Button::new("⏵  Stream in player"),
10860                                                )
10861                                                .on_hover_text(if t.is_active() {
10862                                                    "Open live capture in the configured media player"
10863                                                } else {
10864                                                    "Open in the configured media player"
10865                                                })
10866                                                .on_disabled_hover_text(if media_player.is_empty() {
10867                                                    "Set a media player in Settings → Defaults first"
10868                                                } else if stream_target.is_some() {
10869                                                    "In-progress SABR capture needs mpv (separate audio/video files)"
10870                                                } else {
10871                                                    "No playable capture file found"
10872                                                })
10873                                                .clicked()
10874                                            {
10875                                                open_in_player = stream_target;
10876                                                ui.close();
10877                                            }
10878                                            if ui
10879                                                .add_enabled(
10880                                                    !media_player.is_empty(),
10881                                                    egui::Button::new("▷  Play new instance"),
10882                                                )
10883                                                .on_hover_text("Tune into the stream at the live edge in the media player (does not record)")
10884                                                .on_disabled_hover_text("Set a media player in Settings → Defaults first")
10885                                                .clicked()
10886                                            {
10887                                                play_new_instance_mid = Some(t.monitor_id);
10888                                                ui.close();
10889                                            }
10890                                        }
10891                                        let dir_ok =
10892                                            dir.as_ref().map(|d| d.is_dir()).unwrap_or(false);
10893                                        if ui
10894                                            .add_enabled(dir_ok, egui::Button::new("📂  Open folder"))
10895                                            .clicked()
10896                                        {
10897                                            open_path = dir.clone();
10898                                            ui.close();
10899                                        }
10900                                        if let Some(vod_url) = t.vod_url() {
10901                                            if ui.button("🌐  Open VOD").clicked() {
10902                                                ui.ctx().open_url(egui::OpenUrl::new_tab(vod_url));
10903                                                ui.close();
10904                                            }
10905                                        }
10906                                        if ui
10907                                            .add_enabled(
10908                                                !t.output_path.is_empty(),
10909                                                egui::Button::new("📋  Copy file path"),
10910                                            )
10911                                            .clicked()
10912                                        {
10913                                            copy_text = Some(t.output_path.clone());
10914                                            ui.close();
10915                                        }
10916                                        ui.separator();
10917                                        if ui.button("📄  Properties…").clicked() {
10918                                            open_recording_props = Some(t.id);
10919                                            ui.close();
10920                                        }
10921                                        ui.separator();
10922                                        if ui
10923                                            .add_enabled(file_ok, egui::Button::new("📁  Re-organize files"))
10924                                            .on_hover_text("Move this recording's files into/out of subdirectories based on File Management settings.")
10925                                            .clicked()
10926                                        {
10927                                            self.core.manual(ManualCommand::ReorganizeTake(t.id));
10928                                            ui.close();
10929                                        }
10930                                        if ui
10931                                            .add_enabled(file_ok, egui::Button::new("✏  Rename…"))
10932                                            .on_hover_text("Rename this recording's file (and its companions) to a new stem.")
10933                                            .clicked()
10934                                        {
10935                                            self.rename_rec_id = Some(t.id);
10936                                            self.rename_draft = std::path::Path::new(&t.output_path)
10937                                                .file_stem()
10938                                                .and_then(|s| s.to_str())
10939                                                .unwrap_or("")
10940                                                .to_string();
10941                                            self.rename_preview = self.rename_draft.clone();
10942                                            self.show_rename_dialog = true;
10943                                            ui.close();
10944                                        }
10945                                        ui.separator();
10946                                        let del_hint = if t.is_active() {
10947                                            "Stop the recording before removing this take"
10948                                        } else {
10949                                            "Remove this take from the list (keeps the file)"
10950                                        };
10951                                        if ui
10952                                            .add_enabled(
10953                                                !t.is_active(),
10954                                                egui::Button::new("🗑  Delete from list"),
10955                                            )
10956                                            .on_hover_text(del_hint)
10957                                            .clicked()
10958                                        {
10959                                            delete_recording = Some(t.id);
10960                                            ui.close();
10961                                        }
10962                                    });
10963                                });
10964                            }
10965                        }
10966                    }
10967                });
10968            });
10969        self.streams_sort = sort;
10970        self.streams_filters = filters;
10971        // Consume the scroll target: it fired (or the channel was filtered out)
10972        // — either way, clear it so we don't keep requesting scroll every frame.
10973        if scroll_to_cid.is_some() {
10974            self.scroll_to_channel = None;
10975        }
10976        if let Some(rid) = open_ad_popup {
10977            self.ad_popup = Some(rid);
10978        }
10979        if let Some(p) = open_meta_popup {
10980            self.meta_popup = Some(p);
10981        }
10982        // Next stream double-click: a channel/stream/take row sets the local; an
10983        // instance row routes through RowActions.
10984        if let Some(mid) = open_schedule_popup.or(acts.open_schedule) {
10985            self.schedule_popup = Some(mid);
10986        }
10987
10988        // Tick the live Duration column ~1/sec while anything is recording.
10989        if any_active {
10990            ui.ctx()
10991                .request_repaint_after(std::time::Duration::from_secs(1));
10992        }
10993
10994        if let Some(id) = toggle_channel {
10995            if !self.expanded_channels.remove(&id) {
10996                self.expanded_channels.insert(id);
10997            }
10998        }
10999        if let Some(id) = toggle_instance {
11000            if !self.expanded_instances.remove(&id) {
11001                self.expanded_instances.insert(id);
11002            }
11003        }
11004        if let Some(k) = toggle_stream {
11005            if !self.expanded_streams.remove(&k) {
11006                self.expanded_streams.insert(k);
11007            }
11008        }
11009        if let Some(mid) = acts.edit {
