12538                            self.pending_browse = Some(spawn_browse_file(
12539                                &self.settings.ytdlp_binary_path,
12540                                |app, p| app.settings.ytdlp_binary_path = p,
12541                            ));
12542                        }
12543                    });
12544                    ui.end_row();
12545
12546                    ui.label("SABR build path");
12547                    ui.horizontal(|ui| {
12548                        ui.add(
12549                            egui::TextEdit::singleline(&mut self.settings.sabr_binary_path)
12550                                .hint_text(r"e.g. C:\git\yt-dlp-dev\dist\yt-dlp.exe")
12551                                .desired_width(360.0),
12552                        );
12553                        if ui.button("Browse…").clicked() {
12554                            self.pending_browse = Some(spawn_browse_file(
12555                                &self.settings.sabr_binary_path,
12556                                |app, p| app.settings.sabr_binary_path = p,
12557                            ));
12558                        }
12559                    })
12560                    .response
12561                    .on_hover_text(
12562                        "The yt-dlp dev fork with SABR support (bashonly's feat/youtube/sabr). \
12563                         A moving target — re-point this after rebuilding it. Empty = SABR off.",
12564                    );
12565                    ui.end_row();
12566
12567                    ui.label("Use SABR for capture-from-start");
12568                    ui.checkbox(&mut self.settings.sabr_enabled, "").on_hover_text(
12569                        "When on (and a SABR build is set), YouTube monitors with \
12570                         Capture-from-start record via the SABR build.",
12571                    );
12572                    ui.end_row();
12573
12574                    ui.label("SABR format");
12575                    ui.add(
12576                        egui::TextEdit::singleline(&mut self.settings.sabr_format)
12577                            .hint_text(crate::downloader::SABR_DEFAULT_FORMAT)
12578                            .desired_width(f32::INFINITY),
12579                    );
12580                    ui.end_row();
12581
12582                    ui.label("SABR extractor-args");
12583                    ui.add(
12584                        egui::TextEdit::singleline(&mut self.settings.sabr_extractor_args)
12585                            .hint_text(crate::downloader::SABR_DEFAULT_EXTRACTOR_ARGS)
12586                            .desired_width(f32::INFINITY),
12587                    );
12588                    ui.end_row();
12589
12590                    ui.label("Deep rewind (experimental)");
12591                    ui.checkbox(&mut self.settings.sabr_deep_rewind, "")
12592                        .on_hover_text(
12593                            "Appends enable_live_deep_rewind=true to the SABR extractor-args, \
12594                             letting capture-from-start rewind past YouTube's normal ~4h DVR \
12595                             window (so it can reach the start of a long-running stream instead \
12596                             of stalling). Requires a SABR dev build that supports it; a stock \
12597                             yt-dlp ignores it. Experimental and may be unstable. Has no effect \
12598                             when SABR manual args are set below.",
12599                        );
12600                    ui.end_row();
12601
12602                    ui.label("SABR manual args");
12603                    ui.add(
12604                        egui::TextEdit::singleline(&mut self.settings.sabr_raw_args)
12605                            .hint_text("(optional — overrides format + extractor-args above)")
12606                            .desired_width(f32::INFINITY),
12607                    )
12608                    .on_hover_text(
12609                        "When set, these raw args replace the SABR format + extractor-args \
12610                         preset entirely (put your own -f / --extractor-args here).",
12611                    );
12612                    ui.end_row();
12613
12614                    ui.label("PO token extractor-args");
12615                    ui.add(
12616                        egui::TextEdit::singleline(&mut self.settings.sabr_pot_args)
12617                            .hint_text(crate::downloader::SABR_DEFAULT_POT_ARGS)
12618                            .desired_width(f32::INFINITY),
12619                    )
12620                    .on_hover_text(
12621                        "Passed as a SEPARATE --extractor-args entry on the SABR command \
12622                         (different extractor key than the format args above), for a GVS \
12623                         PO-token provider such as bgutil. Default points at the bgutil HTTP \
12624                         server on its standard port 4416. Leave empty to rely on the \
12625                         provider plugin's own auto-detection. Requires the provider plugin \
12626                         installed for the SABR build + its server running.",
12627                    );
12628                    ui.end_row();
12629
12630                    ui.label("DASH companion format");
12631                    ui.add(
12632                        egui::TextEdit::singleline(&mut self.settings.dash_format)
12633                            .hint_text(crate::downloader::DASH_DEFAULT_FORMAT)
12634                            .desired_width(f32::INFINITY),
12635                    )
12636                    .on_hover_text(
12637                        "Format selector for the DASH companion process when a monitor has \
12638                         Dual capture (SABR + DASH) enabled. Uses the system yt-dlp.",
12639                    );
12640                    ui.end_row();
12641                });
12642
12643            ui.add_space(12.0);
12644            ui.heading("Stream monitor defaults");
12645            ui.label(
12646                "Applied when creating a new monitor. Platform settings override the global; \
12647                 leave a field unset / empty to inherit from the global (or the built-in fallback).",
12648            );
12649            ui.add_space(4.0);
12650
12651            // Work on a local clone to avoid borrow-checker issues (cross-field access
12652            // for hint text vs mutable edit access for the combo/text widgets).
12653            let mut md = self.monitor_defaults.clone();
12654            let custom_presets = self.custom_presets.as_slice();
12655            let mut mdef_preset_delete: Option<i64> = None;
12656            let mut mdef_preset_save_tmpl: Option<String> = None;
12657
12658            for (label, platform_opt) in [
12659                ("🌐  Global", None),
12660                ("  Twitch",   Some(Platform::Twitch)),
12661                ("  YouTube",  Some(Platform::YouTube)),
12662                ("  Kick",     Some(Platform::Kick)),
12663                ("  Generic",  Some(Platform::Generic)),
12664            ] {
12665                let default_open = platform_opt.is_none();
12666                egui::CollapsingHeader::new(label)
12667                    .default_open(default_open)
12668                    .show(ui, |ui| {
12669                        let inherit = if platform_opt.is_some() { "Inherit" } else { "Not set" };
12670
12671                        let methods: &[DetectionMethod] = match platform_opt {
12672                            None => &[
12673                                DetectionMethod::TwitchApi,
12674                                DetectionMethod::EventSubHelix,
12675                                DetectionMethod::YouTubeApi,
12676                                DetectionMethod::WebSub,
12677                                DetectionMethod::WebSubOnly,
12678                                DetectionMethod::Scrape,
12679                                DetectionMethod::KickApi,
12680                                DetectionMethod::GenericProbe,
12681                            ],
12682                            Some(p) => p.detection_methods(),
12683                        };
12684
12685                        // Pre-compute hints from global for per-platform sections.
12686                        let q_hint: String = match platform_opt {
12687                            None => "best".to_string(),
12688                            Some(_) => md.global.quality.clone()
12689                                .filter(|s| !s.is_empty())
12690                                .unwrap_or_else(|| "best".to_string()),
12691                        };
12692                        let pi_hint: String = match platform_opt {
12693                            None => "60".to_string(),
12694                            Some(_) => md.global.poll_interval_secs
12695                                .unwrap_or(60)
12696                                .to_string(),
12697                        };
12698                        let ft_hint: String = match platform_opt {
12699                            None => "{name}_{date}_{time}".to_string(),
12700                            Some(_) => md.global.filename_template.clone()
12701                                .filter(|s| !s.is_empty())
12702                                .unwrap_or_else(|| "{name}_{date}_{time}".to_string()),
12703                        };
12704                        let od_hint: String = match platform_opt {
12705                            None => self.settings.default_output_dir.clone(),
12706                            Some(_) => md.global.output_dir.clone()
12707                                .filter(|s| !s.is_empty())
12708                                .unwrap_or_else(|| self.settings.default_output_dir.clone()),
12709                        };
12710                        let fs_hint: String = if platform_opt.is_some() {
12711                            match md.global.from_start {
12712                                Some(true) => "Inherit (on)".to_string(),
12713                                Some(false) => "Inherit (off)".to_string(),
12714                                None => "Inherit (on)".to_string(),
12715                            }
12716                        } else {
12717                            "on".to_string()
12718                        };
12719
12720                        let d = match platform_opt {
12721                            None => &mut md.global,
12722                            Some(p) => md.get_mut(p),
12723                        };
12724
12725                        egui::Grid::new(format!("mdef_{label}"))
12726                            .num_columns(4)
12727                            .spacing([8.0, 6.0])
12728                            .show(ui, |ui| {
12729                                // Row 1: Tool, Detection
12730                                ui.label("Tool");
12731                                egui::ComboBox::from_id_salt(format!("mdef_tool_{label}"))
12732                                    .selected_text(match d.tool {
12733                                        None => inherit,
12734                                        Some(t) => t.label(),
12735                                    })
12736                                    .show_ui(ui, |ui| {
12737                                        ui.selectable_value(&mut d.tool, None, inherit);
12738                                        for &t in &Tool::ALL {
12739                                            ui.selectable_value(&mut d.tool, Some(t), t.label());
12740                                        }
12741                                    });
12742                                ui.label("Detection");
12743                                egui::ComboBox::from_id_salt(format!("mdef_det_{label}"))
12744                                    .selected_text(match d.detection_method {
12745                                        None => inherit,
12746                                        Some(m) => m.label(),
12747                                    })
12748                                    .show_ui(ui, |ui| {
12749                                        ui.selectable_value(&mut d.detection_method, None, inherit);
12750                                        for &m in methods {
12751                                            ui.selectable_value(&mut d.detection_method, Some(m), m.label());
12752                                        }
12753                                    });
12754                                ui.end_row();
12755
12756                                // Row 2: Container, Quality
12757                                ui.label("Container");
12758                                egui::ComboBox::from_id_salt(format!("mdef_cont_{label}"))
12759                                    .selected_text(match d.container {
12760                                        None => inherit,
12761                                        Some(c) => c.label(),
12762                                    })
12763                                    .show_ui(ui, |ui| {
12764                                        ui.selectable_value(&mut d.container, None, inherit);
12765                                        for &c in &Container::ALL {
12766                                            ui.selectable_value(&mut d.container, Some(c), c.label());
12767                                        }
12768                                    });
12769                                ui.label("Quality");
12770                                let q_ref = d.quality.get_or_insert_with(String::new);
12771                                ui.add(
12772                                    egui::TextEdit::singleline(q_ref)
12773                                        .hint_text(q_hint)
12774                                        .desired_width(100.0),
12775                                );
12776                                ui.end_row();
12777
12778                                // Row 3: Poll interval
12779                                ui.label("Poll interval (s)");
12780                                let mut pi_str = d.poll_interval_secs
12781                                    .map(|v| v.to_string())
12782                                    .unwrap_or_default();
12783                                if ui.add(
12784                                    egui::TextEdit::singleline(&mut pi_str)
12785                                        .hint_text(pi_hint)
12786                                        .desired_width(80.0),
12787                                ).changed() {
12788                                    d.poll_interval_secs = pi_str.trim().parse::<i64>().ok()
12789                                        .filter(|&v| v > 0);
12790                                }
12791                                ui.label("");
12792                                ui.label("");
12793                                ui.end_row();
12794
12795                                // Row 4: Filename template
12796                                ui.label("Filename");
12797                                let ft_ref = d.filename_template.get_or_insert_with(String::new);
12798                                ui.horizontal(|ui| {
12799                                    let (del, save) = filename_preset_combo(
12800                                        ui,
12801                                        &format!("mdef_tmpl_{label}"),
12802                                        ft_ref,
12803                                        custom_presets,
12804                                    );
12805                                    if del.is_some() { mdef_preset_delete = del; }
12806                                    if save { mdef_preset_save_tmpl = Some(ft_ref.clone()); }
12807                                    ui.add(
12808                                        egui::TextEdit::singleline(ft_ref)
12809                                            .hint_text(&ft_hint)
12810                                            .desired_width(150.0),
12811                                    ).on_hover_text(
12812                                        "Tokens: {name} {date} {time} {timestamp} {year} {month} {day} {hour} {minute} {second} {title} {games} {video_id} {quality} {resolution} {height} {width} {fps} {vcodec} {acodec} {take} {tool} {mode} {platform} {went_live_date} {went_live_time}",
12813                                    );
12814                                });
12815                                ui.label("");
12816                                ui.label("");
12817                                ui.end_row();
12818
12819                                // Row 5: Output directory
12820                                ui.label("Output dir");
12821                                let od_ref = d.output_dir.get_or_insert_with(String::new);
12822                                ui.add(
12823                                    egui::TextEdit::singleline(od_ref)
12824                                        .hint_text(od_hint)
12825                                        .desired_width(200.0),
12826                                );
12827                                ui.label("");
12828                                ui.label("");
12829                                ui.end_row();
12830
12831                                // Row 6: Capture from start
12832                                ui.label("Capture from start")
12833                                    .on_hover_text(
12834                                        "yt-dlp --live-from-start / streamlink --hls-live-restart.\n\
12835                                         Default for new stream monitors on this platform.",
12836                                    );
12837                                egui::ComboBox::from_id_salt(format!("mdef_fs_{label}"))
12838                                    .selected_text(match d.from_start {
12839                                        None => inherit,
12840                                        Some(true) => "On",
12841                                        Some(false) => "Off",
12842                                    })
12843                                    .show_ui(ui, |ui| {
12844                                        ui.selectable_value(&mut d.from_start, None, format!("{inherit} ({fs_hint})"));
12845                                        ui.selectable_value(&mut d.from_start, Some(true), "On");
12846                                        ui.selectable_value(&mut d.from_start, Some(false), "Off");
12847                                    });
12848                                ui.label("");
12849                                ui.label("");
12850                                ui.end_row();
12851                            });
12852                    });
12853            }
12854
12855            // Write back the (possibly edited) clone.
12856            self.monitor_defaults = md;
12857
12858            // Apply preset actions now that md borrow is released.
12859            if let Some(id) = mdef_preset_delete {
12860                if let Err(e) = self.core.store.delete_filename_preset(id) {
12861                    self.status = format!("Error deleting preset: {e:#}");
12862                } else {
12863                    self.custom_presets = self.core.store.get_filename_presets().unwrap_or_default();
12864                }
12865            }
12866            if let Some(tmpl) = mdef_preset_save_tmpl {
12867                self.save_preset_dialog = Some(SavePresetDraft {
12868                    template: tmpl,
12869                    name: String::new(),
12870                    error: String::new(),
12871                });
12872            }
12873
12874            ui.add_space(12.0);
12875            ui.heading("Startup");
12876            let mut on = self.autostart_on;
12877            if ui
12878                .checkbox(&mut on, "Start StreamArchiver at login")
12879                .changed()
12880            {
12881                match self.autostart.set(on) {
12882                    Ok(()) => {
12883                        self.autostart_on = on;
12884                        self.status = if on {
12885                            "Autostart enabled.".into()
12886                        } else {
12887                            "Autostart disabled.".into()
12888                        };
12889                    }
12890                    Err(e) => self.status = format!("Autostart error: {e}"),
12891                }
12892            }
12893
12894            ui.add_space(12.0);
12895            ui.heading("Notifications");
12896            let mut notify_on = self.notifications_enabled;
12897            if ui
12898                .checkbox(&mut notify_on, "Show desktop notifications")
12899                .on_hover_text(
12900                    "Show a desktop toast when a recording starts, finishes, or errors. \
12901                     Uncheck to silence all pop-up alerts (the in-app status line and \
12902                     Background view still update). Takes effect immediately.",
12903                )
12904                .changed()
12905            {
12906                self.notifications_enabled = notify_on;
12907                let _ = self
12908                    .core
12909                    .store
12910                    .set_setting(
12911                        crate::notifications::K_NOTIFICATIONS,
12912                        if notify_on { "1" } else { "0" },
12913                    );
12914                self.status = if notify_on {
12915                    "Desktop notifications enabled.".into()
12916                } else {
12917                    "Desktop notifications disabled.".into()
12918                };
12919            }
12920
12921            ui.add_space(12.0);
12922            ui.heading("Shutdown");
12923            let mut keep = self.keep_downloads_on_quit;
12924            if ui
12925                .checkbox(&mut keep, "Keep downloads running when the app closes")
12926                .on_hover_text(
12927                    "Default. Quitting detaches the recording tools so they keep running and \
12928                     writing — the app re-attaches to them on the next launch, so you can \
12929                     restart or rebuild without stopping a recording. Uncheck to stop all \
12930                     downloads on quit instead. (The tray's \"Quit & stop recordings\" always \
12931                     stops them, regardless of this.)",
12932                )
12933                .changed()
12934            {
12935                self.keep_downloads_on_quit = keep;
12936                // Stored inverted: the setting names the opt-IN to stopping.
12937                let _ = self
12938                    .core
12939                    .store
12940                    .set_setting("stop_downloads_on_quit", if keep { "0" } else { "1" });
12941                self.status = if keep {
12942                    "Downloads will keep running when the app closes.".into()
12943                } else {
12944                    "Downloads will stop when the app closes.".into()
12945                };
12946            }
12947
12948            ui.add_space(12.0);
12949            // ── Remux ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
12950            ui.add_space(12.0);
12951            ui.heading("Remux");
12952            ui.label("Controls what gets embedded into MKV files when a recording is finalized (TS→MKV remux).");
12953            egui::Grid::new("remux_opts_grid")
12954                .num_columns(2)
12955                .spacing([12.0, 8.0])
12956                .show(ui, |ui| {
12957                    ui.checkbox(&mut self.settings.remux_embed_thumbnail, "Embed thumbnail as cover art");
12958                    ui.label("Attach the thumbnail sidecar (if present) as MKV cover art.");
12959                    ui.end_row();
12960                    ui.horizontal(|ui| {
12961                        ui.checkbox(&mut self.settings.remux_embed_title, "Embed title tag");
12962                        ui.add_enabled(
12963                            self.settings.remux_embed_title,
12964                            egui::TextEdit::singleline(&mut self.settings.remux_title_template)
12965                                .hint_text("{title}")
12966                                .desired_width(200.0),
12967                        );
12968                    });
12969                    ui.label("Template for the MKV title tag. Tokens: {title} {channel} {date} {name}");
12970                    ui.end_row();
12971                    ui.checkbox(&mut self.settings.remux_embed_subs, "Embed subtitle sidecars");
12972                    ui.label("Copy .srt/.ass/.vtt sidecar files as subtitle streams in the MKV.");
12973                    ui.end_row();
12974                });
12975
12976            // ── File Management ────────────────────────────────────────────────
12977            ui.add_space(12.0);
12978            ui.heading("File Management");
12979            ui.label("Split captured files into per-type subdirectories under the monitor output directory.");
12980            egui::Grid::new("file_split_grid")
12981                .num_columns(2)
12982                .spacing([12.0, 8.0])
12983                .show(ui, |ui| {
12984                    ui.checkbox(&mut self.settings.file_split_enabled, "Enable subdirectory splitting");
12985                    ui.label("Move files into separate dirs (videos/, subs/, chat/, thumbs/, logs/).");
12986                    ui.end_row();
12987
12988                    let enabled = self.settings.file_split_enabled;
12989                    ui.label("Videos dir");
12990                    ui.add_enabled(enabled, egui::TextEdit::singleline(&mut self.settings.file_split_videos).desired_width(140.0).hint_text("videos"));
12991                    ui.end_row();
12992                    ui.label("Subs dir");
12993                    ui.add_enabled(enabled, egui::TextEdit::singleline(&mut self.settings.file_split_subs).desired_width(140.0).hint_text("subs"));
12994                    ui.end_row();
12995                    ui.label("Chat dir");
12996                    ui.add_enabled(enabled, egui::TextEdit::singleline(&mut self.settings.file_split_chat).desired_width(140.0).hint_text("chat"));
12997                    ui.end_row();
12998                    ui.label("Thumbs dir");
12999                    ui.add_enabled(enabled, egui::TextEdit::singleline(&mut self.settings.file_split_thumbs).desired_width(140.0).hint_text("thumbs"));
13000                    ui.end_row();
13001                    ui.label("Logs dir");
13002                    ui.add_enabled(enabled, egui::TextEdit::singleline(&mut self.settings.file_split_logs).desired_width(140.0).hint_text("logs"));
13003                    ui.end_row();
13004                });
13005
13006            // ── Maintenance ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
13007            ui.add_space(12.0);
13008            ui.heading("Maintenance 🔧");
13009            ui.label("One-time batch jobs — each runs in the background and reports progress in the Background tab.");
13010            ui.add_space(6.0);
13011            let mut maint_preset_delete: Option<i64> = None;
13012            let mut maint_preset_save_tmpl: Option<String> = None;
13013            let mut do_set_filename_default = false;
13014            let maint_custom_presets = self.custom_presets.clone();
13015            use crate::events::BackgroundTaskKind as BTK;
13016            let reremux_all_running   = self.background_tasks.iter().any(|t| t.kind == BTK::ReRemuxAll);
13017            let embed_thumb_running   = self.background_tasks.iter().any(|t| t.kind == BTK::EmbedMissingThumbnails);
13018            let fetch_thumb_running   = self.background_tasks.iter().any(|t| t.kind == BTK::FetchMissingThumbnails);
13019            let reorganize_running    = self.background_tasks.iter().any(|t| t.kind == BTK::ReorganizeAll);
13020            egui::Grid::new("maintenance_grid")
13021                .num_columns(2)
13022                .spacing([12.0, 8.0])
13023                .show(ui, |ui| {
13024                    if ui.add_enabled(!reremux_all_running, egui::Button::new("Re-remux all")).clicked() {
13025                        self.core.manual(ManualCommand::ReRemuxAll);
13026                    }
13027                    ui.label("Re-run TS→MKV remux for any recording whose .ts source is still on disk.");
13028                    ui.end_row();
13029
13030                    if ui.add_enabled(!embed_thumb_running, egui::Button::new("Embed missing thumbnails")).clicked() {
13031                        self.core.manual(ManualCommand::EmbedMissingThumbnails);
13032                    }
13033                    ui.label("Embed the thumbnail sidecar into MKV files that don't already have cover art.");
13034                    ui.end_row();
13035
13036                    ui.horizontal(|ui| {
13037                        if ui.add_enabled(!fetch_thumb_running, egui::Button::new("Fetch missing thumbnails")).clicked() {
13038                            self.core.manual(ManualCommand::FetchMissingThumbnails { embed: self.settings.fetch_thumb_embed });
13039                        }
13040                        ui.checkbox(&mut self.settings.fetch_thumb_embed, "Embed after fetch");
13041                    });
13042                    ui.label("Download thumbnails for recordings that are missing a sidecar.");
13043                    ui.end_row();
13044
13045                    if ui.add_enabled(!reorganize_running, egui::Button::new("Re-organize all files")).clicked() {
13046                        self.core.manual(ManualCommand::ReorganizeAll);
13047                    }
13048                    ui.label("Move files into/out of subdirectories based on current File Management settings.");
13049                    ui.end_row();
13050
13051                    ui.horizontal(|ui| {
13052                        let (del, save) = filename_preset_combo(
13053                            ui,
13054                            "maint_filename_preset",
13055                            &mut self.settings.maintenance_filename_preset,
13056                            &maint_custom_presets,
13057                        );
13058                        if del.is_some() { maint_preset_delete = del; }
13059                        if save { maint_preset_save_tmpl = Some(self.settings.maintenance_filename_preset.clone()); }
13060                        let has_preset = !self.settings.maintenance_filename_preset.is_empty();
13061                        if ui.add_enabled(has_preset, egui::Button::new("Set as Default"))
13062                            .on_hover_text("Set this preset as the global filename template default for new monitors.")
13063                            .clicked()
13064                        {
13065                            do_set_filename_default = true;
13066                        }
13067                        ui.checkbox(&mut self.settings.maintenance_apply_all, "Apply to all existing");
13068                    });
13069                    ui.label("Set the global filename template default for new monitors; optionally apply it to all existing ones.");
13070                    ui.end_row();
13071                });
13072            if do_set_filename_default {
13073                let tmpl = self.settings.maintenance_filename_preset.clone();
13074                self.monitor_defaults.global.filename_template = Some(tmpl.clone());
13075                self.persist_monitor_defaults();
13076                if self.settings.maintenance_apply_all {
13077                    match self.core.store.set_all_filename_templates(&tmpl) {
13078                        Ok(n) => self.status = format!("Default set; updated {n} existing monitor(s)."),
13079                        Err(e) => self.status = format!("Error updating monitors: {e:#}"),
13080                    }
13081                } else {
13082                    self.status = "Default filename template updated.".into();
13083                }
13084            }
13085            if let Some(id) = maint_preset_delete {
13086                if let Err(e) = self.core.store.delete_filename_preset(id) {
13087                    self.status = format!("Error deleting preset: {e:#}");
13088                } else {
13089                    self.custom_presets = self.core.store.get_filename_presets().unwrap_or_default();
13090                }
13091            }
13092            if let Some(tmpl) = maint_preset_save_tmpl {
13093                self.save_preset_dialog = Some(SavePresetDraft {
13094                    template: tmpl,
13095                    name: String::new(),
13096                    error: String::new(),
13097                });
13098            }
13099
13100            ui.add_space(12.0);
13101
13102            // ── Diagnostics ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
13103            ui.heading("Diagnostics");
13104            ui.label(
13105                "Crash / freeze dialog icon — path to a PNG file shown as the main icon in \
13106                 error dialogs. Leave empty to use the standard Windows icon. Restart required \
13107                 to apply.",
13108            );
13109            egui::Grid::new("diag_grid")
13110                .num_columns(2)
13111                .spacing([12.0, 8.0])
13112                .show(ui, |ui| {
13113                    ui.label("Dialog icon (PNG)");
13114                    ui.horizontal(|ui| {
13115                        ui.add(
13116                            egui::TextEdit::singleline(&mut self.settings.dialog_icon)
13117                                .hint_text("(standard icon)")
13118                                .desired_width(280.0),
13119                        )
13120                        .on_hover_text(
13121                            "Absolute path to a PNG file. Displayed as the main icon in \
13122                             crash and freeze dialogs. Falls back to the standard Windows \
13123                             icon if the file is missing or not a valid PNG.",
13124                        );
13125                        if ui.button("Browse…").clicked() {
13126                            if let Some(path) = rfd::FileDialog::new()
13127                                .add_filter("PNG images", &["png"])
13128                                .pick_file()
13129                            {
13130                                self.settings.dialog_icon =
13131                                    path.to_string_lossy().into_owned();
13132                            }
13133                        }
13134                    });
13135                    ui.end_row();
13136                });
13137
13138            ui.add_space(16.0);
13139            if ui.button("💾 Save settings").clicked() {
13140                self.save_settings();
13141            }
13142        });
13143    }
13144
13145    fn stats_view(&mut self, ui: &mut egui::Ui) {
13146        use crate::schedule_ocr::load_ocr_stats;
13147
13148        // Load on first render of this tab; also re-loadable via the Refresh button.
13149        if self.stats_snapshot.is_none() {
13150            let ocr = load_ocr_stats(self.core.store.as_ref());
13151            let global = self.core.store.global_stats().unwrap_or_default();
13152            self.stats_snapshot = Some((ocr, global));
13153        }
13154        let (ocr, global) = match self.stats_snapshot.clone() {
13155            Some(s) => s,
13156            None => (OcrStats::default(), GlobalStats::default()),
13157        };
13158
13159        egui::ScrollArea::vertical().show(ui, |ui| {
13160            ui.add_space(8.0);
13161
13162            // ── Claude OCR ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
13163            ui.horizontal(|ui| {
13164                ui.heading("Claude OCR");
13165                ui.with_layout(egui::Layout::right_to_left(egui::Align::Center), |ui| {
13166                    if ui.button("⟳  Refresh").clicked() {
13167                        self.stats_snapshot = None;
13168                    }
13169                    if ui.button("🗑  Reset").on_hover_text("Clear all accumulated OCR stats").clicked() {
13170                        let _ = self.core.store.set_setting(K_OCR_STATS, "{}");
13171                        self.stats_snapshot = None;
13172                    }
13173                });
13174            });
13175            ui.separator();
13176
13177            egui::Grid::new("ocr_stats_grid")
13178                .num_columns(4)
13179                .spacing([32.0, 6.0])
13180                .show(ui, |ui| {
13181                    let total_calls = ocr.calls + ocr.cli_failures + ocr.parse_failures;
13182
13183                    ui.label("Total invocations");
13184                    ui.strong(format!("{total_calls}"));
13185                    ui.label("Cache hits (skipped)");
13186                    ui.strong(format!("{}", ocr.cache_hits));
13187                    ui.end_row();
13188
13189                    ui.label("Successful calls");
13190                    ui.strong(format!("{}", ocr.calls));
13191                    ui.label("CLI failures");
13192                    ui.strong(format!("{}", ocr.cli_failures));
13193                    ui.end_row();
13194
13195                    ui.label("Parse failures");
13196                    ui.strong(format!("{}", ocr.parse_failures));
13197                    ui.label("Last call");
13198                    ui.strong(match ocr.last_call_at {
13199                        Some(t) => {
13200                            use chrono::{Local, TimeZone};
13201                            Local.timestamp_opt(t, 0)
13202                                .single()
13203                                .map(|dt| dt.format("%Y-%m-%d %H:%M").to_string())
13204                                .unwrap_or_else(|| "—".into())
13205                        }
13206                        None => "Never".into(),
13207                    });
13208                    ui.end_row();
13209                });
13210
13211            ui.add_space(8.0);
13212
13213            // Token / cost row
13214            egui::Grid::new("ocr_token_grid")
13215                .num_columns(4)
13216                .spacing([32.0, 6.0])
13217                .show(ui, |ui| {
13218                    let fmt_n = |n: u64| -> String {
13219                        // simple thousands-separator formatting
13220                        let s = n.to_string();
13221                        let mut out = String::new();
13222                        for (i, c) in s.chars().rev().enumerate() {
13223                            if i > 0 && i % 3 == 0 { out.push(','); }
13224                            out.push(c);
13225                        }
13226                        out.chars().rev().collect()
13227                    };
13228
13229                    ui.label("Input tokens");
13230                    ui.strong(fmt_n(ocr.input_tokens));
13231                    ui.label("Output tokens");
13232                    ui.strong(fmt_n(ocr.output_tokens));
13233                    ui.end_row();
13234
13235                    ui.label("Cache-read tokens");
13236                    ui.strong(fmt_n(ocr.cache_read_tokens));
13237                    ui.label("Cache-create tokens");
13238                    ui.strong(fmt_n(ocr.cache_creation_tokens));
13239                    ui.end_row();
13240
13241                    ui.label("Total cost");
13242                    ui.strong(format!("${:.4}", ocr.cost_usd));
13243                    ui.label("");
13244                    ui.label("");
13245                    ui.end_row();
13246                });
13247
13248            // Per-model breakdown table
13249            if !ocr.by_model.is_empty() {
13250                ui.add_space(10.0);
13251                ui.label("Per model:");
13252                ui.add_space(4.0);
13253
13254                let mut models: Vec<_> = ocr.by_model.iter().collect();
13255                models.sort_by(|a, b| b.1.calls.cmp(&a.1.calls));
13256
13257                egui::Grid::new("ocr_model_grid")
13258                    .num_columns(5)
13259                    .spacing([24.0, 4.0])
13260                    .striped(true)
13261                    .show(ui, |ui| {
13262                        ui.strong("Model");
13263                        ui.strong("Calls");
13264                        ui.strong("Input tok");
13265                        ui.strong("Output tok");
13266                        ui.strong("Cost");
13267                        ui.end_row();
13268
13269                        let fmt_n = |n: u64| -> String {
13270                            let s = n.to_string();
13271                            let mut out = String::new();
13272                            for (i, c) in s.chars().rev().enumerate() {
13273                                if i > 0 && i % 3 == 0 { out.push(','); }
13274                                out.push(c);
13275                            }
13276                            out.chars().rev().collect()
13277                        };
13278
13279                        for (model, m) in &models {
13280                            ui.label(model.as_str());
13281                            ui.label(m.calls.to_string());
13282                            ui.label(fmt_n(m.input_tokens));
13283                            ui.label(fmt_n(m.output_tokens));
13284                            ui.label(format!("${:.4}", m.cost_usd));
13285                            ui.end_row();
13286                        }
13287                    });
13288            }
13289
13290            ui.add_space(16.0);
13291
13292            // ── YouTube Data API quota ────────────────────────────────────────
13293            ui.heading("YouTube Data API");
13294            ui.separator();
13295            {
13296                let quota_today = self.yt_quota_today;
13297                let cutoff = self.yt_quota_cutoff;
13298                let search_today = self.yt_search_today;
13299                let search_cutoff = self.yt_search_cutoff;
13300                egui::Grid::new("quota_grid")
13301                    .num_columns(4)
13302                    .spacing([32.0, 6.0])
13303                    .show(ui, |ui| {
13304                        ui.label("Units used today");
13305                        ui.strong(format!("{quota_today}"));
13306                        ui.label("Units cutoff");
13307                        ui.strong(format!("{cutoff}"));
13308                        ui.end_row();
13309                        ui.label("search.list calls today");
13310                        ui.strong(format!("{search_today}"));
13311                        ui.label("Search cutoff");
13312                        ui.strong(format!("{search_cutoff}"));
13313                        ui.end_row();
13314                    });
13315                let frac = (quota_today as f32 / cutoff as f32).clamp(0.0, 1.0);
13316                ui.add(
13317                    egui::ProgressBar::new(frac)
13318                        .text(format!("{quota_today} / {cutoff} units")),
13319                );
13320                let search_frac = (search_today as f32 / 100.0_f32).clamp(0.0, 1.0);
13321                ui.add(
13322                    egui::ProgressBar::new(search_frac)
13323                        .text(format!("{search_today} / 100 search queries")),
13324                );
13325            }
13326
13327            ui.add_space(16.0);
13328
13329            // ── Recordings ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
13330            ui.heading("Recordings");
13331            ui.separator();
13332
13333            let fmt_bytes = |b: i64| -> String {
13334                if b >= 1_000_000_000_000 {
13335                    format!("{:.1} TB", b as f64 / 1e12)
13336                } else if b >= 1_000_000_000 {
13337                    format!("{:.1} GB", b as f64 / 1e9)
13338                } else if b >= 1_000_000 {
13339                    format!("{:.1} MB", b as f64 / 1e6)
13340                } else {
13341                    format!("{:.1} KB", b as f64 / 1e3)
13342                }
13343            };
13344
13345            egui::Grid::new("global_stats_grid")
13346                .num_columns(4)
13347                .spacing([32.0, 6.0])
13348                .show(ui, |ui| {
13349                    ui.label("Total recordings");
13350                    ui.strong(global.total_recordings.to_string());
13351                    ui.label("Total archived");
13352                    ui.strong(fmt_bytes(global.total_bytes));
13353                    ui.end_row();
13354
13355                    ui.label("Total channels");
13356                    ui.strong(global.total_channels.to_string());
13357                    ui.label("Monitors (active)");
13358                    ui.strong(format!("{} ({} active)", global.total_monitors, global.active_monitors));
13359                    ui.end_row();
13360
13361                    ui.label("Upcoming schedule");
13362                    ui.strong(format!("{} segments", global.upcoming_segments));
13363                    ui.label("");
13364                    ui.label("");
13365                    ui.end_row();
13366                });
13367
13368            ui.add_space(8.0);
13369        });
13370    }
13371
13372    /// Debug view (debug builds only). Shows a toast tester, build identity,
13373    /// data counts, filesystem paths, and the live process list.
13374    fn debug_view(&mut self, ui: &mut egui::Ui) {
13375        if !cfg!(debug_assertions) {
13376            ui.label("Debug view is only available in debug builds.");
13377            return;
13378        }
13379
13380        egui::ScrollArea::vertical().show(ui, |ui| {
13381            // ── Toast tester ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
13382            ui.heading("Toast tester");
13383            ui.separator();
13384
13385            let monitor_labels: Vec<String> = self
13386                .rows
13387                .iter()
13388                .map(|r| format!("{} [{}]", r.channel.name, r.monitor.platform().label()))
13389                .collect();
13390
13391            ui.horizontal(|ui| {
13392                ui.label("Monitor:");
13393                let label = monitor_labels
13394                    .get(self.debug_monitor_idx)
13395                    .cloned()
13396                    .unwrap_or_else(|| "— none —".into());
13397                egui::ComboBox::from_id_salt("dbg_monitor_cb")
13398                    .selected_text(label)
13399                    .width(280.0)
13400                    .show_ui(ui, |ui| {
13401                        for (i, name) in monitor_labels.iter().enumerate() {
13402                            ui.selectable_value(&mut self.debug_monitor_idx, i, name);
13403                        }
13404                    });
13405            });
13406            ui.horizontal(|ui| {
13407                ui.label("Title:").on_hover_text("Simulated stream title");
13408                ui.add(egui::TextEdit::singleline(&mut self.debug_test_title).desired_width(280.0));
13409            });
13410            ui.horizontal(|ui| {
13411                ui.label("Game: ").on_hover_text("Simulated game / category");
13412                ui.add(egui::TextEdit::singleline(&mut self.debug_test_game).desired_width(280.0));
13413            });
13414            ui.add_space(4.0);
13415            if ui.button("Send test toast").clicked() {
13416                if let Some(row) = self.rows.get(self.debug_monitor_idx) {
13417                    let platform = row.monitor.platform();
13418                    crate::notifications::send_test_toast(
13419                        &row.channel.name,
13420                        &row.monitor.url,
13421                        platform,
13422                        &self.debug_test_title.clone(),
13423                        &self.debug_test_game.clone(),
13424                    );
13425                } else {
13426                    self.status = "No monitor selected for test toast.".into();
13427                }
13428            }
13429
13430            ui.add_space(16.0);
13431
13432            // ── Build identity ───────────────────────────────────────────────
13433            ui.heading("Build");
13434            ui.separator();
13435            egui::Grid::new("dbg_build_grid")
13436                .num_columns(2)
13437                .spacing([12.0, 4.0])
13438                .show(ui, |ui| {
13439                    ui.label("Build ID:");
13440                    ui.monospace(crate::version::build_id());
13441                    ui.end_row();
13442                    ui.label("Schema version:");
13443                    ui.monospace("25");
13444                    ui.end_row();
13445                    ui.label("Debug assertions:");
13446                    ui.monospace("on");
13447                    ui.end_row();
13448                });
13449
13450            ui.add_space(16.0);
13451
13452            // ── In-memory data counts ────────────────────────────────────────
13453            ui.heading("Data");
13454            ui.separator();
13455            let active_count = {
13456                let a = self.core.active.lock().unwrap_or_else(|e| e.into_inner());
13457                a.len()
13458            };
13459            let active_video_count = {
13460                let a = self.core.active_videos.lock().unwrap_or_else(|e| e.into_inner());
13461                a.len()
13462            };
13463            egui::Grid::new("dbg_data_grid")
13464                .num_columns(2)
13465                .spacing([12.0, 4.0])
13466                .show(ui, |ui| {
13467                    ui.label("Channel containers:");
13468                    ui.monospace(self.channels.len().to_string());
13469                    ui.end_row();
13470                    ui.label("Monitors:");
13471                    ui.monospace(self.rows.len().to_string());
13472                    ui.end_row();
13473                    ui.label("Video downloads:");
13474                    ui.monospace(self.videos.len().to_string());
13475                    ui.end_row();
13476                    ui.label("Active recordings:");
13477                    ui.monospace(active_count.to_string());
13478                    ui.end_row();
13479                    ui.label("Active video DLs:");
13480                    ui.monospace(active_video_count.to_string());
13481                    ui.end_row();
13482                    ui.label("Background tasks:");
13483                    ui.monospace(self.background_tasks.len().to_string());
13484                    ui.end_row();
13485                });
13486
13487            ui.add_space(16.0);
13488
13489            // ── Filesystem paths ─────────────────────────────────────────────
13490            ui.heading("Paths");
13491            ui.separator();
13492            let db_path = crate::app_paths::db_path();
13493            let asset_dir = crate::app_paths::asset_cache_dir();
13494            egui::Grid::new("dbg_paths_grid")
13495                .num_columns(2)
13496                .spacing([12.0, 4.0])
13497                .show(ui, |ui| {
13498                    ui.label("Database:");
13499                    ui.horizontal(|ui| {
13500                        ui.monospace(db_path.display().to_string());
13501                        if ui
13502                            .small_button("📂")
13503                            .on_hover_text("Open folder in explorer")
13504                            .clicked()
13505                        {
13506                            if let Some(parent) = db_path.parent() {
13507                                crate::platform::open_path(parent);
13508                            }
13509                        }
13510                    });
13511                    ui.end_row();
13512                    ui.label("Asset cache:");
13513                    ui.horizontal(|ui| {
13514                        ui.monospace(asset_dir.display().to_string());
13515                        if ui
13516                            .small_button("📂")
13517                            .on_hover_text("Open folder in explorer")
13518                            .clicked()
13519                        {
13520                            crate::platform::open_path(&asset_dir);
13521                        }
13522                    });
13523                    ui.end_row();
13524                });
13525
13526            ui.add_space(16.0);
13527
13528            // ── Live process list ────────────────────────────────────────────
13529            ui.heading("Active processes");
13530            ui.separator();
13531            let procs = self.core.list_processes();
13532            if procs.is_empty() {
13533                ui.label("— none —");
13534            } else {
13535                egui::Grid::new("dbg_procs_grid")
13536                    .num_columns(5)
13537                    .spacing([12.0, 4.0])
13538                    .striped(true)
13539                    .show(ui, |ui| {
13540                        ui.strong("PID");
13541                        ui.strong("Kind");
13542                        ui.strong("Name");
13543                        ui.strong("Tool");
13544                        ui.strong("Build");
13545                        ui.end_row();
13546                        for p in &procs {
13547                            ui.monospace(p.pid.to_string());
13548                            ui.label(format!("{:?}", p.kind));
13549                            ui.label(&p.name);
13550                            ui.label(&p.tool);
13551                            let build_label = if p.reattached {
13552                                format!("{} [re-attached]", p.spawn_build)
13553                            } else {
13554                                p.spawn_build.clone()
13555                            };
13556                            ui.label(build_label);
13557                            ui.end_row();
13558                        }
13559                    });
13560            }
13561        });
13562    }
13563
13564    /// Task-manager-style dialog listing every spawned download tool process with
13565    /// its PID, status, and uptime, plus per-process Stop (graceful) / Kill (force)
13566    /// and reveal-log/folder actions. Doubles as a live list of spawned processes.
13567    #[allow(deprecated)]
13568    fn processes_window(&mut self, ctx: &egui::Context) {
13569        use crate::models::{ContentType, DetachedKind};
13570        use egui_extras::{Column, TableBuilder};
13571        use std::time::{Duration, Instant};
13572        if !self.show_processes {
13573            return;
13574        }
13575        // Drain a completed background load first.
13576        if let Some(rx) = &self.processes_load {
13577            match rx.try_recv() {
13578                Ok(procs) => {
13579                    debug!(count = procs.len(), "list-processes result installed");
13580                    self.processes = procs;
13581                    self.processes_refreshed = Some(Instant::now());
13582                    self.processes_load = None;
13583                }
13584                Err(std::sync::mpsc::TryRecvError::Disconnected) => {
13585                    warn!("list-processes thread disconnected without sending");
13586                    self.processes_load = None;
13587                }
13588                Err(std::sync::mpsc::TryRecvError::Empty) => {}
13589            }
13590        }
13591        // Throttle the snapshot (each row does a pid_alive + a couple DB reads).
13592        // Spawn off the UI thread so the store-mutex wait can't freeze the UI.
13593        let stale = self
13594            .processes_refreshed
13595            .map(|t| t.elapsed() >= Duration::from_millis(1500))
13596            .unwrap_or(true);
13597        if stale && self.processes_load.is_none() {
13598            let core = self.core.clone();
13599            let (tx, rx) = std::sync::mpsc::channel();
13600            debug!("spawning list-processes thread");
13601            std::thread::Builder::new()
13602                .name("list-processes".into())
13603                .spawn(move || {
13604                    let t = std::time::Instant::now();
13605                    let procs = core.list_processes();
13606                    debug!(elapsed_ms = t.elapsed().as_millis(), count = procs.len(), "list-processes done");
13607                    let _ = tx.send(procs);
13608                })
13609                .ok();
13610            self.processes_load = Some(rx);
13611            // Keep repainting until the load arrives.
13612            ctx.request_repaint_after(Duration::from_millis(50));
13613        } else {
13614            ctx.request_repaint_after(Duration::from_millis(1500));
13615        }
13616
13617        let now = now_unix();
13618        let mut open = true;
13619        enum Act {
13620            Refresh,
13621            Stop(usize),
13622            Kill(usize),
13623            RevealLog(usize),
13624            RevealDir(usize),
13625        }
13626        let mut act: Option<Act> = None;
13627
13628        ctx.show_viewport_immediate(
13629            egui::ViewportId::from_hash_of("processes_vp"),
13630            egui::ViewportBuilder::default()
13631                .with_title("🖥 Processes")
13632                .with_inner_size([800.0, 440.0]),
13633            |ctx, _class| {
13634                if ctx.input(|i| i.viewport().close_requested()) {
13635                    open = false;
13636                }
13637                egui::CentralPanel::default().show(ctx, |ui| {
13638                    ui.horizontal(|ui| {
13639                        ui.label(format!("{} spawned process(es)", self.processes.len()));
13640                        if ui.button("⟳ Refresh").clicked() {
13641                            act = Some(Act::Refresh);
13642                        }
13643                        ui.weak("Stop = graceful (file finalized) · Kill = force-terminate the tree");
13644                    });
13645                    ui.separator();
13646                    if self.processes.is_empty() {
13647                        ui.weak("No download tool processes are running.");
13648                        return;
13649                    }
13650                    TableBuilder::new(ui)
13651                        .striped(true)
13652                        .cell_layout(egui::Layout::left_to_right(egui::Align::Center))
13653                        .column(Column::auto()) // PID
13654                        .column(Column::auto()) // Type
13655                        .column(Column::remainder().clip(true)) // Name
13656                        .column(Column::auto()) // Tool
13657                        .column(Column::auto()) // Status
13658                        .column(Column::auto()) // Uptime
13659                        .column(Column::auto()) // Actions
13660                        .header(20.0, |mut h| {
13661                            h.col(|ui| { ui.strong("PID"); });
13662                            h.col(|ui| { ui.strong("Type"); });
13663                            h.col(|ui| { ui.strong("Name"); });
13664                            h.col(|ui| { ui.strong("Tool"); });
13665                            h.col(|ui| { ui.strong("Status"); });
13666                            h.col(|ui| { ui.strong("Uptime"); });
13667                            h.col(|ui| { ui.strong("Actions"); });
13668                        })
13669                        .body(|mut body| {
13670                            for (i, p) in self.processes.iter().enumerate() {
13671                                body.row(22.0, |mut row| {
13672                                    row.col(|ui| { ui.monospace(p.pid.to_string()); });
13673                                    row.col(|ui| {
13674                                        // Map the process role to a content-type icon + label.
13675                                        // A live capture is "🎥 video"; its DASH companion leg
13676                                        // gets a "· dash" suffix. An on-demand download is the
13677                                        // "📼 VOD" so the two video kinds stay distinguishable.
13678                                        let t = match p.kind {
13679                                            DetachedKind::Recording => {
13680                                                let base = ContentType::Video.tag();
13681                                                if p.secondary {
13682                                                    format!("{base} · dash")
13683                                                } else {
13684                                                    base
13685                                                }
13686                                            }
13687                                            DetachedKind::Video => ContentType::Vod.tag(),
13688                                            DetachedKind::Chat => ContentType::Chat.tag(),
13689                                        };
13690                                        ui.label(t);
13691                                    });
13692                                    row.col(|ui| {
13693                                        ui.label(&p.name).on_hover_text(&p.capture_path);
13694                                    });
13695                                    row.col(|ui| { ui.label(&p.tool); });
13696                                    row.col(|ui| {
13697                                        if p.reattached {
13698                                            ui.colored_label(
13699                                                egui::Color32::from_rgb(0x6c, 0xb0, 0xe0),
13700                                                "⛓ re-attached",
13701                                            )
13702                                            .on_hover_text(format!(
13703                                                "running under a prior build: {}",
13704                                                p.spawn_build
13705                                            ));
13706                                        } else {
13707                                            ui.colored_label(
13708                                                egui::Color32::from_rgb(0x6c, 0xe0, 0x8c),
13709                                                "● running",
13710                                            );
13711                                        }
13712                                    });
13713                                    row.col(|ui| {
13714                                        ui.label(fmt_duration_secs((now - p.started_at).max(0)));
13715                                    });
13716                                    row.col(|ui| {
13717                                        if ui
13718                                            .small_button("Stop")
13719                                            .on_hover_text(
13720                                                "Graceful: stop the tool and let the app finalize \
13721                                                 (remux + mark the take stopped).",
13722                                            )
13723                                            .clicked()
13724                                        {
13725                                            act = Some(Act::Stop(i));
13726                                        }
13727                                        if ui
13728                                            .small_button("Kill")
13729                                            .on_hover_text(
13730                                                "Force-terminate the whole process tree now — the \
13731                                                 capture may be left un-finalized.",
13732                                            )
13733                                            .clicked()
13734                                        {
13735                                            act = Some(Act::Kill(i));
13736                                        }
13737                                        if ui.small_button("Log").on_hover_text(&p.log_path).clicked() {
13738                                            act = Some(Act::RevealLog(i));
13739                                        }
13740                                        if ui.small_button("Folder").clicked() {
13741                                            act = Some(Act::RevealDir(i));
13742                                        }
13743                                    });
13744                                });
13745                            }
13746                        });
13747                });
13748            },
13749        );
13750
13751        if !open {
13752            self.show_processes = false;
13753        }
13754        match act {
13755            Some(Act::Refresh) => self.processes_refreshed = None,
13756            Some(Act::Stop(i)) => {
13757                if let Some(p) = self.processes.get(i) {
13758                    self.core.stop_process(p);
13759                    self.status = format!("Stopping pid {} ({})…", p.pid, p.name);
13760                    self.processes_refreshed = None;
13761                }
13762            }
13763            Some(Act::Kill(i)) => {
13764                if let Some(p) = self.processes.get(i) {
13765                    self.core.force_kill(p.pid, &p.job_name);
13766                    self.status = format!("Killed pid {} ({}).", p.pid, p.name);
13767                    self.processes_refreshed = None;
13768                }
13769            }
13770            Some(Act::RevealLog(i)) => {
13771                if let Some(p) = self.processes.get(i) {
13772                    crate::platform::open_path(std::path::Path::new(&p.log_path));
13773                }
13774            }
13775            Some(Act::RevealDir(i)) => {
13776                if let Some(p) = self.processes.get(i) {
13777                    if let Some(dir) = std::path::Path::new(&p.capture_path).parent() {
13778                        crate::platform::open_path(dir);
13779                    }
13780                }
13781            }
13782            None => {}
13783        }
13784    }
13785
13786    /// Returns the list of active (non-dismissed) quota warning keys.
13787    /// Each key is a stable string used for both display and dismissal tracking.
13788    fn active_quota_warnings(&self) -> Vec<String> {
13789        let mut warnings = Vec::new();
13790        if self.yt_quota_today >= self.yt_quota_cutoff {
13791            let key = "youtube_units_exceeded".to_string();
13792            if !self.dismissed_quota_warnings.contains(&key) {
13793                warnings.push(key);
13794            }
13795        } else if self.yt_quota_cutoff > 0
13796            && self.yt_quota_today as f32 / self.yt_quota_cutoff as f32 >= 0.9
13797        {
13798            let key = "youtube_units_near_cutoff".to_string();
13799            if !self.dismissed_quota_warnings.contains(&key) {
13800                warnings.push(key);
13801            }
13802        }
13803        if self.yt_search_today >= self.yt_search_cutoff {
13804            let key = "youtube_search_exceeded".to_string();
13805            if !self.dismissed_quota_warnings.contains(&key) {
13806                warnings.push(key);
13807            }
13808        } else if self.yt_search_cutoff > 0
13809            && self.yt_search_today as f32 / self.yt_search_cutoff as f32 >= 0.9
13810        {
13811            let key = "youtube_search_near_cutoff".to_string();
13812            if !self.dismissed_quota_warnings.contains(&key) {
13813                warnings.push(key);
13814            }
13815        }
13816        warnings
13817    }
13818
13819    /// Issues panel: lists all recordings whose output path is still a `.ts`
13820    /// file inside a `.cache` directory, and lets the user re-remux them to MKV.
13821    #[allow(deprecated)]
13822    fn issues_window(&mut self, ctx: &egui::Context) {
13823        use egui_extras::{Column, TableBuilder};
13824        use std::time::{Duration, Instant};
13825        // Drain any completed background missing-file check first so the badge
13826        // count stays current even when the panel is hidden.
13827        if let Some(rx) = &self.issues_missing_load {
13828            match rx.try_recv() {
13829                Ok(missing) => {
13830                    self.issues_missing = missing;
13831                    self.issues_missing_load = None;
13832                }
13833                Err(std::sync::mpsc::TryRecvError::Disconnected) => {
13834                    self.issues_missing_load = None;
13835                }
13836                Err(std::sync::mpsc::TryRecvError::Empty) => {
13837                    // Still in flight — keep repainting so we pick it up promptly.
13838                    ctx.request_repaint_after(Duration::from_millis(200));
13839                }
13840            }
13841        }
13842
13843        // Always refresh so the toolbar button count stays current even when the
13844        // panel is closed. Use a slower interval when hidden.
13845        let interval = if self.show_issues {
13846            Duration::from_secs(5)
13847        } else {
13848            Duration::from_secs(60)
13849        };
13850        let stale = self
13851            .issues_refreshed
13852            .map(|t| t.elapsed() >= interval)
13853            .unwrap_or(true);
13854        if stale && self.issues_missing_load.is_none() {
13855            // Both queries are small and fast — run them synchronously.
13856            self.issues_recs = self.core.store.recordings_needing_remux().unwrap_or_default();
13857            // Partition errors: those whose output file is gone from disk go to
13858            // issues_errors_no_file (treated as missing), the rest stay in issues_errors.
13859            let all_errors = self.core.store.recordings_with_errors().unwrap_or_default();
13860            let (with_file, no_file): (Vec<_>, Vec<_>) = all_errors.into_iter().partition(|r| {
13861                r.output_path.is_empty() || std::path::Path::new(&r.output_path).exists()
13862            });
13863            self.issues_errors = with_file;
13864            self.issues_errors_no_file = no_file;
13865            // The missing-file check calls path.exists() up to 500 times, which
13866            // can block for seconds on network drives. Spawn it off the UI thread.
13867            let core = self.core.clone();
13868            let (tx, rx) = std::sync::mpsc::channel();
13869            std::thread::Builder::new()
13870                .name("issues-missing-check".into())
13871                .spawn(move || {
13872                    let candidates = core.store.recordings_with_final_path().unwrap_or_default();
13873                    let missing: Vec<_> = candidates
13874                        .into_iter()
13875                        .filter(|r| !std::path::Path::new(&r.output_path).exists())
13876                        .collect();
13877                    let _ = tx.send(missing);
13878                })
13879                .ok();
13880            self.issues_missing_load = Some(rx);
13881            self.issues_refreshed = Some(Instant::now());
13882        }
13883        if !self.show_issues {
13884            return;
13885        }
13886
13887        // Build owned lookup: monitor_id -> (channel_name, platform) to avoid
13888        // holding a borrow on self.rows inside the viewport closure.
13889        let mon_info: std::collections::HashMap<i64, (String, crate::models::Platform)> = self
13890            .rows
13891            .iter()
13892            .map(|r| {
13893                (
13894                    r.monitor.id,
13895                    (r.channel.name.clone(), r.monitor.platform()),
13896                )
13897            })
13898            .collect();
13899
13900        // Clone the platform textures handle so the closure doesn't borrow self.
13901        let ptex = self.platform_tex.clone();
13902        let now = crate::models::now_unix();
13903        let has_active_remux = self
13904            .background_tasks
13905            .iter()
13906            .any(|bt| bt.kind == crate::events::BackgroundTaskKind::Remux);
13907
13908        let n_empty = self.issues_recs.iter().filter(|r| {
13909            std::path::Path::new(&r.output_path).metadata().map(|m| m.len()).unwrap_or(0) == 0
13910        }).count();
13911        let n_missing = self.issues_missing.len();
13912        let n_errors = self.issues_errors.len();
13913        let n_missing_errors = self.issues_errors_no_file.len();
13914        let confirm_clear = self.issues_confirm_clear;
13915        let quota_warnings = self.active_quota_warnings();
13916
13917        let mut open = true;
13918        enum Act {
13919            Remux(usize),
13920            RemuxError(usize),
13921            Delete(usize),
13922            ClearPath(usize),
13923            DeleteError(usize),
13924            ClearError(usize),
13925            ClearMissingError(usize),
13926            ClearEmpties,
13927            ClearAllMissing,
13928            ClearAllErrors,
13929            ClearFilelessErrors,
13930            ConfirmClear,
13931            ClearAll,
13932            DismissWarning(String),
13933        }
13934        let mut act: Option<Act> = None;
13935
13936        ctx.show_viewport_immediate(
13937            egui::ViewportId::from_hash_of("issues_vp"),
13938            egui::ViewportBuilder::default()
13939                .with_title("⚠ Issues")
13940                .with_inner_size([1000.0, 420.0]),
13941            |ctx, _class| {
13942                if ctx.input(|i| i.viewport().close_requested()) {
13943                    open = false;
13944                }
13945                if has_active_remux {
13946                    ctx.request_repaint_after(Duration::from_secs(1));
13947                }
13948                egui::CentralPanel::default().show(ctx, |ui| {
13949                    // ── Quota warnings ───────────────────────────────────────────
13950                    for key in &quota_warnings {
13951                        let (msg, color) = match key.as_str() {
13952                            "youtube_units_exceeded" => (
13953                                format!("YouTube Data API daily unit quota reached ({} / {} units). API calls are paused until tomorrow.", self.yt_quota_today, self.yt_quota_cutoff),
13954                                egui::Color32::from_rgb(200, 80, 80),
13955                            ),
13956                            "youtube_units_near_cutoff" => (
13957                                format!("YouTube Data API units near cutoff ({} / {} units today).", self.yt_quota_today, self.yt_quota_cutoff),
13958                                egui::Color32::from_rgb(200, 150, 60),
13959                            ),
13960                            "youtube_search_exceeded" => (
13961                                format!("YouTube search.list daily limit reached ({} / 100 queries). Search-based detection paused until tomorrow.", self.yt_search_today, ),
13962                                egui::Color32::from_rgb(200, 80, 80),
13963                            ),
13964                            "youtube_search_near_cutoff" => (
13965                                format!("YouTube search.list queries near limit ({} / 100 today, cutoff at {}).", self.yt_search_today, self.yt_search_cutoff),
13966                                egui::Color32::from_rgb(200, 150, 60),
13967                            ),
13968                            _ => continue,
13969                        };
13970                        ui.horizontal(|ui| {
13971                            ui.colored_label(color, &msg);
13972                            if ui.small_button("✕ Dismiss").clicked() {
13973                                act = Some(Act::DismissWarning(key.clone()));
13974                            }
13975                        });
13976                    }
13977                    if !quota_warnings.is_empty() {
13978                        ui.separator();
13979                    }
13980                    ui.horizontal(|ui| {
13981                        ui.label(format!("{} recording(s) need attention", self.issues_recs.len() + n_missing + n_errors));
13982                        if ui.button("⟳ Refresh").clicked() {
13983                            self.issues_refreshed = None;
13984                        }
13985                        ui.separator();
13986                        if n_empty > 0 {
13987                            if ui.button(format!("🗑 Delete {} empty", n_empty))
13988                                .on_hover_text("Delete all 0-byte captures — they contain no data.")
13989                                .clicked()
13990                            {
13991                                act = Some(Act::ClearEmpties);
13992                            }
13993                        }
13994                        if !self.issues_recs.is_empty() {
13995                            if confirm_clear {
13996                                ui.colored_label(
13997                                    egui::Color32::from_rgb(200, 80, 80),
13998                                    format!("Delete all {} capture files?", self.issues_recs.len()),
13999                                );
14000                                if ui.button("✓ Yes, delete all").clicked() {
14001                                    act = Some(Act::ClearAll);
14002                                }
14003                                if ui.button("✗ Cancel").clicked() {
14004                                    act = Some(Act::ConfirmClear);
14005                                }
14006                            } else if ui.button("🗑 Delete all")
14007                                .on_hover_text("Delete all .ts capture files and remove them from the list.")
14008                                .clicked()
14009                            {
14010                                act = Some(Act::ConfirmClear);
14011                            }
14012                        }
14013                        if n_missing > 0 {
14014                            if ui.button(format!("🔗 Clear {} missing", n_missing))
14015                                .on_hover_text("Clear DB path for recordings whose output file was deleted from disk.")
14016                                .clicked()
14017                            {
14018                                act = Some(Act::ClearAllMissing);
14019                            }
14020                        }
14021                        if n_missing_errors > 0 {
14022                            if ui.button(format!("✕ Clear {} no-file failed", n_missing_errors))
14023                                .on_hover_text("Remove DB records for failed recordings whose output file no longer exists on disk.")
14024                                .clicked()
14025                            {
14026                                act = Some(Act::ClearFilelessErrors);
14027                            }
