14028                        }
14029                        if n_errors > 0 {
14030                            if ui.button(format!("✕ Clear all {} failed", n_errors))
14031                                .on_hover_text("Delete DB records for all failed/aborted/orphaned recordings that still have a file. Files are deleted too.")
14032                                .clicked()
14033                            {
14034                                act = Some(Act::ClearAllErrors);
14035                            }
14036                        }
14037                    });
14038                    ui.separator();
14039                    if self.issues_recs.is_empty() && n_missing == 0 && n_errors == 0 && n_missing_errors == 0 {
14040                        ui.weak("No recording issues found — all recordings are in their final format.");
14041                        return;
14042                    }
14043                    TableBuilder::new(ui)
14044                        .striped(true)
14045                        .cell_layout(egui::Layout::left_to_right(egui::Align::Center))
14046                        .column(Column::auto())                                    // Platform icon
14047                        .column(Column::auto().at_least(100.0))                    // Channel
14048                        .column(Column::auto())                                    // Started
14049                        .column(Column::remainder().clip(true).at_least(160.0))   // File
14050                        .column(Column::auto().at_least(60.0))                     // Size
14051                        .column(Column::auto().at_least(80.0))                     // Mode/type
14052                        .column(Column::auto().at_least(130.0))                    // Status
14053                        .column(Column::auto())                                    // Actions
14054                        .header(20.0, |mut h| {
14055                            h.col(|_ui| {});
14056                            h.col(|ui| { ui.strong("Channel"); });
14057                            h.col(|ui| { ui.strong("Started"); });
14058                            h.col(|ui| { ui.strong("File"); });
14059                            h.col(|ui| { ui.strong("Size"); });
14060                            h.col(|ui| { ui.strong("Type"); });
14061                            h.col(|ui| { ui.strong("Status"); });
14062                            h.col(|ui| { ui.strong("Actions"); });
14063                        })
14064                        .body(|mut body| {
14065                            for (i, rec) in self.issues_recs.iter().enumerate() {
14066                                let (ch_name, platform) = mon_info
14067                                    .get(&rec.monitor_id)
14068                                    .map(|(n, p)| (n.as_str(), *p))
14069                                    .unwrap_or(("?", crate::models::Platform::Generic));
14070                                let path = std::path::Path::new(&rec.output_path);
14071                                let fname = path
14072                                    .file_name()
14073                                    .map(|n| n.to_string_lossy().into_owned())
14074                                    .unwrap_or_default();
14075                                let file_bytes = path.metadata().map(|m| m.len()).unwrap_or(0);
14076                                let empty = file_bytes == 0;
14077                                // Parse the recording mode from "(p <mode>  )" in the filename.
14078                                let mode = parse_capture_mode(&fname).unwrap_or_default();
14079                                let remux_task = self.background_tasks.iter().find(|bt| {
14080                                    bt.kind == crate::events::BackgroundTaskKind::Remux
14081                                        && bt.id == rec.id as u64
14082                                });
14083                                let remuxing = remux_task.is_some();
14084                                // Check finished_tasks for a prior failed remux attempt.
14085                                let remux_err = self.finished_tasks.iter().find_map(|(t, outcome, _)| {
14086                                    if t.kind == crate::events::BackgroundTaskKind::Remux
14087                                        && t.id == rec.id as u64
14088                                    {
14089                                        if let crate::events::TaskOutcome::Failed(msg) = outcome {
14090                                            return Some(msg.clone());
14091                                        }
14092                                    }
14093                                    None
14094                                });
14095                                body.row(22.0, |mut row| {
14096                                    row.col(|ui| {
14097                                        if let Some(ref ptex) = ptex {
14098                                            platform_icon(ui, ptex, platform);
14099                                        } else {
14100                                            ui.label(platform.label());
14101                                        }
14102                                    });
14103                                    row.col(|ui| { ui.label(ch_name); });
14104                                    row.col(|ui| { ui.label(fmt_datetime_short(rec.started_at)); });
14105                                    row.col(|ui| {
14106                                        ui.label(&fname)
14107                                            .on_hover_text(&rec.output_path);
14108                                    });
14109                                    row.col(|ui| {
14110                                        if empty {
14111                                            ui.colored_label(
14112                                                egui::Color32::from_rgb(180, 60, 60),
14113                                                "empty",
14114                                            );
14115                                        } else {
14116                                            ui.label(fmt_bytes(file_bytes as i64));
14117                                        }
14118                                    });
14119                                    row.col(|ui| {
14120                                        // "TS" is implicit for all rows; show the mode qualifier if present.
14121                                        let type_str = if mode.is_empty() {
14122                                            "TS".to_string()
14123                                        } else {
14124                                            format!("TS · {mode}")
14125                                        };
14126                                        ui.label(type_str)
14127                                            .on_hover_text(format!("status: {}", rec.status));
14128                                    });
14129                                    row.col(|ui| {
14130                                        if let Some(bt) = remux_task {
14131                                            let elapsed = (now - bt.started_at).max(0);
14132                                            let hover = bt.progress_info.as_deref()
14133                                                .map(|i| format!("{}\nElapsed: {}", i, fmt_duration(elapsed)))
14134                                                .unwrap_or_else(|| fmt_duration(elapsed));
14135                                            if let Some(p) = bt.progress {
14136                                                ui.add(
14137                                                    egui::ProgressBar::new(p)
14138                                                        .show_percentage()
14139                                                        .desired_width(110.0),
14140                                                )
14141                                                .on_hover_text(hover);
14142                                            } else if let Some(ref info) = bt.progress_info {
14143                                                ui.colored_label(
14144                                                    egui::Color32::from_rgb(80, 160, 220),
14145                                                    info,
14146                                                )
14147                                                .on_hover_text(format!("Elapsed: {}", fmt_duration(elapsed)));
14148                                            } else {
14149                                                ui.colored_label(
14150                                                    egui::Color32::from_rgb(80, 160, 220),
14151                                                    format!("⏳ remuxing… {}", fmt_duration(elapsed)),
14152                                                );
14153                                            }
14154                                        } else if empty {
14155                                            ui.colored_label(
14156                                                egui::Color32::from_rgb(180, 60, 60),
14157                                                "✗ empty — no data",
14158                                            ).on_hover_text("Capture wrote 0 bytes. Delete this file.");
14159                                        } else if let Some(ref err) = remux_err {
14160                                            ui.colored_label(
14161                                                egui::Color32::from_rgb(180, 60, 60),
14162                                                "✗ remux failed",
14163                                            ).on_hover_text(err.as_str());
14164                                        } else {
14165                                            let (icon, color) = state_icon(&rec.status);
14166                                            ui.colored_label(color, icon)
14167                                                .on_hover_text(&rec.status);
14168                                        }
14169                                    });
14170                                    row.col(|ui| {
14171                                        if !remuxing {
14172                                            if empty {
14173                                                ui.add_enabled(false, egui::Button::new("🔄").small())
14174                                                    .on_hover_text("Empty capture — nothing to remux.");
14175                                            } else if remux_err.is_some() {
14176                                                ui.add_enabled(false, egui::Button::new("🔄").small())
14177                                                    .on_hover_text("Remux failed — see status cell.");
14178                                            } else if ui
14179                                                .button("🔄")
14180                                                .on_hover_text("Re-remux: convert .ts → .mkv via ffmpeg.")
14181                                                .clicked()
14182                                            {
14183                                                act = Some(Act::Remux(i));
14184                                            }
14185                                            if ui.button("🗑")
14186                                                .on_hover_text(
14187                                                    if empty {
14188                                                        "Delete this empty capture file."
14189                                                    } else {
14190                                                        "Delete the .ts capture file and remove from list."
14191                                                    }
14192                                                )
14193                                                .clicked()
14194                                            {
14195                                                act = Some(Act::Delete(i));
14196                                            }
14197                                        }
14198                                    });
14199                                });
14200                            }
14201                            // Missing-output-file rows (completed/failed/ended but file gone from disk).
14202                            for (j, rec) in self.issues_missing.iter().enumerate() {
14203                                let (ch_name, platform) = mon_info
14204                                    .get(&rec.monitor_id)
14205                                    .map(|(n, p)| (n.as_str(), *p))
14206                                    .unwrap_or(("?", crate::models::Platform::Generic));
14207                                let path = std::path::Path::new(&rec.output_path);
14208                                let fname = path
14209                                    .file_name()
14210                                    .map(|n| n.to_string_lossy().into_owned())
14211                                    .unwrap_or_default();
14212                                let ext = path
14213                                    .extension()
14214                                    .map(|e| e.to_string_lossy().to_uppercase())
14215                                    .unwrap_or_else(|| "?".into());
14216                                body.row(22.0, |mut row| {
14217                                    row.col(|ui| {
14218                                        if let Some(ref ptex) = ptex {
14219                                            platform_icon(ui, ptex, platform);
14220                                        } else {
14221                                            ui.label(platform.label());
14222                                        }
14223                                    });
14224                                    row.col(|ui| { ui.label(ch_name); });
14225                                    row.col(|ui| { ui.label(fmt_datetime_short(rec.started_at)); });
14226                                    row.col(|ui| {
14227                                        ui.label(&fname).on_hover_text(&rec.output_path);
14228                                    });
14229                                    row.col(|ui| {
14230                                        ui.colored_label(
14231                                            egui::Color32::from_rgb(200, 130, 30),
14232                                            "gone",
14233                                        );
14234                                    });
14235                                    row.col(|ui| { ui.label(ext.as_str()); });
14236                                    row.col(|ui| {
14237                                        ui.colored_label(
14238                                            egui::Color32::from_rgb(200, 130, 30),
14239                                            "✗ file missing",
14240                                        ).on_hover_text(format!(
14241                                            "Output file was deleted from disk.\nDB status: {}\nPath: {}",
14242                                            rec.status, rec.output_path
14243                                        ));
14244                                    });
14245                                    row.col(|ui| {
14246                                        if ui.button("🔗 Clear path")
14247                                            .on_hover_text("Remove the stale path from the database record.")
14248                                            .clicked()
14249                                        {
14250                                            act = Some(Act::ClearPath(j));
14251                                        }
14252                                    });
14253                                });
14254                            }
14255                            // ── Failed but file gone (treated as missing) ─────────────────
14256                            for (j2, rec) in self.issues_errors_no_file.iter().enumerate() {
14257                                let (ch_name, platform) = mon_info
14258                                    .get(&rec.monitor_id)
14259                                    .map(|(n, p)| (n.as_str(), *p))
14260                                    .unwrap_or(("?", crate::models::Platform::Generic));
14261                                let path = std::path::Path::new(&rec.output_path);
14262                                let fname = path
14263                                    .file_name()
14264                                    .map(|n| n.to_string_lossy().into_owned())
14265                                    .unwrap_or_default();
14266                                let ext = path
14267                                    .extension()
14268                                    .map(|e| e.to_string_lossy().to_uppercase())
14269                                    .unwrap_or_else(|| "?".to_string());
14270                                body.row(22.0, |mut row| {
14271                                    row.col(|ui| {
14272                                        if let Some(ref ptex) = ptex {
14273                                            platform_icon(ui, ptex, platform);
14274                                        } else {
14275                                            ui.label(platform.label());
14276                                        }
14277                                    });
14278                                    row.col(|ui| { ui.label(ch_name); });
14279                                    row.col(|ui| { ui.label(fmt_datetime_short(rec.started_at)); });
14280                                    row.col(|ui| {
14281                                        ui.label(&fname).on_hover_text(&rec.output_path);
14282                                    });
14283                                    row.col(|ui| {
14284                                        ui.colored_label(egui::Color32::from_rgb(200, 130, 30), "gone");
14285                                    });
14286                                    row.col(|ui| { ui.label(ext.as_str()); });
14287                                    row.col(|ui| {
14288                                        let exit_str = rec.exit_code
14289                                            .map(|c| format!(" (exit {c})"))
14290                                            .unwrap_or_default();
14291                                        ui.colored_label(
14292                                            egui::Color32::from_rgb(200, 80, 80),
14293                                            format!("✗ {}{} — file missing", rec.status, exit_str),
14294                                        ).on_hover_text({
14295                                            let mut parts = vec![
14296                                                format!("status: {}", rec.status),
14297                                                format!("path: {}", rec.output_path),
14298                                            ];
14299                                            if !rec.log_excerpt.is_empty() {
14300                                                parts.push(rec.log_excerpt.trim().to_string());
14301                                            }
14302                                            parts.join("\n")
14303                                        });
14304                                    });
14305                                    row.col(|ui| {
14306                                        if ui.button("✕ Clear")
14307                                            .on_hover_text("Permanently remove this failed recording from the database.")
14308                                            .clicked()
14309                                        {
14310                                            act = Some(Act::ClearMissingError(j2));
14311                                        }
14312                                    });
14313                                });
14314                            }
14315                            // ── Failed / aborted / orphaned rows ─────────────────────────
14316                            for (k, rec) in self.issues_errors.iter().enumerate() {
14317                                let (ch_name, platform) = mon_info
14318                                    .get(&rec.monitor_id)
14319                                    .map(|(n, p)| (n.as_str(), *p))
14320                                    .unwrap_or(("?", crate::models::Platform::Generic));
14321                                let has_file = !rec.output_path.is_empty()
14322                                    && std::path::Path::new(&rec.output_path).exists();
14323                                let has_ts = rec.output_path.ends_with(".ts");
14324                                let path = std::path::Path::new(&rec.output_path);
14325                                let fname = if rec.output_path.is_empty() {
14326                                    "—".to_string()
14327                                } else {
14328                                    path.file_name()
14329                                        .map(|n| n.to_string_lossy().into_owned())
14330                                        .unwrap_or_else(|| rec.output_path.clone())
14331                                };
14332                                let file_size = if has_file {
14333                                    path.metadata().map(|m| m.len()).unwrap_or(0)
14334                                } else {
14335                                    0
14336                                };
14337                                let exit_str = match rec.exit_code {
14338                                    Some(c) => format!("exit {c}"),
14339                                    None => String::new(),
14340                                };
14341                                // Build a hover text from whatever info we have.
14342                                let hover = {
14343                                    let mut parts = vec![format!("status: {}", rec.status)];
14344                                    if !exit_str.is_empty() { parts.push(exit_str.clone()); }
14345                                    if !rec.output_path.is_empty() { parts.push(format!("path: {}", rec.output_path)); }
14346                                    if !rec.log_excerpt.is_empty() { parts.push(format!("\n{}", rec.log_excerpt.trim())); }
14347                                    parts.join("\n")
14348                                };
14349                                body.row(22.0, |mut row| {
14350                                    row.col(|ui| {
14351                                        if let Some(ref ptex) = ptex {
14352                                            platform_icon(ui, ptex, platform);
14353                                        } else {
14354                                            ui.label(platform.label());
14355                                        }
14356                                    });
14357                                    row.col(|ui| { ui.label(ch_name); });
14358                                    row.col(|ui| { ui.label(fmt_datetime_short(rec.started_at)); });
14359                                    row.col(|ui| {
14360                                        ui.label(&fname).on_hover_text(&rec.output_path);
14361                                    });
14362                                    row.col(|ui| {
14363                                        if has_file && file_size > 0 {
14364                                            ui.label(fmt_bytes(file_size as i64));
14365                                        } else if has_file {
14366                                            ui.colored_label(egui::Color32::from_rgb(180, 60, 60), "empty");
14367                                        } else {
14368                                            ui.weak("—");
14369                                        }
14370                                    });
14371                                    row.col(|ui| {
14372                                        let ext = if rec.output_path.is_empty() {
14373                                            "—".to_string()
14374                                        } else {
14375                                            path.extension()
14376                                                .map(|e| e.to_string_lossy().to_uppercase())
14377                                                .unwrap_or_else(|| "?".to_string())
14378                                        };
14379                                        ui.label(ext);
14380                                    });
14381                                    row.col(|ui| {
14382                                        let color = egui::Color32::from_rgb(200, 80, 80);
14383                                        let label = if exit_str.is_empty() {
14384                                            format!("✗ {}", rec.status)
14385                                        } else {
14386                                            format!("✗ {} ({})", rec.status, exit_str)
14387                                        };
14388                                        ui.colored_label(color, label)
14389                                            .on_hover_text(&hover);
14390                                    });
14391                                    row.col(|ui| {
14392                                        // Remux if there's a .ts file on disk.
14393                                        if has_file && has_ts {
14394                                            if ui.button("🔄")
14395                                                .on_hover_text("Attempt to remux this partial .ts to MKV.")
14396                                                .clicked()
14397                                            {
14398                                                act = Some(Act::RemuxError(k));
14399                                            }
14400                                        }
14401                                        // Delete file + clear path.
14402                                        if has_file {
14403                                            if ui.button("🗑")
14404                                                .on_hover_text("Delete the output file and clear it from the database.")
14405                                                .clicked()
14406                                            {
14407                                                act = Some(Act::DeleteError(k));
14408                                            }
14409                                        }
14410                                        // Remove DB record entirely.
14411                                        if ui.button("✕ Clear")
14412                                            .on_hover_text("Permanently remove this failed recording from the database.")
14413                                            .clicked()
14414                                        {
14415                                            act = Some(Act::ClearError(k));
14416                                        }
14417                                    });
14418                                });
14419                            }
14420                        });
14421                });
14422            },
14423        );
14424
14425        if !open {
14426            self.show_issues = false;
14427        }
14428        if let Some(Act::Remux(i)) = act {
14429            if let Some(rec) = self.issues_recs.get(i) {
14430                let dest = std::path::Path::new(&rec.output_path)
14431                    .parent()
14432                    .and_then(|p| p.parent())
14433                    .and_then(|d| {
14434                        std::path::Path::new(&rec.output_path)
14435                            .file_stem()
14436                            .map(|s| d.join(format!("{}.mkv", s.to_string_lossy())))
14437                    });
14438                if let Some(dest) = dest {
14439                    self.core.manual(crate::events::ManualCommand::ReRemux {
14440                        rec_id: rec.id,
14441                        capture: std::path::PathBuf::from(&rec.output_path),
14442                        final_: dest,
14443                    });
14444                    self.status = format!("Re-remux started for recording {}…", rec.id);
14445                }
14446            }
14447        }
14448        if let Some(Act::Delete(i)) = act {
14449            if let Some(rec) = self.issues_recs.get(i).cloned() {
14450                let path = std::path::Path::new(&rec.output_path);
14451                if path.exists() {
14452                    let _ = std::fs::remove_file(path);
14453                }
14454                let _ = self.core.store.clear_recording_capture(rec.id);
14455                self.issues_recs.retain(|r| r.id != rec.id);
14456            }
14457        }
14458        if let Some(Act::ClearEmpties) = act {
14459            let empties: Vec<_> = self.issues_recs.iter().filter(|r| {
14460                std::path::Path::new(&r.output_path).metadata().map(|m| m.len()).unwrap_or(0) == 0
14461            }).cloned().collect();
14462            for rec in empties {
14463                let path = std::path::Path::new(&rec.output_path);
14464                if path.exists() {
14465                    let _ = std::fs::remove_file(path);
14466                }
14467                let _ = self.core.store.clear_recording_capture(rec.id);
14468                self.issues_recs.retain(|r| r.id != rec.id);
14469            }
14470        }
14471        if let Some(Act::ClearPath(j)) = act {
14472            if let Some(rec) = self.issues_missing.get(j).cloned() {
14473                let _ = self.core.store.clear_recording_capture(rec.id);
14474                self.issues_missing.retain(|r| r.id != rec.id);
14475            }
14476        }
14477        if let Some(Act::ClearAllMissing) = act {
14478            let all: Vec<_> = self.issues_missing.drain(..).collect();
14479            for rec in all {
14480                let _ = self.core.store.clear_recording_capture(rec.id);
14481            }
14482        }
14483        if let Some(Act::ConfirmClear) = act {
14484            self.issues_confirm_clear = !self.issues_confirm_clear;
14485        }
14486        if let Some(Act::ClearAll) = act {
14487            let all: Vec<_> = self.issues_recs.drain(..).collect();
14488            for rec in all {
14489                let path = std::path::Path::new(&rec.output_path);
14490                if path.exists() {
14491                    let _ = std::fs::remove_file(path);
14492                }
14493                let _ = self.core.store.clear_recording_capture(rec.id);
14494            }
14495            self.issues_confirm_clear = false;
14496        }
14497        if let Some(Act::DismissWarning(ref key)) = act {
14498            self.dismissed_quota_warnings.insert(key.clone());
14499        }
14500        if let Some(Act::RemuxError(k)) = act {
14501            if let Some(rec) = self.issues_errors.get(k) {
14502                let dest = std::path::Path::new(&rec.output_path)
14503                    .parent()
14504                    .and_then(|p| p.parent())
14505                    .and_then(|d| {
14506                        std::path::Path::new(&rec.output_path)
14507                            .file_stem()
14508                            .map(|s| d.join(format!("{}.mkv", s.to_string_lossy())))
14509                    });
14510                if let Some(dest) = dest {
14511                    self.core.manual(crate::events::ManualCommand::ReRemux {
14512                        rec_id: rec.id,
14513                        capture: std::path::PathBuf::from(&rec.output_path),
14514                        final_: dest,
14515                    });
14516                    self.status = format!("Re-remux started for recording {}…", rec.id);
14517                }
14518            }
14519        }
14520        if let Some(Act::DeleteError(k)) = act {
14521            if let Some(rec) = self.issues_errors.get(k).cloned() {
14522                let path = std::path::Path::new(&rec.output_path);
14523                if path.exists() {
14524                    let _ = std::fs::remove_file(path);
14525                }
14526                let _ = self.core.store.clear_recording_capture(rec.id);
14527                self.issues_errors.retain(|r| r.id != rec.id);
14528            }
14529        }
14530        if let Some(Act::ClearError(k)) = act {
14531            if let Some(rec) = self.issues_errors.get(k).cloned() {
14532                let path = std::path::Path::new(&rec.output_path);
14533                if path.exists() {
14534                    let _ = std::fs::remove_file(path);
14535                }
14536                let _ = self.core.store.delete_recording(rec.id);
14537                self.issues_errors.retain(|r| r.id != rec.id);
14538            }
14539        }
14540        if let Some(Act::ClearAllErrors) = act {
14541            let all: Vec<_> = self.issues_errors.drain(..).collect();
14542            for rec in all {
14543                let path = std::path::Path::new(&rec.output_path);
14544                if path.exists() {
14545                    let _ = std::fs::remove_file(path);
14546                }
14547                let _ = self.core.store.delete_recording(rec.id);
14548            }
14549        }
14550        if let Some(Act::ClearFilelessErrors) = act {
14551            // issues_errors_no_file holds all failed recordings where the file is gone.
14552            let all: Vec<_> = self.issues_errors_no_file.drain(..).collect();
14553            for rec in all {
14554                let _ = self.core.store.delete_recording(rec.id);
14555            }
14556        }
14557        if let Some(Act::ClearMissingError(j2)) = act {
14558            if let Some(rec) = self.issues_errors_no_file.get(j2).cloned() {
14559                let _ = self.core.store.delete_recording(rec.id);
14560                self.issues_errors_no_file.retain(|r| r.id != rec.id);
14561            }
14562        }
14563    }
14564
14565    #[allow(deprecated)]
14566    fn form_window(&mut self, ctx: &egui::Context) {
14567        if self.form.is_none() {
14568            return;
14569        }
14570        let mut open = true;
14571        let mut do_save = false;
14572        let mut do_cancel = false;
14573        let mut open_format_designer = false;
14574        let mut browse_req: Option<PendingBrowse> = None;
14575        let mut form_preset_delete: Option<i64> = None;
14576        let mut form_preset_save_tmpl: Option<String> = None;
14577
14578        let f = self.form.as_ref().unwrap();
14579        let title = if f.monitor_id.is_some() {
14580            "Edit instance"
14581        } else if f.channel_id.is_some() {
14582            "Add instance"
14583        } else {
14584            "Add stream (new channel)"
14585        };
14586
14587        ctx.show_viewport_immediate(
14588            egui::ViewportId::from_hash_of("monitor_form_vp"),
14589            egui::ViewportBuilder::default()
14590                .with_title(title.to_string())
14591                .with_inner_size([700.0, 600.0]),
14592            |ctx, _class| {
14593                if ctx.input(|i| i.viewport().close_requested()) {
14594                    open = false;
14595                }
14596                egui::CentralPanel::default().show(ctx, |ui| {
14597                let form = self.form.as_mut().unwrap();
14598                let platform = Platform::detect(&form.url);
14599                // When the URL's platform changes, re-apply that platform's
14600                // defaults (tool, detection, container, quality, poll interval,
14601                // filename template, output dir). User overrides afterwards stick.
14602                if form.last_platform != Some(platform) {
14603                    let md = &self.monitor_defaults;
14604                    form.tool = md.resolve_tool(platform);
14605                    form.detection_method = md.resolve_detection(platform);
14606                    form.container = md.resolve_container(platform);
14607                    form.quality = md.resolve_quality(platform);
14608                    form.poll_interval_secs = md.resolve_poll_interval(platform);
14609                    form.filename_template = md.resolve_filename_template(platform);
14610                    form.output_dir = md.resolve_output_dir(platform, &self.settings.default_output_dir);
14611                    form.last_platform = Some(platform);
14612                }
14613                // The name belongs to the channel container; it's editable only
14614                // when creating a new channel. For an instance it's the container's
14615                // (rename via the channel row's ✏). The URL is per-instance and
14616                // always editable.
14617                let name_editable = form.channel_id.is_none();
14618
14619                egui::Grid::new("form_grid")
14620                    .num_columns(2)
14621                    .spacing([12.0, 8.0])
14622                    .show(ui, |ui| {
14623                        ui.label("Name");
14624                        let name_resp =
14625                            ui.add_enabled(name_editable, egui::TextEdit::singleline(&mut form.name));
14626                        if !name_editable {
14627                            name_resp.on_hover_text(
14628                                "The channel name — rename it from the channel row's ✏.",
14629                            );
14630                        }
14631                        ui.end_row();
14632
14633                        ui.label("URL");
14634                        ui.add(egui::TextEdit::singleline(&mut form.url).desired_width(320.0))
14635                            .on_hover_text("This instance's source URL (platform auto-detected).");
14636                        ui.end_row();
14637
14638                        ui.label("Platform");
14639                        ui.label(platform.label());
14640                        ui.end_row();
14641
14642                        ui.label("Tool").on_hover_text(form.tool.tooltip());
14643                        egui::ComboBox::from_id_salt("tool_cb")
14644                            .selected_text(form.tool.label())
14645                            .show_ui(ui, |ui| {
14646                                for t in Tool::ALL {
14647                                    ui.selectable_value(&mut form.tool, t, t.label())
14648                                        .on_hover_text(t.tooltip());
14649                                }
14650                            });
14651                        ui.end_row();
14652
14653                        ui.label("Detection")
14654                            .on_hover_text(form.detection_method.tooltip());
14655                        let methods = platform.detection_methods();
14656                        if !methods.contains(&form.detection_method) {
14657                            form.detection_method = platform.default_detection();
14658                        }
14659                        egui::ComboBox::from_id_salt("method_cb")
14660                            .selected_text(form.detection_method.label())
14661                            .show_ui(ui, |ui| {
14662                                for &dm in methods {
14663                                    ui.selectable_value(&mut form.detection_method, dm, dm.label())
14664                                        .on_hover_text(dm.tooltip());
14665                                }
14666                            });
14667                        ui.end_row();
14668
14669                        ui.label("Poll interval (s)");
14670                        ui.add(egui::DragValue::new(&mut form.poll_interval_secs).range(5..=86400));
14671                        ui.end_row();
14672
14673                        ui.label("Quality");
14674                        ui.text_edit_singleline(&mut form.quality);
14675                        ui.end_row();
14676
14677                        ui.label("Container");
14678                        egui::ComboBox::from_id_salt("container_cb")
14679                            .selected_text(form.container.label())
14680                            .show_ui(ui, |ui| {
14681                                for c in Container::ALL {
14682                                    ui.selectable_value(&mut form.container, c, c.label());
14683                                }
14684                            });
14685                        ui.end_row();
14686
14687                        ui.label("Audio tracks");
14688                        ui.text_edit_singleline(&mut form.audio_tracks).on_hover_text(
14689                            "Audio tracks to capture (streamlink --hls-audio-select). \
14690                             Empty = the tool's default single track; 'all' (or '*') = \
14691                             every track; or a comma-separated list of language \
14692                             codes/names. streamlink-only; ffmpeg copy keeps all tracks.",
14693                        );
14694                        ui.end_row();
14695
14696                        ui.label("Subtitle tracks");
14697                        ui.text_edit_singleline(&mut form.subtitle_tracks).on_hover_text(
14698                            "Subtitle tracks to capture (yt-dlp --sub-langs, written as \
14699                             sidecar files next to the recording). Empty = none; 'all' \
14700                             (or '*') = every subtitle; or a comma-separated list of \
14701                             language codes. yt-dlp-only; streamlink can't mux subtitles. \
14702                             Best-effort for live streams.",
14703                        );
14704                        ui.end_row();
14705
14706                        ui.label("Log chat");
14707                        ui.checkbox(&mut form.chat_log, "").on_hover_text(
14708                            "Save chat alongside the recording. Twitch: a built-in \
14709                             anonymous chat logger writes a .chat.jsonl sidecar. YouTube \
14710                             (yt-dlp tool): yt-dlp's live_chat writes a .live_chat.json \
14711                             sidecar. Other platforms/tools don't capture chat.",
14712                        );
14713                        ui.end_row();
14714
14715                        ui.label("Fetch thumbnail");
14716                        ui.checkbox(&mut form.fetch_thumbnail, "").on_hover_text(
14717                            "Download the stream thumbnail alongside the recording \
14718                             ({stem}.thumbnail.jpg). For yt-dlp, passes --write-thumbnail; \
14719                             for Twitch/Kick/YouTube, fetches the URL from detection metadata.",
14720                        );
14721                        ui.end_row();
14722
14723                        ui.label("Thumbnail in notification");
14724                        ui.add_enabled(
14725                            form.fetch_thumbnail,
14726                            egui::Checkbox::new(&mut form.thumbnail_in_toast, ""),
14727                        ).on_hover_text(
14728                            "Use the stream thumbnail as the hero image in the \
14729                             recording-started notification (instead of the channel's \
14730                             static banner). Most useful for YouTube, where each stream \
14731                             has a unique thumbnail. Requires \"Fetch thumbnail\" to be on.",
14732                        );
14733                        ui.end_row();
14734
14735                        ui.label("Fetch chat assets");
14736                        ui.checkbox(&mut form.fetch_chat_assets, "").on_hover_text(
14737                            "Download channel icon, offline banner, Twitch badges, and \
14738                             emotes (including BTTV, FFZ, 7TV) into channel_assets/ \
14739                             alongside recordings. Needed for full offline chat replay. \
14740                             Refreshed at most once per 24 hours.",
14741                        );
14742                        ui.end_row();
14743
14744                        ui.label("Capture from start");
14745                        ui.checkbox(&mut form.capture_from_start, "").on_hover_text(
14746                            "yt-dlp --live-from-start / streamlink --hls-live-restart",
14747                        );
14748                        ui.end_row();
14749
14750                        if Platform::detect(&form.url) == Platform::YouTube {
14751                            ui.label("Dual capture (SABR + DASH)");
14752                            ui.checkbox(&mut form.dual_capture, "").on_hover_text(
14753                                "YouTube only: also run a second concurrent DASH capture \
14754                                 (system yt-dlp, live edge) when wanted formats span both SABR \
14755                                 and DASH. Produces a second recording in the same take. \
14756                                 Needs Capture-from-start and a configured SABR build.",
14757                            );
14758                            ui.end_row();
14759                        }
14760
14761                        ui.label("Ad-free");
14762                        ui.checkbox(&mut form.ad_free, "").on_hover_text(
14763                            "Mark this instance ad-free for your account (YouTube \
14764                             membership/Premium, Twitch Turbo/sub) so captures won't have \
14765                             ad-break hard cuts. For Twitch with a connected account, sub \
14766                             status is also detected automatically.",
14767                        );
14768                        ui.end_row();
14769
14770                        ui.label("Enabled");
14771                        ui.checkbox(&mut form.enabled, "")
14772                            .on_hover_text("Monitor this channel for live streams");
14773                        ui.end_row();
14774
14775                        ui.label("Auth");
14776                        egui::ComboBox::from_id_salt("auth_cb")
14777                            .selected_text(form.auth_kind.label())
14778                            .show_ui(ui, |ui| {
14779                                for k in AuthKind::ALL {
14780                                    ui.selectable_value(&mut form.auth_kind, k, k.label());
14781                                }
14782                            });
14783                        ui.end_row();
14784
14785                        // Value field depends on the chosen auth kind.
14786                        match form.auth_kind {
14787                            AuthKind::CookiesBrowser => {
14788                                ui.label("Browser");
14789                                ui.text_edit_singleline(&mut form.auth_value)
14790                                    .on_hover_text("Browser, or browser:profile — e.g. firefox:dmrf6eed.YouTube (blank = global)");
14791                                ui.end_row();
14792                            }
14793                            AuthKind::CookiesFile => {
14794                                ui.label("Cookies file");
14795                                ui.horizontal(|ui| {
14796                                    ui.text_edit_singleline(&mut form.auth_value);
14797                                    if ui.button("Browse…").clicked() {
14798                                        browse_req = Some(spawn_browse_file(
14799                                            &form.auth_value,
14800                                            |app, p| { if let Some(f) = &mut app.form { f.auth_value = p; } },
14801                                        ));
14802                                    }
14803                                });
14804                                ui.end_row();
14805                            }
14806                            AuthKind::Token => {
14807                                ui.label("Auth token");
14808                                ui.add(
14809                                    egui::TextEdit::singleline(&mut form.auth_value).password(true),
14810                                )
14811                                .on_hover_text("Twitch OAuth token (streamlink)");
14812                                ui.end_row();
14813                            }
14814                            AuthKind::Inherit | AuthKind::Disabled => {}
14815                        }
14816
14817                        ui.label("Output folder");
14818                        ui.horizontal(|ui| {
14819                            ui.text_edit_singleline(&mut form.output_dir);
14820                            if ui.button("Browse…").clicked() {
14821                                browse_req = Some(spawn_browse_folder(
14822                                    &form.output_dir,
14823                                    |app, p| { if let Some(f) = &mut app.form { f.output_dir = p; } },
14824                                ));
14825                            }
14826                        });
14827                        ui.end_row();
14828
14829                        let fn_tmpl_hint = "{name} {date} {time} {year} {month} {day} {hour} {minute} {second} {title} {games} {video_id} {quality} {resolution} {height} {width} {fps} {vcodec} {acodec} {take} {tool} {mode} {platform} {went_live_date} {went_live_time} {timestamp}";
14830                        ui.label("Filename template").on_hover_text(fn_tmpl_hint);
14831                        ui.horizontal(|ui| {
14832                            let custom_presets = self.custom_presets.as_slice();
14833                            let (del, save) = filename_preset_combo(
14834                                ui,
14835                                "monitor_form_tmpl",
14836                                &mut form.filename_template,
14837                                custom_presets,
14838                            );
14839                            if del.is_some() { form_preset_delete = del; }
14840                            if save { form_preset_save_tmpl = Some(form.filename_template.clone()); }
14841                            ui.text_edit_singleline(&mut form.filename_template).on_hover_text(fn_tmpl_hint);
14842                            if ui.button("Design…").on_hover_text("Open the Format Designer to preview and compose the template").clicked() {
14843                                open_format_designer = true;
14844                            }
14845                        });
14846                        ui.end_row();
14847
14848                        ui.label("Extra args");
14849                        ui.text_edit_singleline(&mut form.extra_args);
14850                        ui.end_row();
14851                    });
14852
14853                ui.add_space(8.0);
14854                ui.horizontal(|ui| {
14855                    if ui.button("Save").clicked() {
14856                        do_save = true;
14857                    }
14858                    if ui.button("Cancel").clicked() {
14859                        do_cancel = true;
14860                    }
14861                });
14862                });
14863            },
14864        );
14865
14866        if let Some(br) = browse_req {
14867            self.pending_browse = Some(br);
14868        }
14869
14870        if do_save {
14871            self.save_form();
14872        } else if do_cancel || !open {
14873            self.form = None;
14874        }
14875
14876        if open_format_designer {
14877            let tmpl = self.form.as_ref().map(|f| f.filename_template.clone()).unwrap_or_default();
14878            self.open_format_designer(tmpl, Some(FormatDesignerTarget::MonitorForm));
14879        }
14880        if let Some(id) = form_preset_delete {
14881            if let Err(e) = self.core.store.delete_filename_preset(id) {
14882                self.status = format!("Error deleting preset: {e:#}");
14883            } else {
14884                self.custom_presets = self.core.store.get_filename_presets().unwrap_or_default();
14885            }
14886        }
14887        if let Some(tmpl) = form_preset_save_tmpl {
14888            self.save_preset_dialog = Some(SavePresetDraft {
14889                template: tmpl,
14890                name: String::new(),
14891                error: String::new(),
14892            });
14893        }
14894    }
14895
14896    // ── Chat log viewer ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
14897
14898    fn open_chat_popup(&mut self, monitor_id: i64, ctx: &egui::Context) {
14899        let row = self.rows.iter().find(|r| r.monitor.id == monitor_id);
14900        let monitor_name = row.map(|r| r.channel.name.clone()).unwrap_or_default();
14901        let platform = row.map(|r| r.monitor.platform());
14902        // Twitch: build the third-party emote map (BTTV/FFZ/7TV) once and point at
14903        // the first-party emote dir. YouTube/others: empty map, no dir (emotes come
14904        // inline in the runs / aren't word-matched).
14905        let (emote_map, twitch_emote_dir) = if platform == Some(Platform::Twitch) {
14906            let dir = channel_asset_dir(&monitor_name, Platform::Twitch)
14907                .join("emotes")
14908                .join("twitch");
14909            (Arc::new(build_emote_map(&monitor_name)), Some(dir))
14910        } else {
14911            (Arc::new(HashMap::new()), None)
14912        };
14913
14914        let recs = self
14915            .core
14916            .store
14917            .recordings_for_monitor(monitor_id)
14918            .unwrap_or_default();
14919        let rec = recs
14920            .iter()
14921            .rev()
14922            .find(|r| chat_file_for_recording(r).is_some())
14923            .or_else(|| recs.last())
14924            .cloned();
14925
14926        let state = Arc::new(Mutex::new(ChatLoadState::Loading));
14927        let loading = Arc::new(AtomicBool::new(false));
14928        if let Some(r) = &rec {
14929            self.core.rt.spawn(load_chat(
14930                state.clone(),
14931                loading.clone(),
14932                chat_file_for_recording(r),
14933                r.went_live_at.unwrap_or(r.started_at),
14934                emote_map.clone(),
14935                twitch_emote_dir.clone(),
14936                self.render_emotes,
14937                ctx.clone(),
14938            ));
14939        } else {
14940            *state.lock().unwrap() = ChatLoadState::NoFile;
14941        }
14942        self.chat_popup = Some(ChatPopup {
14943            monitor_name,
14944            recording: rec,
14945            all_recordings: recs,
14946            load_state: state,
14947            search: String::new(),
14948            full_view: false,
14949            last_reload: std::time::Instant::now(),
14950            emote_map,
14951            twitch_emote_dir,
14952            loading,
14953        });
14954    }
14955
14956    #[allow(deprecated)]
14957    fn chat_popup_window(&mut self, ctx: &egui::Context) {
14958        const CHAT_RELOAD_SECS: u64 = 3;
14959        let Some(popup) = &mut self.chat_popup else {
14960            return;
14961        };
14962        // Watchdog: name this phase so a freeze dialog points at the chat popup.
14963        self.heartbeat.set_context(format!("Chat: {}", popup.monitor_name));
14964        self.heartbeat.set_activity(crate::watchdog::Activity::Chat);
14965        let mut open = true;
14966        let title = format!("💬  Chat — {}", popup.monitor_name);
14967
14968        // Whether the selected recording is still in progress (chat file is growing).
14969        let rec_active = popup.recording.as_ref().map_or(false, |r| r.ended_at.is_none());
14970        // Collect everything needed for a tail-reload before the `show` closure
14971        // borrows `popup` so we can act on it cleanly afterwards.
14972        type ReloadInfo = (
14973            std::path::PathBuf,
14974            i64,
14975            Arc<Mutex<ChatLoadState>>,
14976            Arc<HashMap<String, std::path::PathBuf>>,
14977            Option<std::path::PathBuf>,
14978            Arc<AtomicBool>,
14979        );
14980        let reload_info: Option<ReloadInfo> =
14981            if rec_active
14982                && popup.last_reload.elapsed()
14983                    >= std::time::Duration::from_secs(CHAT_RELOAD_SECS)
14984            {
14985                popup.recording.as_ref().and_then(|r| {
14986                    chat_file_for_recording(r).map(|path| {
14987                        (
14988                            path,
14989                            r.went_live_at.unwrap_or(r.started_at),
14990                            popup.load_state.clone(),
14991                            popup.emote_map.clone(),
14992                            popup.twitch_emote_dir.clone(),
14993                            popup.loading.clone(),
14994                        )
14995                    })
14996                })
14997            } else {
14998                None
14999            };
15000
15001        // The emote cache is shared (Arc<Mutex>), so the closure can use a clone
15002        // without borrowing `self`. Copy the render toggles out too. `now` is the
15003        // global animation clock — all instances of an emote animate in lockstep.
15004        let anim_cache = self.emote_anim.clone();
15005        let render_emotes = self.render_emotes;
15006        let animate_emotes = self.animate_emotes;
15007        let now = ctx.input(|i| i.time);
15008        let mut decode_misses: Vec<std::path::PathBuf> = Vec::new();
15009
15010        ctx.show_viewport_immediate(
15011            egui::ViewportId::from_hash_of("chat_popup_vp"),
15012            egui::ViewportBuilder::default()
15013                .with_title(title.clone())
15014                .with_inner_size([480.0, 600.0]),
15015            |ctx, _class| {
15016                if ctx.input(|i| i.viewport().close_requested()) {
15017                    open = false;
15018                }
15019                egui::CentralPanel::default().show(ctx, |ui| {
15020                    // ── Toolbar ──────────────────────────────────────────────
15021                    ui.horizontal(|ui| {
15022                        // Recording picker: only if >1 recording has a chat file.
15023                        let recs_with_chat: Vec<_> = popup
15024                            .all_recordings
15025                            .iter()
15026                            .filter(|r| chat_file_for_recording(r).is_some())
15027                            .collect();
15028                        if recs_with_chat.len() > 1 {
15029                            let cur_label = popup
15030                                .recording
15031                                .as_ref()
15032                                .map(fmt_recording_label)
15033                                .unwrap_or_default();
15034                            egui::ComboBox::from_id_salt("chat_rec_pick")
15035                                .selected_text(cur_label)
15036                                .show_ui(ui, |ui| {
15037                                    for rec in &recs_with_chat {
15038                                        let label = fmt_recording_label(rec);
15039                                        let selected = popup
15040                                            .recording
15041                                            .as_ref()
15042                                            .map(|r| r.id == rec.id)
15043                                            .unwrap_or(false);
15044                                        if ui.selectable_label(selected, &label).clicked() {
15045                                            let new_rec = (*rec).clone();
15046                                            let state = Arc::new(Mutex::new(ChatLoadState::Loading));
15047                                            let path = chat_file_for_recording(&new_rec);
15048                                            let start_ts =
15049                                                new_rec.went_live_at.unwrap_or(new_rec.started_at);
15050                                            let emap = popup.emote_map.clone();
15051                                            let tdir = popup.twitch_emote_dir.clone();
15052                                            popup.load_state = state.clone();
15053                                            popup.recording = Some(new_rec);
15054                                            popup.last_reload = std::time::Instant::now();
15055                                            self.core.rt.spawn(load_chat(
15056                                                state,
15057                                                popup.loading.clone(),
15058                                                path,
15059                                                start_ts,
15060                                                emap,
15061                                                tdir,
15062                                                render_emotes,
15063                                                ctx.clone(),
15064                                            ));
15065                                        }
15066                                    }
15067                                });
15068                            ui.separator();
15069                        }
15070
15071                        // Search filter
15072                        ui.label("🔍");
15073                        ui.add(
15074                            egui::TextEdit::singleline(&mut popup.search)
15075                                .hint_text("Filter…")
15076                                .desired_width(150.0),
15077                        );
15078                        if !popup.search.is_empty() && ui.small_button("✕").clicked() {
15079                            popup.search.clear();
15080                        }
15081
15082                        ui.with_layout(egui::Layout::right_to_left(egui::Align::Center), |ui| {
15083                            ui.toggle_value(&mut popup.full_view, "View full");
15084                        });
15085                    });
15086                    ui.separator();
15087
15088                    // ── Content ──────────────────────────────────────────────
15089                    let state = popup.load_state.lock().unwrap().clone();
15090                    match state {
15091                        ChatLoadState::Loading => {
15092                            ui.horizontal(|ui| {
15093                                ui.spinner();
15094                                ui.label("Loading chat…");
15095                            });
15096                            ctx.request_repaint();
15097                        }
15098                        ChatLoadState::NoFile => {
15099                            ui.add_space(8.0);
15100                            ui.label("No chat file found for this recording.");
15101                            ui.weak("Chat logging must be enabled and a recording must exist.");
15102                        }
15103                        ChatLoadState::Error(ref e) => {
15104                            ui.colored_label(egui::Color32::RED, format!("Failed to load: {e}"));
15105                        }
15106                        ChatLoadState::Loaded(ref msgs) => {
15107                            let q = popup.search.to_lowercase();
15108                            let all_filtered: Vec<&ChatMessage> = msgs
15109                                .iter()
15110                                .filter(|m| {
15111                                    q.is_empty()
15112                                        || m.text.to_lowercase().contains(&q)
15113                                        || m.author.to_lowercase().contains(&q)
15114                                })
15115                                .collect();
15116
15117                            const DEFAULT_CAP: usize = 500;
15118                            let (visible, capped) =
15119                                if popup.full_view || all_filtered.len() <= DEFAULT_CAP {
15120                                    (all_filtered.as_slice(), false)
15121                                } else {
15122                                    (&all_filtered[all_filtered.len() - DEFAULT_CAP..], true)
15123                                };
15124
15125                            if capped {
15126                                ui.horizontal(|ui| {
15127                                    ui.weak(format!(
15128                                        "Showing last {DEFAULT_CAP} of {} messages",
15129                                        all_filtered.len()
15130                                    ));
15131                                    if ui.small_button("View full").clicked() {
15132                                        popup.full_view = true;
15133                                    }
15134                                });
15135                            } else {
15136                                ui.weak(format!("{} messages", all_filtered.len()));
15137                            }
15138
15139                            let stick = q.is_empty() && !popup.full_view;
15140                            egui::ScrollArea::vertical()
15141                                .auto_shrink([false, false])
15142                                .stick_to_bottom(stick)
15143                                .show(ui, |ui| {
15144                                    ui.spacing_mut().item_spacing.y = 2.0;
15145                                    for msg in visible {
15146                                        render_chat_message(
15147                                            ui,
15148                                            msg,
15149                                            &anim_cache,
15150                                            render_emotes,
15151                                            animate_emotes,
15152                                            now,
15153                                            &mut decode_misses,
15154                                            ctx,
15155                                        );
15156                                    }
15157                                });
15158                        }
15159                    }
15160                });
15161                draw_alt_image_preview(ctx);
15162            },
15163        );
15164        // Decode any newly-seen emotes off the UI thread, then LRU-evict the cache.
15165        self.pump_emote_decodes(decode_misses, now, ctx);
15166
15167        // Tail-reload: re-parse the chat file in the background while the
15168        // recording is still live so new messages appear without re-opening.
15169        if let Some((path, start_ts, state, emap, tdir, loading)) = reload_info {
15170            if let Some(p) = &mut self.chat_popup {
15171                p.last_reload = std::time::Instant::now();
15172            }
15173            self.core.rt.spawn(load_chat(
15174                state,
15175                loading,
15176                Some(path),
15177                start_ts,
15178                emap,
15179                tdir,
15180                render_emotes,
15181                ctx.clone(),
15182            ));
15183        }
15184        // Keep the UI alive while a live recording is open so the next
15185        // interval check fires automatically.
15186        if rec_active {
15187            ctx.request_repaint_after(std::time::Duration::from_secs(CHAT_RELOAD_SECS));
15188        }
15189
15190        if !open {
15191            self.chat_popup = None;
15192            // Free all decoded emote frame textures now the popup is closed.
15193            self.clear_emote_cache();
15194        }
15195    }
15196
15197    /// Drop all decoded emote frames and bump the epoch so any in-flight decode
15198    /// task skips its insert (poison-safe).
15199    fn clear_emote_cache(&self) {
15200        self.emote_epoch.fetch_add(1, Ordering::SeqCst);
15201        self.emote_anim
15202            .lock()
15203            .unwrap_or_else(|e| e.into_inner())
15204            .clear();
15205    }
15206
15207    /// Decode newly-seen emotes off the UI thread, then enforce the LRU memory
15208    /// budget on the (now drawn) cache. Bounds how many decodes start per frame so
15209    /// opening a view with hundreds of distinct emotes doesn't spawn a blocking-
15210    /// thread storm; the over-cap ones revert to "unseen" and retry next frame. The
15211    /// epoch guard drops results whose cache was cleared (view closed / assets
15212    /// refetched) mid-decode. Shared by the chat replay popup and the emote viewer.
15213    fn pump_emote_decodes(
15214        &self,
15215        mut decode_misses: Vec<std::path::PathBuf>,
15216        now: f64,
15217        ctx: &egui::Context,
15218    ) {
15219        // Watchdog: the decode/upload/evict sweep is the most texture-churning phase.
15220        self.heartbeat.set_activity(crate::watchdog::Activity::EmoteDecodePump);
15221        const MAX_DECODE_PER_FRAME: usize = 64;
15222        if decode_misses.len() > MAX_DECODE_PER_FRAME {
15223            let mut g = self.emote_anim.lock().unwrap_or_else(|e| e.into_inner());
15224            for path in &decode_misses[MAX_DECODE_PER_FRAME..] {
15225                g.remove(path);
15226            }
15227            decode_misses.truncate(MAX_DECODE_PER_FRAME);
15228        }
15229        let epoch = self.emote_epoch.load(Ordering::SeqCst);
15230        for path in decode_misses {
15231            let cache = self.emote_anim.clone();
15232            let epoch_at = self.emote_epoch.clone();
15233            let ctx2 = ctx.clone();
15234            self.core.rt.spawn_blocking(move || {
15235                let decoded = std::fs::read(&path).ok().and_then(|b| crate::emote_anim::decode(&b));
15236                let entry = match decoded {
15237                    Some((imgs, delays)) => crate::emote_anim::EmoteLoad::Decoded(imgs, delays),
15238                    None => crate::emote_anim::EmoteLoad::Failed,
15239                };
15240                let mut g = cache.lock().unwrap_or_else(|e| e.into_inner());
15241                if epoch_at.load(Ordering::SeqCst) == epoch {
15242                    g.insert(path, entry);
15243                    drop(g);
15244                    ctx2.request_repaint();
15245                }
15246            });
15247        }
15248        evict_emote_cache(&self.emote_anim, now);
15249    }
15250
15251    /// Instance (monitor) properties window — header + monitor-specific info.
15252    #[allow(deprecated)]
15253    fn instance_properties_window(&mut self, ctx: &egui::Context) {
15254        let Some(mid) = self.properties_popup else { return };
15255        let Some(row) = self.rows.iter().find(|r| r.monitor.id == mid).cloned() else {
15256            self.properties_popup = None;
15257            return;
15258        };
15259        let ch = &row.channel;
15260        let m = &row.monitor;
15261
15262        let platforms: Vec<Platform> = {
15263            let mons: Vec<&MonitorWithChannel> =
15264                self.rows.iter().filter(|r| r.channel.id == ch.id).collect();
15265            channel_platforms(&mons)
15266        };
15267
15268        let icon_tex = self
15269            .channel_icons
15270            .entry(ch.id)
15271            .or_insert_with(|| resolve_channel_icon(ch, &platforms, ctx))
15272            .clone();
15273
15274        if self.instance_scope_draft.as_ref().map(|(id, _)| *id) != Some(m.id) {
15275            self.instance_scope_draft = Some((m.id, load_monitor_scope(&self.core.store, m.id)));
15276        }
15277        let global_order = load_source_order(&self.core.store);
15278        let mut scope_dirty = false;
15279
15280        let mut open = true;
15281        ctx.show_viewport_immediate(
15282            egui::ViewportId::from_hash_of("instance_props_vp"),
15283            egui::ViewportBuilder::default()
15284                .with_title(format!("Instance — {}", ch.name))
15285                .with_inner_size([480.0, 380.0]),
15286            |ctx, _class| {
15287                if ctx.input(|i| i.viewport().close_requested()) {
15288                    open = false;
15289                }
15290                egui::CentralPanel::default().show(ctx, |ui| {
15291                // ── Header ──────────────────────────────────────────────
15292                ui.horizontal(|ui| {
15293                    if let Some(tex) = &icon_tex {
15294                        let resp = ui.add(
15295                            egui::Image::from_texture(tex)
15296                                .max_size(egui::vec2(96.0, 96.0))
15297                                .corner_radius(egui::CornerRadius::same(8)),
15298                        );
15299                        queue_alt_image_preview(ui.ctx(), &resp, tex);
15300                    } else {
15301                        let (rect, _) = ui.allocate_exact_size(
15302                            egui::vec2(96.0, 96.0),
15303                            egui::Sense::hover(),
15304                        );
15305                        ui.painter().rect_filled(
15306                            rect,
15307                            8.0,
15308                            ui.visuals().weak_text_color(),
15309                        );
15310                    }
15311                    ui.add_space(8.0);
15312                    ui.vertical(|ui| {
15313                        ui.add_space(4.0);
15314                        ui.heading(&ch.name);
15315                        ui.horizontal(|ui| {
15316                            let ptex = self
15317                                .platform_tex
15318                                .get_or_insert_with(|| PlatformTextures::load(ui.ctx()));
15319                            for &p in &platforms {
15320                                if let Some(t) = ptex.get(p) {
15321                                    ui.add(
15322                                        egui::Image::from_texture(t)
15323                                            .max_size(egui::vec2(14.0, 14.0)),
15324                                    );
15325                                }
15326                            }
15327                            let names: Vec<&str> =
15328                                platforms.iter().map(|p| p.label()).collect();
15329                            ui.label(if names.is_empty() {
15330                                "—".to_string()
15331                            } else {
15332                                names.join(" · ")
15333                            });
15334                        });
15335                    });
15336                });
15337
15338                ui.separator();
15339
15340                // ── Monitor (instance) ───────────────────────────────────
15341                ui.strong("Monitor (instance)");
15342                egui::Grid::new("props_mon")
15343                    .num_columns(2)
15344                    .spacing([12.0, 4.0])
15345                    .show(ui, |ui| {
15346                        ui.label("DB monitor ID");
15347                        ui.label(m.id.to_string());
15348                        ui.end_row();
15349                        ui.label("Detection");
15350                        ui.label(m.detection_method.as_str());
15351                        ui.end_row();
15352                        ui.label("Tool");
15353                        ui.label(format!("{:?}", m.tool));
15354                        ui.end_row();
15355                        ui.label("Poll interval");
15356                        ui.label(format!("{}s", m.poll_interval_secs));
15357                        ui.end_row();
15358                        ui.label("Quality");
15359                        ui.label(&m.quality);
15360                        ui.end_row();
15361                        ui.label("Max concurrent");
15362                        ui.label(m.max_concurrent.to_string());
15363                        ui.end_row();
15364                        ui.label("Last state");
15365                        ui.label(&m.last_state);
15366                        ui.end_row();
15367                        ui.label("Recordings");
15368                        ui.label(row.recording_count.to_string());
15369                        ui.end_row();
15370                        ui.label("Output dir");
15371                        ui.horizontal(|ui| {
15372                            ui.label(prop_truncate_path(&m.output_dir, 28));
15373                            if ui
15374                                .small_button("📂")
15375                                .on_hover_text("Open folder")
15376                                .clicked()
15377                            {
15378                                crate::platform::open_path(
15379                                    std::path::Path::new(&m.output_dir),
15380                                );
15381                            }
15382                        });
15383                        ui.end_row();
15384                        ui.label("Fetch thumbnail");
15385                        ui.label(prop_bool(m.fetch_thumbnail));
15386                        ui.end_row();
15387                        ui.label("Fetch assets");
15388                        ui.label(prop_bool(m.fetch_chat_assets));
15389                        ui.end_row();
15390                    });
15391
15392                // ── Schedule sources (this instance) ─────────────────────
15393                ui.add_space(8.0);
15394                ui.strong("Schedule sources (this instance)");
15395                ui.label(
15396                    egui::RichText::new(
15397                        "Overrides the global order/title-fill for this one instance, taking \
15398                         precedence over the channel's setting. Changes apply on the next \
15399                         schedule refresh.",
15400                    )
15401                    .small()
15402                    .weak(),
15403                );
15404                if let Some((_, scope)) = self.instance_scope_draft.as_mut() {
15405                    if scope_override_editor(ui, scope, &global_order) {
15406                        scope_dirty = true;
15407                    }
15408                }
15409                });
15410                draw_alt_image_preview(ctx);
15411            },
15412        );
15413
15414        if scope_dirty {
15415            if let Some((mid, scope)) = &self.instance_scope_draft {
15416                if let Err(e) = save_monitor_scope(&self.core.store, *mid, scope) {
15417                    self.status = format!("Error saving instance sources: {e}");
15418                } else {
15419                    self.core.request_schedule_refresh();
15420                }
15421            }
15422        }
15423
15424        if !open {
